frontmatter.summary: Authoritative 2026-07-06 repo exploration: BigHand gold objects, schemas, FactPersonCapacity, WDM naming/key conventions, framework autogen gaps.

description: Create canonical BigHand gold exploration wiki page

arguments.content:
# BigHand Gold Layer & WorkerDataMart Conventions

[[projects/data-platform-dlz/data-platform-dlz|← Index]] | Operational hub: [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/bighand-data-product]] | WDM overview: [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/worker-data-mart]]

> **Source of truth** — repo code exploration as of 2026-07-06. Supersedes earlier wiki assumptions where they differ (e.g. `FactPersonCapacity` MODEL view exists; no `curated_commitments` table).

## Catalog context

All gold objects use `USE CATALOG` via `UNITY_CATALOG_GOLD_CATALOG` (= `fbd-d-uks-data-dlz-dbw-gold`). Schema names are lowercase `bighand` / `workerdatamart` for CURATED physical tables; MODEL views use PascalCase schema (`WorkerDataMart`, `BigHand`).

---

## 1. BigHand gold-layer objects

### Summary inventory

| Object | Type | Full name | Status |
|--------|------|-----------|--------|
| `curated_forecasts` | External Delta table | `fbd-d-uks-data-dlz-dbw-gold`.`bighand`.`curated_forecasts` | **Exists** — commitment/forecast data |
| `curated_qualifications` | External Delta table | `...`.`bighand`.`curated_qualifications` | **Exists** |
| `curated_workingarrangements` | External Delta table | `...`.`bighand`.`curated_workingarrangements` | **Exists** |
| `FactPersonCapacity` | View | `BigHand.FactPersonCapacity` | **Exists** (MODEL layer) |
| `curated_commitments` | — | — | **Does not exist** — commitments live in `curated_forecasts` |

**Not gold CURATED:** `Offices` is type `Enriched Dataset` only (ENRICHED delta on silver, no curated table). See [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/bighand-data-product#Entity catalogue (current)]].

There are **no BigHand references** in `transformation/yaml/*/deploy.yml`; deployment is generic workspace sync. BigHand DDL is wired manually into post-deployment orchestrators (`Create CURATED Metastore Tables - bighand.py`).

### 1.1 `bighand.curated_forecasts`

**DDL:** `transformation/src/databricks/1 - Post Deployment/Create CURATED Metastore Tables - bighand.py`

| Column | SQL type |
|--------|----------|
| `PersonKey` | BIGINT |
| `employeeId` | INT |
| `commitmentDate` | DATE |
| `commitmentTypeName` | STRING |
| `clientKey` | INT |
| `matterNumber` | STRING |
| `isProvisionalMatter` | BOOLEAN |
| `isProvisionalBooking` | BOOLEAN |
| `commitmentHours` | DECIMAL(16,2) |
| + standard ETL/hash columns | `source_system`, `inserted_*`, `updated_*`, `natural_key_hash`, `all_columns_hash` |

**Storage:** `{DATALAKE}/CURATED/General/BigHand/Forecasts/delta/`

| Stage | Notebook |
|-------|----------|
| CURATED | `4 - CURATED/BigHand/Curated - BigHand - Fact - Forecasts.py` |
| ENRICHED | `3 - ENRICHED/BigHand/Enriched - BigHand - Fact - Forecasts.py` |
| Contract | `metadata/contracts/data-products/BigHand/Forecasts.json` |

**ENRICHED join pattern** (PersonKey + UK/EU filter — full SQL in [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/bighand-data-product#PersonKey join (ENRICHED — all three Facts)]]):

```sql
SELECT dp.PersonKey, bh.employeeId, bh.commitmentDate, ...
FROM bighand.bighand_forecasts bh
INNER JOIN workerdatamart.curated_dimperson dp
  ON bh.employeeId = dp.EmployeeId
 AND dp.is_current = 1 AND lower(dp.Source) = 'workday'
INNER JOIN workerdatamart.curated_dimoffice o ...
```

### 1.2 `bighand.curated_qualifications`

**DDL:** same post-deployment file.

| Column | SQL type |
|--------|----------|
| `PersonKey` | BIGINT |
| `employeeId` | INT |
| `qualificationDate` | DATE |
| `countryIsoCode` / `countryName` | STRING |
| `regionIsoCode` / `regionName` | STRING |
| + standard ETL/hash columns | |

**Notebooks:** `Curated - BigHand - Fact - Qualifications.py` / `Enriched - BigHand - Fact - Qualifications.py` — contract `Qualifications.json`.

### 1.3 `bighand.curated_workingarrangements`

| Column | SQL type |
|--------|----------|
| `PersonKey` | BIGINT |
| `employeeID` | INT *(capital **ID** — inconsistent with forecasts/qualifications `employeeId`)* |
| `effectiveStartDate` | DATE |
| `monWorkingHours` … `sunWorkingHours` | DECIMAL(16,2) each |
| + standard ETL/hash columns | |

**Notebooks:** `Curated - BigHand - Fact - Working Arrangements.py` / `Enriched - BigHand - Fact - Working Arrangements.py` — contract `WorkingArrangements.json`.

### 1.4 MODEL view: `BigHand.FactPersonCapacity`

**File:** `transformation/src/databricks/5 - MODEL/BigHand/Model - BigHand - FactPersonCapacity.py`

| Column | Type (logical) |
|--------|----------------|
| `PersonKey` | BIGINT |
| `employeeId` | INT |
| `calendarDate` | DATE |
| `contractedHours` | DECIMAL |
| `isWorkingDay` | BOOLEAN |
| `forecastMatterCommitmentHours` | aggregated DECIMAL |
| `forecastLeaveCommitmentHours` | aggregated DECIMAL |
| `forecastTrainingCommitmentHours` | aggregated DECIMAL |
| `forecastCount` | INT |
| `hasProvisionalBooking` | BOOLEAN |
| `hasProvisionalMatter` | BOOLEAN |

Joins `workerdatamart.curated_dimperson` on `employeeId = EmployeeId` and `workerdatamart.curated_dimdate` for calendar spine. Registered in `Run All Model Views.py` (line 568).

### 1.5 Supporting files (not gold curated tables)

| Path | Role |
|------|------|
| `1 - Post Deployment/Create BASE Metastore Tables - bighand.py` | Silver/BASE tables in `bighand` schema |
| `1 - Post Deployment/Create CURATED Metastore Tables.py` | `%run` bighand child |
| `1 - Post Deployment/Create Metastore Schemas.py` | `CREATE SCHEMA IF NOT EXISTS bighand` |
| `11 - Ingestion/Ingest BigHand.py` | API ingestion — [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/api-ingestion-notebooks]] |
| `metadata/contracts/data-products/BigHand/_dataProduct.json` | Data product registration |
| `metadata/contracts/data-products/BigHand/Offices.json` | Enriched Dataset only |
| `metadata/contracts/scripts/data-products/BigHand-EntityMetadata.csv` | Entity registry for contract generation |

---

## 2. WorkerDataMart gold conventions

### 2.1 Schema & table naming

| Layer | Schema | Table pattern | Example |
|-------|--------|---------------|---------|
| CURATED (physical) | `workerdatamart` (lowercase) | `curated_{entityCode}` all lowercase | `curated_facttimerecord`, `curated_dimperson` |
| MODEL (Power BI views) | `WorkerDataMart` (PascalCase in `CREATE VIEW`) | `{EntityCode}` PascalCase, no prefix | `WorkerDataMart.FactTimeRecord`, `WorkerDataMart.DimPerson` |

**Autogen rule** (`framework/python/adatis_autogen/template_handlers/template_helpers/__init__.py`):

```python
"curatedSchemaName": dataProduct.code.lower(),          # workerdatamart
"curatedTableName": f"curated_{entity.code}".lower(),   # e.g. curated_facttimerecord
```

Entity codes **include type prefix**: `FactTimeRecord`, `DimPerson`, `BridgeDealDealIndustry`, `AggMatterInvoice`.

**BigHand deviation:** entity codes are `Forecasts`, `Qualifications`, `WorkingArrangements` (no `Fact` prefix) → tables are `curated_forecasts`, not `curated_factforecasts`.

### 2.2 Attribute / column naming

| Category | Convention | Examples |
|----------|------------|----------|
| Surrogate keys | PascalCase + `Key` | `PersonKey`, `MatterKey`, `DateKey`, `WorkDateKey` |
| Role-specific keys | `{Role}Key` | `WorkerKey`, `BillingPartnerKey` |
| Natural / source IDs | PascalCase | `EmployeeId`, `PersonId`, `MatterHistoryId` |
| Business attributes | PascalCase | `Forename`, `MatterName`, `TimeRecordWorkHours` |
| SCD Type 2 | snake_case | `valid_from`, `valid_to`, `is_current` |
| ETL metadata | snake_case | `inserted_process_instance_id`, `natural_key_hash` |
| Measures | PascalCase, often suffixed | `TimeRecordAmount`, `InvoiceAmountGBP` |

**BigHand inconsistency:** mixes camelCase source fields (`employeeId`, `commitmentDate`) with PascalCase surrogate (`PersonKey`).

### 2.3 Data product contracts

- **Location:** `metadata/contracts/data-products/WorkerDataMart/*.json`
- **Manifest:** `_dataProduct.json` | **CSV:** `metadata/contracts/scripts/data-products/WorkerDataMart-EntityMetadata.csv`
- **Schema:** `framework/contracts/schemas/entity.json`

**`isModelViewEnabled`:**

| Product | Setting | MODEL views |
|---------|---------|-------------|
| WorkerDataMart | virtually all `false` | Hand-authored under `5 - MODEL/Worker Data Mart/` |
| CanonicalModel | `true` | Framework autogen pass-through `SELECT * FROM curated_*` |
| BigHand | not in contracts | `FactPersonCapacity` manually maintained |

See [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/contract-generation-pipeline]] for the CSV → contract → notebook chain.

---

## 3. DateKey, MatterKey, PersonKey / EmployeeId patterns

### 3.1 DateKey

**WDM ENRICHED** (`Enriched - Worker Data Mart - Fact - TimeRecord.py`):

```sql
LEFT JOIN workerdatamart.curated_dimDate AS dd1 ON base.WorkDate = dd1.Date
-- emits dd1.DateKey AS WorkDateKey
```

**WDM MODEL** re-joins `curated_dimDate` on `datekey` to expose `Date` for Power BI.

**BigHand:** does **not** use `DateKey` in curated tables; uses raw `commitmentDate` / `effectiveStartDate`. `FactPersonCapacity` joins `curated_dimdate` on `Date` for calendar spine only.

### 3.2 MatterKey

**WDM pattern:** join `curated_dimMatter` on `MatterHistoryId` → emit `MatterKey` surrogate into fact curated table.

**BigHand:** uses `matterNumber` (string) and `clientKey` (int) — **no `MatterKey`** join to `workerdatamart.curated_dimmatter`.

### 3.3 PersonKey / EmployeeId

**DimPerson curated** (`curated_dimperson`):
- `PersonKey` — surrogate (IDENTITY)
- `PersonId` + `Source` — natural key (Type 2 SCD)
- `EmployeeId` — Workday employee number (Type 1)

**Elite3E fact resolution** (SCD-aware on `PersonId` + `Source` + `valid_from`/`valid_to`).

**BigHand → Person resolution** (Workday, current row only):

```sql
INNER JOIN workerdatamart.curated_dimperson dp
  ON bh.employeeId = dp.EmployeeId
 AND dp.is_current = 1 AND lower(dp.Source) = 'workday'
```

Both `PersonKey` and source `employeeId`/`EmployeeId` are stored on BigHand curated facts.

---

## 4. Framework autogen & view generation

**Location:** `framework/` (vendor submodule — read-only). See [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/adatis-framework-notebooks]].

| Artifact | Template |
|----------|----------|
| CURATED DDL notebooks | `create-curated-metastore-table-notebook.handlebars` |
| CURATED populate | `create-curate-fact-notebook.handlebars`, `create-curate-dimension-notebook.handlebars` |
| Simple MODEL views | `create-model-view-notebook.handlebars` |
| Run All Model Views | `create-model-orchestration-notebook.handlebars` |

**Default autogen model view:**

```sql
CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW {{dataProductCode}}.{{entityCode}} AS
SELECT {{columns}} FROM `{{curatedSchemaName}}`.`{{curatedTableName}}`
```

**BigHand status:**
- CURATED DDL manually added — comment in `Create CURATED Metastore Tables.py`: *"not yet covered by autogen"*
- CURATED populate notebooks hand-written
- One hand-written MODEL view: `FactPersonCapacity`
- BigHand entry in `Run All Model Views.py` added manually (line 568)

---

## 5. Key takeaways for new BigHand gold work

1. **Follow WDM patterns** for surrogate keys (`PersonKey`; optionally `DateKey`/`MatterKey`), PascalCase `*Key` columns, and ETL metadata columns.
2. **Table naming:** keep `curated_{entityname}` or align with `curated_fact{EntityName}` by renaming entity codes in contracts.
3. **Person resolution:** join `workerdatamart.curated_dimperson` on `EmployeeId` + `Source = 'workday'` + `is_current = 1` (+ UK/EU office filter per [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/bighand-data-product]]).
4. **No `curated_commitments`** — commitment data is in `curated_forecasts` (`commitmentDate`, `commitmentTypeName`, `commitmentHours`).
5. **Power BI views** under `5 - MODEL/BigHand/` as `CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW BigHand.{EntityName}`; register in `Run All Model Views.py`; set `"isModelViewEnabled": false` if hand-authoring.
6. **Contracts** in `metadata/contracts/data-products/BigHand/` with `$schema` → `framework/contracts/schemas/entity.json`.

## Related

- [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/bighand-data-product]] — deploy sequence, validation SQL, architecture diagram
- [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/curated-and-model-layers]] — notebook counts and layer roles
- [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/worker-data-mart]] — WDM product overview
- [[projects/data-platform-dlz/entities/factpersoncalendar]] — WDM person×date calendar view (non-contracted)
- [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/contract-generation-pipeline]] — CSV → contracts → notebooks

frontmatter.title: BigHand Gold Layer & WDM Conventions
frontmatter.summary: Authoritative 2026-07-06 repo exploration: BigHand gold objects, schemas, FactPersonCapacity, WDM naming/key conventions, framework autogen gaps.

arguments.content:
# BigHand Data Product

[[projects/data-platform-dlz/data-platform-dlz|← Index]] | **Gold reference:** [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/bighand-gold-layer-exploration]] | Ingestion: [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/api-ingestion-notebooks]] | Contracts: [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/contract-generation-pipeline]] | Deploy: [[projects/data-platform-dlz/skills/deployment-and-ci-cd]]

## Summary

**BigHand** is a DLZ data product over the `bighand` source system (BigHand RM API). It landed initially as four **Enriched Dataset** entities (cast/prune only, `silver.temp`). From **2026-07-03** three person-level entities were promoted to the **Fact** path (PersonKey + UK/EU office filter in ENRICHED, mechanical CURATED to `gold.bighand.curated_*`). **Offices** remains an Enriched Dataset terminating at `silver.temp` only.

For **schemas, column inventories, MODEL view `FactPersonCapacity`, WDM key conventions, and framework autogen status** see [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/bighand-gold-layer-exploration]] (authoritative repo exploration, 2026-07-06).

## Source system vs data product

| Layer | Catalog / schema | Objects |
|-------|------------------|---------|
| **Ingestion** (`bighand` source) | `silver.bighand` | `bighand_forecasts`, `bighand_offices`, `bighand_qualifications`, `bighand_workingarrangements` |
| **ENRICHED temp** | `silver.temp` (Offices) or **`gold.temp`** (3 Facts) | `enriched_bighand_*` |
| **CURATED** | `gold.bighand` | `curated_forecasts`, `curated_qualifications`, `curated_workingarrangements` |
| **MODEL** | `gold` / schema `BigHand` | `FactPersonCapacity` view |

Silver BASE table name = `<sourceSystemCode>.<entityCode>` (e.g. `bighand.bighand_offices`), **not** the ingestion `TABLE_NAME` (`bh_Offices`).

## Entity catalogue (current)

| Entity code | Contract type | PersonKey | UK/EU filter | Terminal output |
|-------------|---------------|-----------|--------------|-----------------|
| `Forecasts` | **Fact** | Yes | Yes | `gold.bighand.curated_forecasts` |
| `Qualifications` | **Fact** | Yes | Yes | `gold.bighand.curated_qualifications` |
| `WorkingArrangements` | **Fact** | Yes | Yes | `gold.bighand.curated_workingarrangements` |
| `Offices` | **Enriched Dataset** | No | N/A | `silver.temp.enriched_bighand_offices` only |

Entity codes are **not** prefixed with `Fact*` — temp table names stay `enriched_bighand_<entity>`. There is **no** `curated_commitments` table; commitment fields live on `curated_forecasts`.

Contracts: `metadata/contracts/data-products/BigHand/`. CSVs: `metadata/contracts/scripts/data-products/BigHand-*.csv`.

## Architecture — Fact path (FactPersonCalendar pattern)

Reference implementation: WDM **`FactPersonCalendar`** — business logic in **ENRICHED**, persistence in **CURATED**.

```mermaid
flowchart LR
  subgraph silver [silver catalog]
    BASE["bighand.bighand_*"]
    OFF_TEMP["temp.enriched_bighand_offices"]
  end
  subgraph gold [gold catalog]
    DP["workerdatamart.curated_dimperson"]
    DO["workerdatamart.curated_dimoffice"]
    FACT_TEMP["temp.enriched_bighand_* x3"]
    CUR["bighand.curated_* x3"]
    MODEL["BigHand.FactPersonCapacity"]
  end
  BASE --> ENR_FACT["ENRICHED Fact notebooks x3"]
  BASE --> ENR_OFF["ENRICHED Offices notebook"]
  DP --> ENR_FACT
  DO --> ENR_FACT
  ENR_FACT --> FACT_TEMP
  ENR_OFF --> OFF_TEMP
  FACT_TEMP --> CUR_NB["CURATED Fact notebooks x3"]
  CUR_NB --> CUR
  CUR --> MODEL
```

| Stage | Responsibility |
|-------|----------------|
| **ENRICHED (Facts)** | Cast/prune BASE; **INNER JOIN** `curated_dimperson` + `curated_dimoffice`; add `PersonKey`; UK/EU filter; write **`gold.temp`** |
| **CURATED (Facts)** | Read `gold.temp`; standardise types; hash; **TRUNCATE + INSERT** into `gold.bighand.curated_*` — **no joins** |
| **ENRICHED (Offices)** | Cast/prune only; write **`silver.temp`** (unchanged) |
| **MODEL** | `FactPersonCapacity` — person×date capacity view joining curated facts + `curated_dimdate` |

### Why not `Enriched Dataset` + CURATED?

Platform autogen and orchestration treat **`Enriched Dataset`** as ENRICHED-terminal (Milana, CDF Lookup, Partner Portal pattern). Autogen **does not** emit CURATED notebooks for Enriched Dataset type; metadata is unlikely to queue a CURATED stage. Promoting to **`Fact`** + `Truncate and Reload` is the proven WDM path orchestration already schedules (ENRICHED → CURATED, soft deps on DimPerson/DimOffice). ^[inferred from repo autogen + plan review session 2026-07-03]

### PersonKey join (ENRICHED — all three Facts)

Use `employeeId` for Forecasts/Qualifications; `employeeID` for Working Arrangements.

```sql
INNER JOIN `{GoldCatalog}`.workerdatamart.curated_dimperson dp
  ON bh.<employeeId column> = dp.EmployeeId
 AND dp.is_current = 1
 AND lower(dp.Source) = 'workday'
INNER JOIN `{GoldCatalog}`.workerdatamart.curated_dimoffice o
  ON lower(o.OfficeId) = lower(dp.PrimaryOfficeId)
 AND o.is_current = 1
 AND lower(o.Source) = 'workday'
 AND o.OfficeRegionCode NOT IN ('CE', 'UK and Ireland')
```

- **`lower()` on office IDs** — required (WDM `WorkerAvailability` precedent); case mismatch silently drops rows.
- **UK/EU regions** from WDM `curated_dimoffice`: `CE` (Continental Europe), `UK and Ireland`.
- NULL `OfficeRegionCode` rows are dropped by `NOT IN` — quantify during validation.
- Join **`workerdatamart.curated_dimperson`**, not MODEL `DimPerson` views.

### Contract metadata highlights

- `PersonKey` (`bigint`, sort 1) on the three Facts.
- **Natural keys**: Forecasts (`employeeId`, `commitmentDate`, `matterNumber`); Qualifications (`employeeId`, `qualificationDate`, `countryIsoCode`); Working Arrangements (`employeeID`, `effectiveStartDate`).
- **`IS_MEASURE=TRUE`** on `commitmentHours` and seven `*WorkingHours` columns — prevents CURATED coalesce loop turning NULL hours into `-1`.
- **Dependencies** (Facts): Hard `BASE~bighand~bighand_<entity>~Hard` + Soft `CURATED~WorkerDataMart~DimPerson~Soft` + `DimOffice~Soft`.

Regenerate JSON: `Generate-DataContractsFromSchemaCSV.ps1` with `$dataProductCode = "BigHand"` (script bottom hardcodes WorkerDataMart — invoke `New-DataContracts` without running that line).

## Notebook locations

| Stage | Path pattern |
|-------|----------------|
| API ingest | `/Data Platform/11 - Ingestion/Ingest BigHand` |
| RAW→BASE | `/Data Platform/2 - RAW to BASE/RAW to BASE - Default` |
| ENRICHED Facts | `3 - ENRICHED/BigHand/Enriched - BigHand - Fact - {Entity}.py` |
| ENRICHED Offices | `3 - ENRICHED/BigHand/Enriched - BigHand - Enriched Dataset - Offices.py` |
| CURATED Facts | `4 - CURATED/BigHand/Curated - BigHand - Fact - {Entity}.py` |
| MODEL | `5 - MODEL/BigHand/Model - BigHand - FactPersonCapacity.py` |
| Metastore DDL | `1 - Post Deployment/Create CURATED Metastore Tables - bighand.py` (manual `%run` in parent orchestrator) |

Autogen naming: `Enriched - {Product} - {Type} - {Entity}` / `Curated - {Product} - {Type} - {Entity}`.

## Deploy and run sequence (dev)

**Do not confuse ADF Main Orchestrator with metastore DDL.**

| Step | Pipeline / action | What it does |
|------|-------------------|--------------|
| 1 | **Metadata** ADO (`metadata/azure-pipelines.yml`) | Contracts → SQL orchestration metadata (Fact type, deps) |
| 2 | **Transformation** ADO (`transformation/yaml/transformation/`) — **manual** trigger | `import-dir` notebooks to `/Data Platform` only |
| 3 | **Unity Catalog** ADO (`transformation/yaml/unity-catalog/`) — auto on `transformation/**` | Post-deployment: `Create CURATED Metastore Tables.py` → `%run` bighand child → creates `gold.bighand.curated_*` (~45 min full run) |
| 4 | **Main Orchestrator** (ADF, BigHand-scoped) or manual ENRICHED→CURATED | Load data into curated tables |

**Main Orchestrator** (`PopulateProcessQueue` → ingestion → Event Grid → `Child - Process Queue Message`) runs the **data pipeline**, not `Create CURATED Metastore Tables`. See [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/orchestration-and-adf]].

Prerequisites for Fact runs: `DimPerson` / `DimOffice` curated; BASE populated for bighand entities.

## Four-table fix (2026-07-03)

Restored all four BigHand entities end-to-end after schema drift / missing BASE tables:

1. `Create BASE Metastore Tables - bighand` (UC DDL)
2. `RAW to BASE - Default` ×4 (backfill from PI 849 RAW paths)
3. Four ENRICHED notebooks → `silver.temp.enriched_bighand_*`

Validated row counts (BASE = TEMP, all > 0): Forecasts ~19.8k, Offices 39, Qualifications ~2.5k, Working Arrangements ~24.9k.

**Gotcha:** Orchestration REST `GetEntityMetadata` returned **403** from local workstation (IP restriction on function app); notebooks on cluster succeeded — metadata in SQL is fine.

Manual runs used `databricks jobs submit` on cluster `job-cluster-01` (`0113-162431-9uj669qy`). See [[skills/databricks-run-commands-via-execution-context]].

## Validation SQL (post Fact deploy)

```sql
SHOW TABLES IN `fbd-d-uks-data-dlz-dbw-gold`.bighand;

SELECT COUNT(*) total, COUNT(PersonKey) with_key
FROM `fbd-d-uks-data-dlz-dbw-gold`.bighand.curated_forecasts;

SELECT
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `fbd-d-uks-data-dlz-dbw-gold`.temp.enriched_bighand_forecasts) enriched,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `fbd-d-uks-data-dlz-dbw-gold`.bighand.curated_forecasts) curated;

-- Expect 0 UK/EU leaks
SELECT COUNT(*) AS uk_eu_leaks
FROM `fbd-d-uks-data-dlz-dbw-gold`.bighand.curated_forecasts f
JOIN `fbd-d-uks-data-dlz-dbw-gold`.workerdatamart.curated_dimperson dp ON f.PersonKey = dp.PersonKey
JOIN `fbd-d-uks-data-dlz-dbw-gold`.workerdatamart.curated_dimoffice o
  ON lower(o.OfficeId) = lower(dp.PrimaryOfficeId) AND o.is_current = 1 AND lower(o.Source) = 'workday'
WHERE o.OfficeRegionCode IN ('CE', 'UK and Ireland');
```

Repeat for qualifications and working arrangements. Curated row count ≤ enriched (inner joins drop non-matching / UK-EU employees).

## Deferred / out of scope

- **Additional MODEL views** beyond `FactPersonCapacity` — deferred
- **`bighand.curated_offices`** — Offices stays `silver.temp` only
- **Combined employee×day fact** (Forecasts + Working Arrangements spine) — discussed 2026-07-03; belongs in a new ENRICHED Fact with joins, not a one-off gold view. Multi-source logic = ENRICHED, not CURATED-only pass-through.
- Renaming entity codes to `FactForecasts` etc.

## Design clarifications (session 2026-07-03)

| Question | Answer |
|----------|--------|
| Should ENRICHED land in `gold.bighand` instead of `temp`? | **No.** `temp` is the ENRICHED checkpoint; `gold.bighand.curated_*` is the consumer layer. Don't repoint ENRICHED notebooks to `gold.bighand`. |
| Does Main Orchestrator run metastore child? | **No.** Unity Catalog pipeline or manual `Create CURATED Metastore Tables`. |
| `silver.temp` vs `gold.temp` for Facts? | **Facts use `gold.temp`** (WDM FactPersonCalendar pattern). Offices Enriched Dataset stays **`silver.temp`**. |

## Related

- [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/bighand-gold-layer-exploration]] — **authoritative** gold schemas, WDM conventions, autogen gaps
- [[projects/data-platform-dlz/entities/data-products]] — product catalogue
- [[projects/data-platform-dlz/entities/source-systems#BigHand]] — API / Postman collection
- [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/curation-pipeline#ENRICHED has two flavours]] — Enriched Dataset vs Fact
- [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/metastore-schema-evolution]] — DDL guard, PURGE remediation
- [[projects/data-platform-dlz/skills/adf-debug-mode-monitoring]] — monitoring Main Orchestrator debug runs
- [[projects/data-platform-dlz/entities/factpersoncalendar]] — reference Fact ENRICHED→CURATED pattern

arguments.content:
# Curated and Model Layers

[[projects/data-platform-dlz/data-platform-dlz|← Index]]

## Summary

**235+ notebooks** across CURATED and MODEL implement the gold dimensional exposure for **Canonical Model**, **Worker Data Mart**, and **BigHand**.

| Product | CURATED | MODEL | Contract entities |
|---------|--------:|------:|------------------:|
| Canonical Model | 35 | 35 | 35 |
| Worker Data Mart | 78 | 87 | 78 |
| BigHand | 3 | 1 | 3 Facts + 1 MODEL view |

MODEL WDM count (87) exceeds CURATED (78) because MODEL includes `Post Deployment/` subfolder notebooks (e.g. `Run All Model Views.py`, key generation).

BigHand: `gold.bighand.curated_forecasts|qualifications|workingarrangements` + MODEL view `BigHand.FactPersonCapacity`. Full inventory and WDM naming conventions: [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/bighand-gold-layer-exploration]]. Operational hub: [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/bighand-data-product]].

## Naming conventions

| Layer | Pattern | Example |
|-------|---------|---------|
| CURATED | `Curated - {Product} - {Dim\|Fact\|Bridge\|Agg} - {Entity}.py` | `Curated - Canonical Model - Client.py` |
| MODEL (Canonical) | `Model - Canonical Model - Canonical - {Entity}.py` | `Model - Canonical Model - Canonical - Department.py` |
| MODEL (WDM) | `Model - Worker Data Mart - {Dim\|Fact} - {Entity}.py` | (under `5 - MODEL/Worker Data Mart/`) |
| MODEL (BigHand) | `Model - BigHand - {Entity}.py` | `Model - BigHand - FactPersonCapacity.py` |

**WDM gold naming** (CURATED `workerdatamart.curated_*` lowercase vs MODEL `WorkerDataMart.{Entity}` PascalCase): see [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/bighand-gold-layer-exploration#2. WorkerDataMart gold conventions]].

## CURATED vs MODEL

| Layer | Purpose |
|-------|---------|
| **CURATED** | Business-ready curated tables in gold catalog; joins, business rules, Unknown/NA sentinel rows |
| **MODEL** | Dimensional model views exposed to consumers; `Run All Model Views.py` refreshes model views |

Both layers call `DataContractService().get_transformation_entity()` and write to paths defined in contract `curationStages`.

**`isModelViewEnabled`:** WDM entities set `false` (hand-authored MODEL notebooks); CanonicalModel sets `true` (autogen pass-through). BigHand has no contract flag — `FactPersonCapacity` is manual. Detail: [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/bighand-gold-layer-exploration#2.3 Data product contracts]].

## Canonical Model specifics

- `Create Keys - CanonicalModel` — surrogate key generation
- Unknown/NA sentinel rows for referential integrity
- **Change Data Feed** enabled on `canonicalmodel.curated_*` — see [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/metastore-schema-evolution#Change Data Feed (CDF) enablement]]

## Worker Data Mart specifics

- Largest product: 78 ENRICHED + 78 CURATED + 87 MODEL notebooks
- Heavy consumer of **CDF Lookup** reference data
- Snapshot facts have dedicated backfill notebooks in `99 - Backfill/`
- **Key resolution patterns** (`DateKey`, `MatterKey`, `PersonKey`): [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/bighand-gold-layer-exploration#3. DateKey, MatterKey, PersonKey / EmployeeId patterns]]

## ENRICHED context (upstream)

106+ ENRICHED notebooks feed CURATED. Per-product counts:

| Product | ENRICHED notebooks |
|---------|-------------------:|
| Worker Data Mart | 78 |
| Partner Portal | 8 |
| CDF Lookup | 7 |
| BigHand | 4 |
| Predict X | 3 |
| Milana | 2 |
| API / Benevity / Data Ops / Data Quality | 1 each |

## Related

- [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/curation-pipeline]] — full medallion flow
- [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/bighand-data-product]] — BigHand operational hub
- [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/bighand-gold-layer-exploration]] — BigHand + WDM gold conventions (source of truth)
- [[projects/data-platform-dlz/entities/data-products]] — product catalog
- [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/raw-to-base-patterns]] — upstream BASE layer

arguments.content:
# BigHand Data Product

[[projects/data-platform-dlz/data-platform-dlz|← Index]] | **Gold reference:** [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/bighand-gold-layer-exploration]] | Ingestion: [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/api-ingestion-notebooks]] | Contracts: [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/contract-generation-pipeline]] | Deploy: [[projects/data-platform-dlz/skills/deployment-and-ci-cd]]

## Summary

**BigHand** is a DLZ data product over the `bighand` source system (BigHand RM API). It landed initially as four **Enriched Dataset** entities (cast/prune only, `silver.temp`). From **2026-07-03** three person-level entities were promoted to the **Fact** path (PersonKey + UK/EU office filter in ENRICHED, mechanical CURATED to `gold.bighand.curated_*`). **Offices** remains an Enriched Dataset terminating at `silver.temp` only.

For **schemas, column inventories, MODEL view `FactPersonCapacity`, WDM key conventions, and framework autogen status** see [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/bighand-gold-layer-exploration]] (authoritative repo exploration, 2026-07-06).

## Source system vs data product

| Layer | Catalog / schema | Objects |
|-------|------------------|---------|
| **Ingestion** (`bighand` source) | `silver.bighand` | `bighand_forecasts`, `bighand_offices`, `bighand_qualifications`, `bighand_workingarrangements` |
| **ENRICHED temp** | `silver.temp` (Offices) or **`gold.temp`** (3 Facts) | `enriched_bighand_*` |
| **CURATED** | `gold.bighand` | `curated_forecasts`, `curated_qualifications`, `curated_workingarrangements` |
| **MODEL** | `gold` / schema `BigHand` | `FactPersonCapacity` view |

Silver BASE table name = `<sourceSystemCode>.<entityCode>` (e.g. `bighand.bighand_offices`), **not** the ingestion `TABLE_NAME` (`bh_Offices`).

## Entity catalogue (current)

| Entity code | Contract type | PersonKey | UK/EU filter | Terminal output |
|-------------|---------------|-----------|--------------|-----------------|
| `Forecasts` | **Fact** | Yes | Yes | `gold.bighand.curated_forecasts` |
| `Qualifications` | **Fact** | Yes | Yes | `gold.bighand.curated_qualifications` |
| `WorkingArrangements` | **Fact** | Yes | Yes | `gold.bighand.curated_workingarrangements` |
| `Offices` | **Enriched Dataset** | No | N/A | `silver.temp.enriched_bighand_offices` only |

Entity codes are **not** prefixed with `Fact*` — temp table names stay `enriched_bighand_<entity>`. There is **no** `curated_commitments` table; commitment fields live on `curated_forecasts`.

Contracts: `metadata/contracts/data-products/BigHand/`. CSVs: `metadata/contracts/scripts/data-products/BigHand-*.csv`.

## Architecture — Fact path (FactPersonCalendar pattern)

Reference implementation: WDM **`FactPersonCalendar`** — business logic in **ENRICHED**, persistence in **CURATED**.

```mermaid
flowchart LR
  subgraph silver [silver catalog]
    BASE["bighand.bighand_*"]
    OFF_TEMP["temp.enriched_bighand_offices"]
  end
  subgraph gold [gold catalog]
    DP["workerdatamart.curated_dimperson"]
    DO["workerdatamart.curated_dimoffice"]
    FACT_TEMP["temp.enriched_bighand_* x3"]
    CUR["bighand.curated_* x3"]
    MODEL["BigHand.FactPersonCapacity"]
  end
  BASE --> ENR_FACT["ENRICHED Fact notebooks x3"]
  BASE --> ENR_OFF["ENRICHED Offices notebook"]
  DP --> ENR_FACT
  DO --> ENR_FACT
  ENR_FACT --> FACT_TEMP
  ENR_OFF --> OFF_TEMP
  FACT_TEMP --> CUR_NB["CURATED Fact notebooks x3"]
  CUR_NB --> CUR
  CUR --> MODEL
```

| Stage | Responsibility |
|-------|----------------|
| **ENRICHED (Facts)** | Cast/prune BASE; **INNER JOIN** `curated_dimperson` + `curated_dimoffice`; add `PersonKey`; UK/EU filter; write **`gold.temp`** |
| **CURATED (Facts)** | Read `gold.temp`; standardise types; hash; **TRUNCATE + INSERT** into `gold.bighand.curated_*` — **no joins** |
| **ENRICHED (Offices)** | Cast/prune only; write **`silver.temp`** (unchanged) |
| **MODEL** | `FactPersonCapacity` — person×date capacity view joining curated facts + `curated_dimdate` |

### Why not `Enriched Dataset` + CURATED?

Platform autogen and orchestration treat **`Enriched Dataset`** as ENRICHED-terminal (Milana, CDF Lookup, Partner Portal pattern). Autogen **does not** emit CURATED notebooks for Enriched Dataset type; metadata is unlikely to queue a CURATED stage. Promoting to **`Fact`** + `Truncate and Reload` is the proven WDM path orchestration already schedules (ENRICHED → CURATED, soft deps on DimPerson/DimOffice). ^[inferred from repo autogen + plan review session 2026-07-03]

### PersonKey join (ENRICHED — all three Facts)

Use `employeeId` for Forecasts/Qualifications; `employeeID` for Working Arrangements.

```sql
INNER JOIN `{GoldCatalog}`.workerdatamart.curated_dimperson dp
  ON bh.<employeeId column> = dp.EmployeeId
 AND dp.is_current = 1
 AND lower(dp.Source) = 'workday'
INNER JOIN `{GoldCatalog}`.workerdatamart.curated_dimoffice o
  ON lower(o.OfficeId) = lower(dp.PrimaryOfficeId)
 AND o.is_current = 1
 AND lower(o.Source) = 'workday'
 AND o.OfficeRegionCode NOT IN ('CE', 'UK and Ireland')
```

- **`lower()` on office IDs** — required (WDM `WorkerAvailability` precedent); case mismatch silently drops rows.
- **UK/EU regions** from WDM `curated_dimoffice`: `CE` (Continental Europe), `UK and Ireland`.
- NULL `OfficeRegionCode` rows are dropped by `NOT IN` — quantify during validation.
- Join **`workerdatamart.curated_dimperson`**, not MODEL `DimPerson` views.

### Contract metadata highlights

- `PersonKey` (`bigint`, sort 1) on the three Facts.
- **Natural keys**: Forecasts (`employeeId`, `commitmentDate`, `matterNumber`); Qualifications (`employeeId`, `qualificationDate`, `countryIsoCode`); Working Arrangements (`employeeID`, `effectiveStartDate`).
- **`IS_MEASURE=TRUE`** on `commitmentHours` and seven `*WorkingHours` columns — prevents CURATED coalesce loop turning NULL hours into `-1`.
- **Dependencies** (Facts): Hard `BASE~bighand~bighand_<entity>~Hard` + Soft `CURATED~WorkerDataMart~DimPerson~Soft` + `DimOffice~Soft`.

Regenerate JSON: `Generate-DataContractsFromSchemaCSV.ps1` with `$dataProductCode = "BigHand"` (script bottom hardcodes WorkerDataMart — invoke `New-DataContracts` without running that line).

## Notebook locations

| Stage | Path pattern |
|-------|----------------|
| API ingest | `/Data Platform/11 - Ingestion/Ingest BigHand` |
| RAW→BASE | `/Data Platform/2 - RAW to BASE/RAW to BASE - Default` |
| ENRICHED Facts | `3 - ENRICHED/BigHand/Enriched - BigHand - Fact - {Entity}.py` |
| ENRICHED Offices | `3 - ENRICHED/BigHand/Enriched - BigHand - Enriched Dataset - Offices.py` |
| CURATED Facts | `4 - CURATED/BigHand/Curated - BigHand - Fact - {Entity}.py` |
| MODEL | `5 - MODEL/BigHand/Model - BigHand - FactPersonCapacity.py` |
| Metastore DDL | `1 - Post Deployment/Create CURATED Metastore Tables - bighand.py` (manual `%run` in parent orchestrator) |

Autogen naming: `Enriched - {Product} - {Type} - {Entity}` / `Curated - {Product} - {Type} - {Entity}`.

## Deploy and run sequence (dev)

**Do not confuse ADF Main Orchestrator with metastore DDL.**

| Step | Pipeline / action | What it does |
|------|-------------------|--------------|
| 1 | **Metadata** ADO (`metadata/azure-pipelines.yml`) | Contracts → SQL orchestration metadata (Fact type, deps) |
| 2 | **Transformation** ADO (`transformation/yaml/transformation/`) — **manual** trigger | `import-dir` notebooks to `/Data Platform` only |
| 3 | **Unity Catalog** ADO (`transformation/yaml/unity-catalog/`) — auto on `transformation/**` | Post-deployment: `Create CURATED Metastore Tables.py` → `%run` bighand child → creates `gold.bighand.curated_*` (~45 min full run) |
| 4 | **Main Orchestrator** (ADF, BigHand-scoped) or manual ENRICHED→CURATED | Load data into curated tables |

**Main Orchestrator** (`PopulateProcessQueue` → ingestion → Event Grid → `Child - Process Queue Message`) runs the **data pipeline**, not `Create CURATED Metastore Tables`. See [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/orchestration-and-adf]].

Prerequisites for Fact runs: `DimPerson` / `DimOffice` curated; BASE populated for bighand entities.

## Four-table fix (2026-07-03)

Restored all four BigHand entities end-to-end after schema drift / missing BASE tables:

1. `Create BASE Metastore Tables - bighand` (UC DDL)
2. `RAW to BASE - Default` ×4 (backfill from PI 849 RAW paths)
3. Four ENRICHED notebooks → `silver.temp.enriched_bighand_*`

Validated row counts (BASE = TEMP, all > 0): Forecasts ~19.8k, Offices 39, Qualifications ~2.5k, Working Arrangements ~24.9k.

**Gotcha:** Orchestration REST `GetEntityMetadata` returned **403** from local workstation (IP restriction on function app); notebooks on cluster succeeded — metadata in SQL is fine.

Manual runs used `databricks jobs submit` on cluster `job-cluster-01` (`0113-162431-9uj669qy`). See [[skills/databricks-run-commands-via-execution-context]].

## Validation SQL (post Fact deploy)

```sql
SHOW TABLES IN `fbd-d-uks-data-dlz-dbw-gold`.bighand;

SELECT COUNT(*) total, COUNT(PersonKey) with_key
FROM `fbd-d-uks-data-dlz-dbw-gold`.bighand.curated_forecasts;

SELECT
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `fbd-d-uks-data-dlz-dbw-gold`.temp.enriched_bighand_forecasts) enriched,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `fbd-d-uks-data-dlz-dbw-gold`.bighand.curated_forecasts) curated;

-- Expect 0 UK/EU leaks
SELECT COUNT(*) AS uk_eu_leaks
FROM `fbd-d-uks-data-dlz-dbw-gold`.bighand.curated_forecasts f
JOIN `fbd-d-uks-data-dlz-dbw-gold`.workerdatamart.curated_dimperson dp ON f.PersonKey = dp.PersonKey
JOIN `fbd-d-uks-data-dlz-dbw-gold`.workerdatamart.curated_dimoffice o
  ON lower(o.OfficeId) = lower(dp.PrimaryOfficeId) AND o.is_current = 1 AND lower(o.Source) = 'workday'
WHERE o.OfficeRegionCode IN ('CE', 'UK and Ireland');
```

Repeat for qualifications and working arrangements. Curated row count ≤ enriched (inner joins drop non-matching / UK-EU employees).

## Deferred / out of scope

- **Additional MODEL views** beyond `FactPersonCapacity` — deferred
- **`bighand.curated_offices`** — Offices stays `silver.temp` only
- **Combined employee×day fact** (Forecasts + Working Arrangements spine) — discussed 2026-07-03; belongs in a new ENRICHED Fact with joins, not a one-off gold view. Multi-source logic = ENRICHED, not CURATED-only pass-through.
- Renaming entity codes to `FactForecasts` etc.

## Design clarifications (session 2026-07-03)

| Question | Answer |
|----------|--------|
| Should ENRICHED land in `gold.bighand` instead of `temp`? | **No.** `temp` is the ENRICHED checkpoint; `gold.bighand.curated_*` is the consumer layer. Don't repoint ENRICHED notebooks to `gold.bighand`. |
| Does Main Orchestrator run metastore child? | **No.** Unity Catalog pipeline or manual `Create CURATED Metastore Tables`. |
| `silver.temp` vs `gold.temp` for Facts? | **Facts use `gold.temp`** (WDM FactPersonCalendar pattern). Offices Enriched Dataset stays **`silver.temp`**. |

## Related

- [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/bighand-gold-layer-exploration]] — **authoritative** gold schemas, WDM conventions, autogen gaps
- [[projects/data-platform-dlz/entities/data-products]] — product catalogue
- [[projects/data-platform-dlz/entities/source-systems#BigHand]] — API / Postman collection
- [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/curation-pipeline#ENRICHED has two flavours]] — Enriched Dataset vs Fact
- [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/metastore-schema-evolution]] — DDL guard, PURGE remediation
- [[projects/data-platform-dlz/skills/adf-debug-mode-monitoring]] — monitoring Main Orchestrator debug runs
- [[projects/data-platform-dlz/entities/factpersoncalendar]] — reference Fact ENRICHED→CURATED pattern

| Stage | Path pattern |
|-------|----------------|
| API ingest | `/Data Platform/11 - Ingestion/Ingest BigHand` |
| RAW→BASE | `/Data Platform/2 - RAW to BASE/RAW to BASE - Default` |
| ENRICHED Facts | `3 - ENRICHED/BigHand/Enriched - BigHand - Fact - {Entity}.py` |
| ENRICHED Offices | `3 - ENRICHED/BigHand/Enriched - BigHand - Enriched Dataset - Offices.py` |
| CURATED Facts | `4 - CURATED/BigHand/Curated - BigHand - Fact - {Entity}.py` |
| MODEL | `5 - MODEL/BigHand/Model - BigHand - FactPersonCapacity.py` |
| Metastore DDL | `1 - Post Deployment/Create CURATED Metastore Tables - bighand.py` (manual `%run` in parent orchestrator) |

Validated row counts (BASE = TEMP, all > 0): Forecasts ~19.8k, Offices 39, Qualifications ~2.5k, Working Arrangements ~24.9k.

**Gotcha:** Orchestration REST `GetEntityMetadata` returned **403** from local workstation (IP restriction on function app); notebooks on cluster succeeded — metadata in SQL is fine.

Manual runs used `databricks jobs submit` on cluster `job-cluster-01` (`0113-162431-9uj669qy`). See [[skills/databricks-run-commands-via-execution-context]].

## Validation SQL (post Fact deploy)

```sql
SHOW TABLES IN `fbd-d-uks-data-dlz-dbw-gold`.bighand;

SELECT COUNT(*) total, COUNT(PersonKey) with_key
FROM `fbd-d-uks-data-dlz-dbw-gold`.bighand.curated_forecasts;

SELECT
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `fbd-d-uks-data-dlz-dbw-gold`.temp.enriched_bighand_forecasts) enriched,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `fbd-d-uks-data-dlz-dbw-gold`.bighand.curated_forecasts) curated;

-- Expect 0 UK/EU leaks
SELECT COUNT(*) AS uk_eu_leaks
FROM `fbd-d-uks-data-dlz-dbw-gold`.bighand.curated_forecasts f
JOIN `fbd-d-uks-data-dlz-dbw-gold`.workerdatamart.curated_dimperson dp ON f.PersonKey = dp.PersonKey
JOIN `fbd-d-uks-data-dlz-dbw-gold`.workerdatamart.curated_dimoffice o
  ON lower(o.OfficeId) = lower(dp.PrimaryOfficeId) AND o.is_current = 1 AND lower(o.Source) = 'workday'
WHERE o.OfficeRegionCode IN ('CE', 'UK and Ireland');
```

Repeat for qualifications and working arrangements. Curated row count ≤ enriched (inner joins drop non-matching / UK-EU employees).

## Deferred / out of scope

- **Additional MODEL views** beyond `FactPersonCapacity` — deferred
- **`bighand.curated_offices`** — Offices stays `silver.temp` only
- **Combined employee×day fact** (Forecasts + Working Arrangements spine) — discussed 2026-07-03; belongs in a new ENRICHED Fact with joins, not a one-off gold view. Multi-source logic = ENRICHED, not CURATED-only pass-through.
- Renaming entity codes to `FactForecasts` etc.

## Design clarifications (session 2026-07-03)

| Question | Answer |
|----------|--------|
| Should ENRICHED land in `gold.bighand` instead of `temp`? | **No.** `temp` is the ENRICHED checkpoint; `gold.bighand.curated_*` is the consumer layer. Don't repoint ENRICHED notebooks to `gold.bighand`. |
| Does Main Orchestrator run metastore child? | **No.** Unity Catalog pipeline or manual `Create CURATED Metastore Tables`. |
| `silver.temp` vs `gold.temp` for Facts? | **Facts use `gold.temp`** (WDM FactPersonCalendar pattern). Offices Enriched Dataset stays **`silver.temp`**. |

## Related

# Curated and Model Layers

[[projects/data-platform-dlz/data-platform-dlz|← Index]]

## Summary

**235+ notebooks** across CURATED and MODEL implement the gold dimensional exposure for **Canonical Model**, **Worker Data Mart**, and **BigHand**.

| Product | CURATED | MODEL | Contract entities |
|---------|--------:|------:|------------------:|
| Canonical Model | 35 | 35 | 35 |
| Worker Data Mart | 78 | 87 | 78 |
| BigHand | 3 | 1 | 3 Facts + 1 MODEL view |

MODEL WDM count (87) exceeds CURATED (78) because MODEL includes `Post Deployment/` subfolder notebooks (e.g. `Run All Model Views.py`, key generation).

BigHand: `gold.bighand.curated_forecasts|qualifications|workingarrangements` + MODEL view `BigHand.FactPersonCapacity`. Full inventory and WDM naming conventions: [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/bighand-gold-layer-exploration]]. Operational hub: [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/bighand-data-product]].

## Naming conventions

| Layer | Pattern | Example |
|-------|---------|---------|
| CURATED | `Curated - {Product} - {Dim\|Fact\|Bridge\|Agg} - {Entity}.py` | `Curated - Canonical Model - Client.py` |
| MODEL (Canonical) | `Model - Canonical Model - Canonical - {Entity}.py` | `Model - Canonical Model - Canonical - Department.py` |
| MODEL (WDM) | `Model - Worker Data Mart - {Dim\|Fact} - {Entity}.py` | (under `5 - MODEL/Worker Data Mart/`) |
| MODEL (BigHand) | `Model - BigHand - {Entity}.py` | `Model - BigHand - FactPersonCapacity.py` |

**WDM gold naming** (CURATED `workerdatamart.curated_*` lowercase vs MODEL `WorkerDataMart.{Entity}` PascalCase): see [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/bighand-gold-layer-exploration#2. WorkerDataMart gold conventions]].

## CURATED vs MODEL

| Layer | Purpose |
|-------|---------|
| **CURATED** | Business-ready curated tables in gold catalog; joins, business rules, Unknown/NA sentinel rows |
| **MODEL** | Dimensional model views exposed to consumers; `Run All Model Views.py` refreshes model views |

Both layers call `DataContractService().get_transformation_entity()` and write to paths defined in contract `curationStages`.

**`isModelViewEnabled`:** WDM entities set `false` (hand-authored MODEL notebooks); CanonicalModel sets `true` (autogen pass-through). BigHand has no contract flag — `FactPersonCapacity` is manual. Detail: [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/bighand-gold-layer-exploration#2.3 Data product contracts]].

## Canonical Model specifics

- `Create Keys - CanonicalModel` — surrogate key generation
- Unknown/NA sentinel rows for referential integrity
- **Change Data Feed** enabled on `canonicalmodel.curated_*` — see [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/metastore-schema-evolution#Change Data Feed (CDF) enablement]]

## Worker Data Mart specifics

- Largest product: 78 ENRICHED + 78 CURATED + 87 MODEL notebooks
- Heavy consumer of **CDF Lookup** reference data
- Snapshot facts have dedicated backfill notebooks in `99 - Backfill/`
- **Key resolution patterns** (`DateKey`, `MatterKey`, `PersonKey`): [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/bighand-gold-layer-exploration#3. DateKey, MatterKey, PersonKey / EmployeeId patterns]]

## ENRICHED context (upstream)

106+ ENRICHED notebooks feed CURATED. Per-product counts:

| Product | ENRICHED notebooks |
|---------|-------------------:|
| Worker Data Mart | 78 |
| Partner Portal | 8 |
| CDF Lookup | 7 |
| BigHand | 4 |
| Predict X | 3 |
| Milana | 2 |
| API / Benevity / Data Ops / Data Quality | 1 each |

## Related

- [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/curation-pipeline]] — full medallion flow
- [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/bighand-data-product]] — BigHand operational hub
- [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/bighand-gold-layer-exploration]] — BigHand + WDM gold conventions (source of truth)
- [[projects/data-platform-dlz/entities/data-products]] — product catalog

arguments.content:
# BigHand Data Product

[[projects/data-platform-dlz/data-platform-dlz|← Index]] | **Gold reference:** [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/bighand-gold-layer-exploration]] | Ingestion: [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/api-ingestion-notebooks]] | Contracts: [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/contract-generation-pipeline]] | Deploy: [[projects/data-platform-dlz/skills/deployment-and-ci-cd]]

## Summary

**BigHand** is a DLZ data product over the `bighand` source system (BigHand RM API). It landed initially as four **Enriched Dataset** entities (cast/prune only, `silver.temp`). From **2026-07-03** three person-level entities were promoted to the **Fact** path (PersonKey + UK/EU office filter in ENRICHED, mechanical CURATED to `gold.bighand.curated_*`). **Offices** remains an Enriched Dataset terminating at `silver.temp` only.

For **schemas, column inventories, MODEL view `FactPersonCapacity`, WDM key conventions, and framework autogen status** see [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/bighand-gold-layer-exploration]] (authoritative repo exploration, 2026-07-06).

## Source system vs data product

| Layer | Catalog / schema | Objects |
|-------|------------------|---------|
| **Ingestion** (`bighand` source) | `silver.bighand` | `bighand_forecasts`, `bighand_offices`, `bighand_qualifications`, `bighand_workingarrangements` |
| **ENRICHED temp** | `silver.temp` (Offices) or **`gold.temp`** (3 Facts) | `enriched_bighand_*` |
| **CURATED** | `gold.bighand` | `curated_forecasts`, `curated_qualifications`, `curated_workingarrangements` |
| **MODEL** | `gold` / schema `BigHand` | `FactPersonCapacity` view |

Silver BASE table name = `<sourceSystemCode>.<entityCode>` (e.g. `bighand.bighand_offices`), **not** the ingestion `TABLE_NAME` (`bh_Offices`).

## Entity catalogue (current)

| Entity code | Contract type | PersonKey | UK/EU filter | Terminal output |
|-------------|---------------|-----------|--------------|-----------------|
| `Forecasts` | **Fact** | Yes | Yes | `gold.bighand.curated_forecasts` |
| `Qualifications` | **Fact** | Yes | Yes | `gold.bighand.curated_qualifications` |
| `WorkingArrangements` | **Fact** | Yes | Yes | `gold.bighand.curated_workingarrangements` |
| `Offices` | **Enriched Dataset** | No | N/A | `silver.temp.enriched_bighand_offices` only |

Entity codes are **not** prefixed with `Fact*` — temp table names stay `enriched_bighand_<entity>`. There is **no** `curated_commitments` table; commitment fields live on `curated_forecasts`.

Contracts: `metadata/contracts/data-products/BigHand/`. CSVs: `metadata/contracts/scripts/data-products/BigHand-*.csv`.

## Architecture — Fact path (FactPersonCalendar pattern)

Reference implementation: WDM **`FactPersonCalendar`** — business logic in **ENRICHED**, persistence in **CURATED**.

```mermaid
flowchart LR
  subgraph silver [silver catalog]
    BASE["bighand.bighand_*"]
    OFF_TEMP["temp.enriched_bighand_offices"]
  end
  subgraph gold [gold catalog]
    DP["workerdatamart.curated_dimperson"]
    DO["workerdatamart.curated_dimoffice"]
    FACT_TEMP["temp.enriched_bighand_* x3"]
    CUR["bighand.curated_* x3"]
    MODEL["BigHand.FactPersonCapacity"]
  end
  BASE --> ENR_FACT["ENRICHED Fact notebooks x3"]
  BASE --> ENR_OFF["ENRICHED Offices notebook"]
  DP --> ENR_FACT
  DO --> ENR_FACT
  ENR_FACT --> FACT_TEMP
  ENR_OFF --> OFF_TEMP
  FACT_TEMP --> CUR_NB["CURATED Fact notebooks x3"]
  CUR_NB --> CUR
  CUR --> MODEL
```

| Stage | Responsibility |
|-------|----------------|
| **ENRICHED (Facts)** | Cast/prune BASE; **INNER JOIN** `curated_dimperson` + `curated_dimoffice`; add `PersonKey`; UK/EU filter; write **`gold.temp`** |
| **CURATED (Facts)** | Read `gold.temp`; standardise types; hash; **TRUNCATE + INSERT** into `gold.bighand.curated_*` — **no joins** |
| **ENRICHED (Offices)** | Cast/prune only; write **`silver.temp`** (unchanged) |
| **MODEL** | `FactPersonCapacity` — person×date capacity view joining curated facts + `curated_dimdate` |

### Why not `Enriched Dataset` + CURATED?

Platform autogen and orchestration treat **`Enriched Dataset`** as ENRICHED-terminal (Milana, CDF Lookup, Partner Portal pattern). Autogen **does not** emit CURATED notebooks for Enriched Dataset type; metadata is unlikely to queue a CURATED stage. Promoting to **`Fact`** + `Truncate and Reload` is the proven WDM path orchestration already schedules (ENRICHED → CURATED, soft deps on DimPerson/DimOffice). ^[inferred from repo autogen + plan review session 2026-07-03]

### PersonKey join (ENRICHED — all three Facts)

Use `employeeId` for Forecasts/Qualifications; `employeeID` for Working Arrangements.

```sql
INNER JOIN `{GoldCatalog}`.workerdatamart.curated_dimperson dp
  ON bh.<employeeId column> = dp.EmployeeId
 AND dp.is_current = 1
 AND lower(dp.Source) = 'workday'
INNER JOIN `{GoldCatalog}`.workerdatamart.curated_dimoffice o
  ON lower(o.OfficeId) = lower(dp.PrimaryOfficeId)
 AND o.is_current = 1
 AND lower(o.Source) = 'workday'
 AND o.OfficeRegionCode NOT IN ('CE', 'UK and Ireland')
```

- **`lower()` on office IDs** — required (WDM `WorkerAvailability` precedent); case mismatch silently drops rows.
- **UK/EU regions** from WDM `curated_dimoffice`: `CE` (Continental Europe), `UK and Ireland`.
- NULL `OfficeRegionCode` rows are dropped by `NOT IN` — quantify during validation.
- Join **`workerdatamart.curated_dimperson`**, not MODEL `DimPerson` views.

### Contract metadata highlights

- `PersonKey` (`bigint`, sort 1) on the three Facts.
- **Natural keys**: Forecasts (`employeeId`, `commitmentDate`, `matterNumber`); Qualifications (`employeeId`, `qualificationDate`, `countryIsoCode`); Working Arrangements (`employeeID`, `effectiveStartDate`).
- **`IS_MEASURE=TRUE`** on `commitmentHours` and seven `*WorkingHours` columns — prevents CURATED coalesce loop turning NULL hours into `-1`.
- **Dependencies** (Facts): Hard `BASE~bighand~bighand_<entity>~Hard` + Soft `CURATED~WorkerDataMart~DimPerson~Soft` + `DimOffice~Soft`.

Regenerate JSON: `Generate-DataContractsFromSchemaCSV.ps1` with `$dataProductCode = "BigHand"` (script bottom hardcodes WorkerDataMart — invoke `New-DataContracts` without running that line).

## Notebook locations

| Stage | Path pattern |
|-------|----------------|
| API ingest | `/Data Platform/11 - Ingestion/Ingest BigHand` |
| RAW→BASE | `/Data Platform/2 - RAW to BASE/RAW to BASE - Default` |
| ENRICHED Facts | `3 - ENRICHED/BigHand/Enriched - BigHand - Fact - {Entity}.py` |
| ENRICHED Offices | `3 - ENRICHED/BigHand/Enriched - BigHand - Enriched Dataset - Offices.py` |
| CURATED Facts | `4 - CURATED/BigHand/Curated - BigHand - Fact - {Entity}.py` |
| MODEL | `5 - MODEL/BigHand/Model - BigHand - FactPersonCapacity.py` |
| Metastore DDL | `1 - Post Deployment/Create CURATED Metastore Tables - bighand.py` (manual `%run` in parent orchestrator) |

Autogen naming: `Enriched - {Product} - {Type} - {Entity}` / `Curated - {Product} - {Type} - {Entity}`.

## Deploy and run sequence (dev)

**Do not confuse ADF Main Orchestrator with metastore DDL.**

| Step | Pipeline / action | What it does |
|------|-------------------|--------------|
| 1 | **Metadata** ADO (`metadata/azure-pipelines.yml`) | Contracts → SQL orchestration metadata (Fact type, deps) |
| 2 | **Transformation** ADO (`transformation/yaml/transformation/`) — **manual** trigger | `import-dir` notebooks to `/Data Platform` only |
| 3 | **Unity Catalog** ADO (`transformation/yaml/unity-catalog/`) — auto on `transformation/**` | Post-deployment: `Create CURATED Metastore Tables.py` → `%run` bighand child → creates `gold.bighand.curated_*` (~45 min full run) |
| 4 | **Main Orchestrator** (ADF, BigHand-scoped) or manual ENRICHED→CURATED | Load data into curated tables |

**Main Orchestrator** (`PopulateProcessQueue` → ingestion → Event Grid → `Child - Process Queue Message`) runs the **data pipeline**, not `Create CURATED Metastore Tables`. See [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/orchestration-and-adf]].

Prerequisites for Fact runs: `DimPerson` / `DimOffice` curated; BASE populated for bighand entities.

## Four-table fix (2026-07-03)

Restored all four BigHand entities end-to-end after schema drift / missing BASE tables:

1. `Create BASE Metastore Tables - bighand` (UC DDL)
2. `RAW to BASE - Default` ×4 (backfill from PI 849 RAW paths)
3. Four ENRICHED notebooks → `silver.temp.enriched_bighand_*`

Validated row counts (BASE = TEMP, all > 0): Forecasts ~19.8k, Offices 39, Qualifications ~2.5k, Working Arrangements ~24.9k.

**Gotcha:** Orchestration REST `GetEntityMetadata` returned **403** from local workstation (IP restriction on function app); notebooks on cluster succeeded — metadata in SQL is fine.

Manual runs used `databricks jobs submit` on cluster `job-cluster-01` (`0113-162431-9uj669qy`). See [[skills/databricks-run-commands-via-execution-context]].

## Validation SQL (post Fact deploy)

```sql
SHOW TABLES IN `fbd-d-uks-data-dlz-dbw-gold`.bighand;

SELECT COUNT(*) total, COUNT(PersonKey) with_key
FROM `fbd-d-uks-data-dlz-dbw-gold`.bighand.curated_forecasts;

SELECT
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `fbd-d-uks-data-dlz-dbw-gold`.temp.enriched_bighand_forecasts) enriched,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `fbd-d-uks-data-dlz-dbw-gold`.bighand.curated_forecasts) curated;

-- Expect 0 UK/EU leaks
SELECT COUNT(*) AS uk_eu_leaks
FROM `fbd-d-uks-data-dlz-dbw-gold`.bighand.curated_forecasts f
JOIN `fbd-d-uks-data-dlz-dbw-gold`.workerdatamart.curated_dimperson dp ON f.PersonKey = dp.PersonKey
JOIN `fbd-d-uks-data-dlz-dbw-gold`.workerdatamart.curated_dimoffice o
  ON lower(o.OfficeId) = lower(dp.PrimaryOfficeId) AND o.is_current = 1 AND lower(o.Source) = 'workday'
WHERE o.OfficeRegionCode IN ('CE', 'UK and Ireland');
```

Repeat for qualifications and working arrangements. Curated row count ≤ enriched (inner joins drop non-matching / UK-EU employees).

## Deferred / out of scope

- **Additional MODEL views** beyond `FactPersonCapacity` — deferred
- **`bighand.curated_offices`** — Offices stays `silver.temp` only
- **Combined employee×day fact** (Forecasts + Working Arrangements spine) — discussed 2026-07-03; belongs in a new ENRICHED Fact with joins, not a one-off gold view. Multi-source logic = ENRICHED, not CURATED-only pass-through.
- Renaming entity codes to `FactForecasts` etc.

## Design clarifications (session 2026-07-03)

| Question | Answer |
|----------|--------|
| Should ENRICHED land in `gold.bighand` instead of `temp`? | **No.** `temp` is the ENRICHED checkpoint; `gold.bighand.curated_*` is the consumer layer. Don't repoint ENRICHED notebooks to `gold.bighand`. |
| Does Main Orchestrator run metastore child? | **No.** Unity Catalog pipeline or manual `Create CURATED Metastore Tables`. |
| `silver.temp` vs `gold.temp` for Facts? | **Facts use `gold.temp`** (WDM FactPersonCalendar pattern). Offices Enriched Dataset stays **`silver.temp`**. |

## Related

- [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/bighand-gold-layer-exploration]] — **authoritative** gold schemas, WDM conventions, autogen gaps
- [[projects/data-platform-dlz/entities/data-products]] — product catalogue
- [[projects/data-platform-dlz/entities/source-systems#BigHand]] — API / Postman collection

| Layer | Purpose |
|-------|---------|
| **CURATED** | Business-ready curated tables in gold catalog; joins, business rules, Unknown/NA sentinel rows |
| **MODEL** | Dimensional model views exposed to consumers; `Run All Model Views.py` refreshes model views |

Both layers call `DataContractService().get_transformation_entity()` and write to paths defined in contract `curationStages`.

**`isModelViewEnabled`:** WDM entities set `false` (hand-authored MODEL notebooks); CanonicalModel sets `true` (autogen pass-through). BigHand has no contract flag — `FactPersonCapacity` is manual. Detail: [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/bighand-gold-layer-exploration#2.3 Data product contracts]].

## Canonical Model specifics

- `Create Keys - CanonicalModel` — surrogate key generation
- Unknown/NA sentinel rows for referential integrity
- **Change Data Feed** enabled on `canonicalmodel.curated_*` — see [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/metastore-schema-evolution#Change Data Feed (CDF) enablement]]

## Worker Data Mart specifics

- Largest product: 78 ENRICHED + 78 CURATED + 87 MODEL notebooks
- Heavy consumer of **CDF Lookup** reference data
- Snapshot facts have dedicated backfill notebooks in `99 - Backfill/`
- **Key resolution patterns** (`DateKey`, `MatterKey`, `PersonKey`): [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/bighand-gold-layer-exploration#3. DateKey, MatterKey, PersonKey / EmployeeId patterns]]

## ENRICHED context (upstream)

106+ ENRICHED notebooks feed CURATED. Per-product counts:

| Product | ENRICHED notebooks |
|---------|-------------------:|
| Worker Data Mart | 78 |
| Partner Portal | 8 |
| CDF Lookup | 7 |
| BigHand | 4 |
| Predict X | 3 |
| Milana | 2 |
| API / Benevity / Data Ops / Data Quality | 1 each |

## Related

- [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/curation-pipeline]] — full medallion flow
- [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/bighand-data-product]] — BigHand operational hub
- [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/bighand-gold-layer-exploration]] — BigHand + WDM gold conventions (source of truth)
- [[projects/data-platform-dlz/entities/data-products]] — product catalog
- [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/raw-to-base-patterns]] — upstream BASE layer

# BigHand Data Product

[[projects/data-platform-dlz/data-platform-dlz|← Index]] | **Gold reference:** [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/bighand-gold-layer-exploration]] | Ingestion: [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/api-ingestion-notebooks]] | Contracts: [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/contract-generation-pipeline]] | Deploy: [[projects/data-platform-dlz/skills/deployment-and-ci-cd]]

## Summary

**BigHand** is a DLZ data product over the `bighand` source system (BigHand RM API). It landed initially as four **Enriched Dataset** entities (cast/prune only, `silver.temp`). From **2026-07-03** three person-level entities were promoted to the **Fact** path (PersonKey + UK/EU office filter in ENRICHED, mechanical CURATED to `gold.bighand.curated_*`). **Offices** remains an Enriched Dataset terminating at `silver.temp` only.

For **schemas, column inventories, MODEL view `FactPersonCapacity`, WDM key conventions, and framework autogen status** see [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/bighand-gold-layer-exploration]] (authoritative repo exploration, 2026-07-06).

## Source system vs data product

| Layer | Catalog / schema | Objects |
|-------|------------------|---------|
| **Ingestion** (`bighand` source) | `silver.bighand` | `bighand_forecasts`, `bighand_offices`, `bighand_qualifications`, `bighand_workingarrangements` |
| **ENRICHED temp** | `silver.temp` (Offices) or **`gold.temp`** (3 Facts) | `enriched_bighand_*` |
| **CURATED** | `gold.bighand` | `curated_forecasts`, `curated_qualifications`, `curated_workingarrangements` |
| **MODEL** | `gold` / schema `BigHand` | `FactPersonCapacity` view |

Silver BASE table name = `<sourceSystemCode>.<entityCode>` (e.g. `bighand.bighand_offices`), **not** the ingestion `TABLE_NAME` (`bh_Offices`).

## Entity catalogue (current)

| Entity code | Contract type | PersonKey | UK/EU filter | Terminal output |
|-------------|---------------|-----------|--------------|-----------------|
| `Forecasts` | **Fact** | Yes | Yes | `gold.bighand.curated_forecasts` |
| `Qualifications` | **Fact** | Yes | Yes | `gold.bighand.curated_qualifications` |
| `WorkingArrangements` | **Fact** | Yes | Yes | `gold.bighand.curated_workingarrangements` |
| `Offices` | **Enriched Dataset** | No | N/A | `silver.temp.enriched_bighand_offices` only |

Entity codes are **not** prefixed with `Fact*` — temp table names stay `enriched_bighand_<entity>`. There is **no** `curated_commitments` table; commitment fields live on `curated_forecasts`.

Contracts: `metadata/contracts/data-products/BigHand/`. CSVs: `metadata/contracts/scripts/data-products/BigHand-*.csv`.

## Architecture — Fact path (FactPersonCalendar pattern)

Reference implementation: WDM **`FactPersonCalendar`** — business logic in **ENRICHED**, persistence in **CURATED**.

```mermaid
flowchart LR
  subgraph silver [silver catalog]
    BASE["bighand.bighand_*"]
    OFF_TEMP["temp.enriched_bighand_offices"]
  end
  subgraph gold [gold catalog]
    DP["workerdatamart.curated_dimperson"]
    DO["workerdatamart.curated_dimoffice"]
    FACT_TEMP["temp.enriched_bighand_* x3"]
    CUR["bighand.curated_* x3"]
    MODEL["BigHand.FactPersonCapacity"]
  end
  BASE --> ENR_FACT["ENRICHED Fact notebooks x3"]
  BASE --> ENR_OFF["ENRICHED Offices notebook"]
  DP --> ENR_FACT
  DO --> ENR_FACT
  ENR_FACT --> FACT_TEMP
  ENR_OFF --> OFF_TEMP
  FACT_TEMP --> CUR_NB["CURATED Fact notebooks x3"]
  CUR_NB --> CUR
  CUR --> MODEL
```

| Stage | Responsibility |
|-------|----------------|
| **ENRICHED (Facts)** | Cast/prune BASE; **INNER JOIN** `curated_dimperson` + `curated_dimoffice`; add `PersonKey`; UK/EU filter; write **`gold.temp`** |
| **CURATED (Facts)** | Read `gold.temp`; standardise types; hash; **TRUNCATE + INSERT** into `gold.bighand.curated_*` — **no joins** |
| **ENRICHED (Offices)** | Cast/prune only; write **`silver.temp`** (unchanged) |
| **MODEL** | `FactPersonCapacity` — person×date capacity view joining curated facts + `curated_dimdate` |

### Why not `Enriched Dataset` + CURATED?

Platform autogen and orchestration treat **`Enriched Dataset`** as ENRICHED-terminal (Milana, CDF Lookup, Partner Portal pattern). Autogen **does not** emit CURATED notebooks for Enriched Dataset type; metadata is unlikely to queue a CURATED stage. Promoting to **`Fact`** + `Truncate and Reload` is the proven WDM path orchestration already schedules (ENRICHED → CURATED, soft deps on DimPerson/DimOffice). ^[inferred from repo autogen + plan review session 2026-07-03]

### PersonKey join (ENRICHED — all three Facts)

Use `employeeId` for Forecasts/Qualifications; `employeeID` for Working Arrangements.

```sql
INNER JOIN `{GoldCatalog}`.workerdatamart.curated_dimperson dp
  ON bh.<employeeId column> = dp.EmployeeId
 AND dp.is_current = 1
 AND lower(dp.Source) = 'workday'
INNER JOIN `{GoldCatalog}`.workerdatamart.curated_dimoffice o
  ON lower(o.OfficeId) = lower(dp.PrimaryOfficeId)
 AND o.is_current = 1
 AND lower(o.Source) = 'workday'
 AND o.OfficeRegionCode NOT IN ('CE', 'UK and Ireland')
```

- **`lower()` on office IDs** — required (WDM `WorkerAvailability` precedent); case mismatch silently drops rows.
- **UK/EU regions** from WDM `curated_dimoffice`: `CE` (Continental Europe), `UK and Ireland`.
- NULL `OfficeRegionCode` rows are dropped by `NOT IN` — quantify during validation.
- Join **`workerdatamart.curated_dimperson`**, not MODEL `DimPerson` views.

### Contract metadata highlights

- `PersonKey` (`bigint`, sort 1) on the three Facts.
- **Natural keys**: Forecasts (`employeeId`, `commitmentDate`, `matterNumber`); Qualifications (`employeeId`, `qualificationDate`, `countryIsoCode`); Working Arrangements (`employeeID`, `effectiveStartDate`).
- **`IS_MEASURE=TRUE`** on `commitmentHours` and seven `*WorkingHours` columns — prevents CURATED coalesce loop turning NULL hours into `-1`.
- **Dependencies** (Facts): Hard `BASE~bighand~bighand_<entity>~Hard` + Soft `CURATED~WorkerDataMart~DimPerson~Soft` + `DimOffice~Soft`.

Regenerate JSON: `Generate-DataContractsFromSchemaCSV.ps1` with `$dataProductCode = "BigHand"` (script bottom hardcodes WorkerDataMart — invoke `New-DataContracts` without running that line).

## Notebook locations

| Stage | Path pattern |
|-------|----------------|
| API ingest | `/Data Platform/11 - Ingestion/Ingest BigHand` |
| RAW→BASE | `/Data Platform/2 - RAW to BASE/RAW to BASE - Default` |
| ENRICHED Facts | `3 - ENRICHED/BigHand/Enriched - BigHand - Fact - {Entity}.py` |
| ENRICHED Offices | `3 - ENRICHED/BigHand/Enriched - BigHand - Enriched Dataset - Offices.py` |
| CURATED Facts | `4 - CURATED/BigHand/Curated - BigHand - Fact - {Entity}.py` |
| MODEL | `5 - MODEL/BigHand/Model - BigHand - FactPersonCapacity.py` |
| Metastore DDL | `1 - Post Deployment/Create CURATED Metastore Tables - bighand.py` (manual `%run` in parent orchestrator) |

Autogen naming: `Enriched - {Product} - {Type} - {Entity}` / `Curated - {Product} - {Type} - {Entity}`.

## Deploy and run sequence (dev)

**Do not confuse ADF Main Orchestrator with metastore DDL.**

| Step | Pipeline / action | What it does |
|------|-------------------|--------------|
| 1 | **Metadata** ADO (`metadata/azure-pipelines.yml`) | Contracts → SQL orchestration metadata (Fact type, deps) |
| 2 | **Transformation** ADO (`transformation/yaml/transformation/`) — **manual** trigger | `import-dir` notebooks to `/Data Platform` only |
| 3 | **Unity Catalog** ADO (`transformation/yaml/unity-catalog/`) — auto on `transformation/**` | Post-deployment: `Create CURATED Metastore Tables.py` → `%run` bighand child → creates `gold.bighand.curated_*` (~45 min full run) |
| 4 | **Main Orchestrator** (ADF, BigHand-scoped) or manual ENRICHED→CURATED | Load data into curated tables |

**Main Orchestrator** (`PopulateProcessQueue` → ingestion → Event Grid → `Child - Process Queue Message`) runs the **data pipeline**, not `Create CURATED Metastore Tables`. See [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/orchestration-and-adf]].

Prerequisites for Fact runs: `DimPerson` / `DimOffice` curated; BASE populated for bighand entities.

## Four-table fix (2026-07-03)

Restored all four BigHand entities end-to-end after schema drift / missing BASE tables:

1. `Create BASE Metastore Tables - bighand` (UC DDL)
2. `RAW to BASE - Default` ×4 (backfill from PI 849 RAW paths)
3. Four ENRICHED notebooks → `silver.temp.enriched_bighand_*`

Validated row counts (BASE = TEMP, all > 0): Forecasts ~19.8k, Offices 39, Qualifications ~2.5k, Working Arrangements ~24.9k.

**Gotcha:** Orchestration REST `GetEntityMetadata` returned **403** from local workstation (IP restriction on function app); notebooks on cluster succeeded — metadata in SQL is fine.

Manual runs used `databricks jobs submit` on cluster `job-cluster-01` (`0113-162431-9uj669qy`). See [[skills/databricks-run-commands-via-execution-context]].

## Validation SQL (post Fact deploy)

```sql
SHOW TABLES IN `fbd-d-uks-data-dlz-dbw-gold`.bighand;

SELECT COUNT(*) total, COUNT(PersonKey) with_key
FROM `fbd-d-uks-data-dlz-dbw-gold`.bighand.curated_forecasts;

SELECT
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `fbd-d-uks-data-dlz-dbw-gold`.temp.enriched_bighand_forecasts) enriched,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `fbd-d-uks-data-dlz-dbw-gold`.bighand.curated_forecasts) curated;

-- Expect 0 UK/EU leaks
SELECT COUNT(*) AS uk_eu_leaks
FROM `fbd-d-uks-data-dlz-dbw-gold`.bighand.curated_forecasts f
JOIN `fbd-d-uks-data-dlz-dbw-gold`.workerdatamart.curated_dimperson dp ON f.PersonKey = dp.PersonKey
JOIN `fbd-d-uks-data-dlz-dbw-gold`.workerdatamart.curated_dimoffice o
  ON lower(o.OfficeId) = lower(dp.PrimaryOfficeId) AND o.is_current = 1 AND lower(o.Source) = 'workday'
WHERE o.OfficeRegionCode IN ('CE', 'UK and Ireland');
```

Repeat for qualifications and working arrangements. Curated row count ≤ enriched (inner joins drop non-matching / UK-EU employees).

## Deferred / out of scope

- **Additional MODEL views** beyond `FactPersonCapacity` — deferred
- **`bighand.curated_offices`** — Offices stays `silver.temp` only
- **Combined employee×day fact** (Forecasts + Working Arrangements spine) — discussed 2026-07-03; belongs in a new ENRICHED Fact with joins, not a one-off gold view. Multi-source logic = ENRICHED, not CURATED-only pass-through.
- Renaming entity codes to `FactForecasts` etc.

## Design clarifications (session 2026-07-03)

| Question | Answer |
|----------|--------|
| Should ENRICHED land in `gold.bighand` instead of `temp`? | **No.** `temp` is the ENRICHED checkpoint; `gold.bighand.curated_*` is the consumer layer. Don't repoint ENRICHED notebooks to `gold.bighand`. |
| Does Main Orchestrator run metastore child? | **No.** Unity Catalog pipeline or manual `Create CURATED Metastore Tables`. |
| `silver.temp` vs `gold.temp` for Facts? | **Facts use `gold.temp`** (WDM FactPersonCalendar pattern). Offices Enriched Dataset stays **`silver.temp`**. |

## Related

- [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/bighand-gold-layer-exploration]] — **authoritative** gold schemas, WDM conventions, autogen gaps
- [[projects/data-platform-dlz/entities/data-products]] — product catalogue
- [[projects/data-platform-dlz/entities/source-systems#BigHand]] — API / Postman collection
- [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/curation-pipeline#ENRICHED has two flavours]] — Enriched Dataset vs Fact
- [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/metastore-schema-evolution]] — DDL guard, PURGE remediation
- [[projects/data-platform-dlz/skills/adf-debug-mode-monitoring]] — monitoring Main Orchestrator debug runs
- [[projects/data-platform-dlz/entities/factpersoncalendar]] — reference Fact ENRICHED→CURATED pattern

data.summary: BigHand product hub: Fact path, PersonKey, UK/EU filter, deploy sequence. Gold schemas → bighand-gold-layer-exploration.

arguments.content:
# Curated and Model Layers

[[projects/data-platform-dlz/data-platform-dlz|← Index]]

## Summary

**235+ notebooks** across CURATED and MODEL implement the gold dimensional exposure for **Canonical Model**, **Worker Data Mart**, and **BigHand**.

| Product | CURATED | MODEL | Contract entities |
|---------|--------:|------:|------------------:|
| Canonical Model | 35 | 35 | 35 |
| Worker Data Mart | 78 | 87 | 78 |
| BigHand | 3 | 1 | 3 Facts + 1 MODEL view |

MODEL WDM count (87) exceeds CURATED (78) because MODEL includes `Post Deployment/` subfolder notebooks (e.g. `Run All Model Views.py`, key generation).

BigHand: `gold.bighand.curated_forecasts|qualifications|workingarrangements` + MODEL view `BigHand.FactPersonCapacity`. Full inventory and WDM naming conventions: [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/bighand-gold-layer-exploration]]. Operational hub: [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/bighand-data-product]].

## Naming conventions

| Layer | Pattern | Example |
|-------|---------|---------|
| CURATED | `Curated - {Product} - {Dim\|Fact\|Bridge\|Agg} - {Entity}.py` | `Curated - Canonical Model - Client.py` |
| MODEL (Canonical) | `Model - Canonical Model - Canonical - {Entity}.py` | `Model - Canonical Model - Canonical - Department.py` |
| MODEL (WDM) | `Model - Worker Data Mart - {Dim\|Fact} - {Entity}.py` | (under `5 - MODEL/Worker Data Mart/`) |
| MODEL (BigHand) | `Model - BigHand - {Entity}.py` | `Model - BigHand - FactPersonCapacity.py` |

**WDM gold naming** (CURATED `workerdatamart.curated_*` lowercase vs MODEL `WorkerDataMart.{Entity}` PascalCase): see [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/bighand-gold-layer-exploration#2. WorkerDataMart gold conventions]].

## CURATED vs MODEL

| Layer | Purpose |
|-------|---------|
| **CURATED** | Business-ready curated tables in gold catalog; joins, business rules, Unknown/NA sentinel rows |
| **MODEL** | Dimensional model views exposed to consumers; `Run All Model Views.py` refreshes model views |

Both layers call `DataContractService().get_transformation_entity()` and write to paths defined in contract `curationStages`.

**`isModelViewEnabled`:** WDM entities set `false` (hand-authored MODEL notebooks); CanonicalModel sets `true` (autogen pass-through). BigHand has no contract flag — `FactPersonCapacity` is manual. Detail: [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/bighand-gold-layer-exploration#2.3 Data product contracts]].

## Canonical Model specifics

- `Create Keys - CanonicalModel` — surrogate key generation
- Unknown/NA sentinel rows for referential integrity
- **Change Data Feed** enabled on `canonicalmodel.curated_*` — see [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/metastore-schema-evolution#Change Data Feed (CDF) enablement]]

## Worker Data Mart specifics

- Largest product: 78 ENRICHED + 78 CURATED + 87 MODEL notebooks
- Heavy consumer of **CDF Lookup** reference data
- Snapshot facts have dedicated backfill notebooks in `99 - Backfill/`
- **Key resolution patterns** (`DateKey`, `MatterKey`, `PersonKey`): [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/bighand-gold-layer-exploration#3. DateKey, MatterKey, PersonKey / EmployeeId patterns]]

## ENRICHED context (upstream)

106+ ENRICHED notebooks feed CURATED. Per-product counts:

| Product | ENRICHED notebooks |
|---------|-------------------:|
| Worker Data Mart | 78 |
| Partner Portal | 8 |
| CDF Lookup | 7 |
| BigHand | 4 |
| Predict X | 3 |
| Milana | 2 |
| API / Benevity / Data Ops / Data Quality | 1 each |

## Related

- [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/curation-pipeline]] — full medallion flow
- [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/bighand-data-product]] — BigHand operational hub
- [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/bighand-gold-layer-exploration]] — BigHand + WDM gold conventions (source of truth)
- [[projects/data-platform-dlz/entities/data-products]] — product catalog
- [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/raw-to-base-patterns]] — upstream BASE layer

# BigHand Data Product

[[projects/data-platform-dlz/data-platform-dlz|← Index]] | **Gold reference:** [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/bighand-gold-layer-exploration]] | Ingestion: [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/api-ingestion-notebooks]] | Contracts: [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/contract-generation-pipeline]] | Deploy: [[projects/data-platform-dlz/skills/deployment-and-ci-cd]]

## Summary

**BigHand** is a DLZ data product over the `bighand` source system (BigHand RM API). It landed initially as four **Enriched Dataset** entities (cast/prune only, `silver.temp`). From **2026-07-03** three person-level entities were promoted to the **Fact** path (PersonKey + UK/EU office filter in ENRICHED, mechanical CURATED to `gold.bighand.curated_*`). **Offices** remains an Enriched Dataset terminating at `silver.temp` only.

For **schemas, column inventories, MODEL view `FactPersonCapacity`, WDM key conventions, and framework autogen status** see [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/bighand-gold-layer-exploration]] (authoritative repo exploration, 2026-07-06).

## Source system vs data product

| Layer | Catalog / schema | Objects |
|-------|------------------|---------|
| **Ingestion** (`bighand` source) | `silver.bighand` | `bighand_forecasts`, `bighand_offices`, `bighand_qualifications`, `bighand_workingarrangements` |
| **ENRICHED temp** | `silver.temp` (Offices) or **`gold.temp`** (3 Facts) | `enriched_bighand_*` |
| **CURATED** | `gold.bighand` | `curated_forecasts`, `curated_qualifications`, `curated_workingarrangements` |
| **MODEL** | `gold` / schema `BigHand` | `FactPersonCapacity` view |

Silver BASE table name = `<sourceSystemCode>.<entityCode>` (e.g. `bighand.bighand_offices`), **not** the ingestion `TABLE_NAME` (`bh_Offices`).

## Entity catalogue (current)

| Entity code | Contract type | PersonKey | UK/EU filter | Terminal output |
|-------------|---------------|-----------|--------------|-----------------|
| `Forecasts` | **Fact** | Yes | Yes | `gold.bighand.curated_forecasts` |
| `Qualifications` | **Fact** | Yes | Yes | `gold.bighand.curated_qualifications` |
| `WorkingArrangements` | **Fact** | Yes | Yes | `gold.bighand.curated_workingarrangements` |
| `Offices` | **Enriched Dataset** | No | N/A | `silver.temp.enriched_bighand_offices` only |

Contracts: `metadata/contracts/data-products/BigHand/`. CSVs: `metadata/contracts/scripts/data-products/BigHand-*.csv`.

## Architecture — Fact path (FactPersonCalendar pattern)

Reference implementation: WDM **`FactPersonCalendar`** — business logic in **ENRICHED**, persistence in **CURATED**.

```mermaid
flowchart LR
  subgraph silver [silver catalog]
    BASE["bighand.bighand_*"]
    OFF_TEMP["temp.enriched_bighand_offices"]
  end
  subgraph gold [gold catalog]
    DP["workerdatamart.curated_dimperson"]
    DO["workerdatamart.curated_dimoffice"]

  end
```
