frontmatter.summary: Tech-lead naming rules: no camelCase, no source names in workerdatamart, temp for ENRICHED, views in workerdatamart — with BigHand migration examples.

arguments.content:
# DLZ Naming and Schema Conventions

[[projects/data-platform-dlz/data-platform-dlz|← Index]] | **Case study:** [[projects/data-platform-dlz/synthesis/bighand-to-workerdatamart-migration-2026-07]] | WDM overview: [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/worker-data-mart]]

> Authoritative naming rules distilled from senior technical manager guidance and the **Jul 2026 BigHand → WorkerDataMart migration** (`je_bighand_ingest_257456`). When in doubt, follow **Worker Data Mart (WDM)** patterns — not source-system naming.

## Executive rules (tech-lead mandated)

| Rule | Meaning | Example (do) | Anti-pattern (don't) |
|------|---------|--------------|----------------------|
| **No camelCase in datamart** | Gold `workerdatamart` curated tables and MODEL views use platform column conventions — PascalCase business attributes, `*Key` surrogates, snake_case ETL metadata | `PersonKey`, `CommitmentDateKey`, `CommitmentHours` | `employeeId`, `commitmentDate`, `monWorkingHours` on curated facts |
| **No product/source names in datamart** | `workerdatamart` holds **functional** dimensional objects, not source-system branding | `curated_factforecasts`, `FactPersonCapacity` | `curated_bighand_forecasts`, `bighand.curated_forecasts` |
| **Gold schemas = data products** | Consumer-facing gold groupings follow **data product** boundaries (WorkerDataMart, CanonicalModel), not ingestion source systems | Facts in `workerdatamart` with `Fact*` entity codes | Three BigHand facts living in `gold.bighand` |
| **Data in `temp`** | ENRICHED-stage checkpoint tables land in the **`temp`** schema — not in consumer schemas | `gold.temp.enriched_workerdatamart_factforecasts` | Writing ENRICHED output directly to `workerdatamart` or `bighand` |
| **Views in `workerdatamart`** | MODEL-layer consumer views for WDM entities belong in the **`workerdatamart`** schema alongside other fact/dim views | `WorkerDataMart.FactPersonCapacity`, `WorkerDataMart.FactQualifications` | `BigHand.FactPersonCapacity` in `bighand` schema |
| **Functional entity codes** | Contract entity codes describe **what** the data is, with type prefix | `FactForecasts`, `FactQualifications`, `DimPerson` | `Forecasts`, `Qualifications` (no `Fact` prefix in WDM) |

---

## Catalog and schema placement

### Unity Catalog layers

| Catalog | Typical schemas | What lives here |
|---------|-----------------|-----------------|
| **`fbd-d-uks-data-dlz-dbw-silver`** | `bighand`, other source schemas | **BASE** ingestion tables — mirror source field names at bronze/silver boundary |
| **`fbd-d-uks-data-dlz-dbw-gold`** | `temp`, `workerdatamart`, `canonicalmodel`, residual `bighand` | ENRICHED checkpoints, CURATED physical tables, MODEL views |

### Medallion → schema mapping (WDM Fact path)

```mermaid
flowchart TB
  subgraph silver [silver catalog]
    BASE["bighand.bighand_forecasts\n(source-shaped BASE)"]
  end
  subgraph gold [gold catalog]
    TEMP["temp.enriched_workerdatamart_factforecasts\n(ENRICHED checkpoint)"]
    CUR["workerdatamart.curated_factforecasts\n(CURATED physical)"]
    VIEW["workerdatamart.factpersoncapacity\n(MODEL view)"]
  end
  BASE -->|ENRICHED notebook| TEMP
  TEMP -->|CURATED notebook| CUR
  CUR -->|MODEL notebook| VIEW
```

| Stage | Catalog | Schema | Object pattern | Responsibility |
|-------|---------|--------|----------------|----------------|
| **BASE** | silver | `{sourcesystem}` | `{sourcesystem}_{entity}` lowercase | RAW→BASE; preserve source column names |
| **ENRICHED** | gold | `temp` | `enriched_{dataproduct}_{entity}` all lowercase | Joins, filters, surrogate keys; **business logic here** |
| **CURATED** | gold | `workerdatamart` | `curated_{entitycode}` all lowercase | Read `temp`; standardise types; hash; **TRUNCATE + INSERT** — no joins |
| **MODEL** | gold | `workerdatamart` (physical) / `WorkerDataMart` (SQL view name) | `{EntityCode}` PascalCase | Consumer-facing views over curated tables |

**Exception — Enriched Dataset (non-Fact):** terminal ENRICHED only, often `silver.temp` (e.g. BigHand `Offices` → `temp.enriched_bighand_offices`). No CURATED table.

---

## Naming patterns (quick reference)

### Physical tables

| Layer | Pattern | BigHand migration example |
|-------|---------|---------------------------|
| Silver BASE | `` `{silver}`.{sourcesystem}.{sourcesystem}_{entity} `` | `bighand.bighand_forecasts` |
| Gold ENRICHED temp | `` `{gold}`.temp.enriched_{dataproduct}_{entity} `` | `temp.enriched_workerdatamart_factforecasts` |
| Gold CURATED | `` `{gold}`.workerdatamart.curated_{entitycode} `` | `workerdatamart.curated_factforecasts` |

**Autogen rule** (framework): `curatedSchemaName = dataProduct.code.lower()` → `workerdatamart`; `curatedTableName = f"curated_{entity.code}".lower()` → `curated_factforecasts`.

### MODEL views

| Element | Convention | Example |
|---------|------------|---------|
| SQL `CREATE VIEW` schema | PascalCase data product code | `CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW WorkerDataMart.FactPersonCapacity` |
| UC physical schema | lowercase | `workerdatamart.factpersoncapacity` |
| View name | PascalCase entity code | `FactPersonCapacity`, `FactQualifications`, `FactPersonCalendar` |
| Notebook path | `5 - MODEL/Worker Data Mart/Model - Worker Data Mart - Fact - {Entity}.py` | `Model - Worker Data Mart - Fact - Person Capacity.py` |
| Registration | `1 - Post Deployment/Run All Model Views.py` | Adjacent to related views (e.g. after PersonCalendar) |

### Column naming (curated facts)

| Category | Convention | Examples |
|----------|------------|----------|
| Surrogate keys | PascalCase + `Key` | `PersonKey`, `MatterKey`, `CommitmentDateKey` |
| Business attributes | PascalCase | `CommitmentTypeName`, `RegionIsoCode`, `MonWorkingHours` |
| Flags | `INT` 1/0 (not BOOLEAN in curated) | `IsProvisionalMatter`, `IsProvisionalBooking` |
| Dates in curated | `*DateKey` BIGINT (`yyyyMMdd` via `curated_dimdate`) | `CommitmentDateKey`, `EffectiveStartDateKey` |
| ETL metadata | snake_case | `inserted_process_instance_id`, `natural_key_hash` |
| Source IDs on curated | **Omit** — resolve to surrogates in ENRICHED only | Drop `employeeId` from curated; keep `PersonKey` |

### ADLS paths

| Stage | Pattern |
|-------|---------|
| BASE | `{DATALAKE}/BASE/General/{SourceSystem}/{entityCode}/delta/` |
| CURATED | `{DATALAKE}/CURATED/General/{DataProduct}/{EntityCode}/delta/` |

BigHand migration: `/CURATED/General/WorkerDataMart/FactForecasts/delta/` (not `/BigHand/Forecasts/`).

### Notebook naming

| Stage | Pattern |
|-------|---------|
| ENRICHED | `Enriched - Worker Data Mart - Fact - {Entity}.py` |
| CURATED | `Curated - Worker Data Mart - Fact - {Entity}.py` |
| MODEL | `Model - Worker Data Mart - Fact - {Entity}.py` |
| Post-deploy DDL | `Create CURATED Metastore Tables - WorkerDataMart - BigHand Facts.py` (small focused notebooks for new entities) |

---

## BigHand case study — before vs after

| Concern | Before (anti-pattern) | After (correct) |
|---------|----------------------|-----------------|
| Data product | `BigHand` product owns facts | `WorkerDataMart` product owns `FactForecasts`, `FactQualifications`, `FactWorkingArrangements` |
| CURATED location | `gold.bighand.curated_forecasts` | `gold.workerdatamart.curated_factforecasts` |
| ENRICHED temp | `temp.enriched_bighand_forecasts` | `temp.enriched_workerdatamart_factforecasts` |
| Entity code | `Forecasts` (no type prefix) | `FactForecasts` |
| MODEL view | `BigHand.FactPersonCapacity` | `WorkerDataMart.FactPersonCapacity` |
| Columns | camelCase source fields + `employeeId` | `PersonKey`, `CommitmentDateKey`, PascalCase measures |
| What stays in BigHand | — | **Offices** only (`Enriched Dataset` → `silver.temp.enriched_bighand_offices`); silver BASE `bighand.bighand_*` |

**Legacy cleanup** (manual, post-validation): drop `bighand.curated_*`, `bighand.factpersoncapacity`, `temp.enriched_bighand_*` via `9 - Pre Deployment/Decommission Legacy BigHand Gold Curated.py`.

---

## Pipeline responsibilities (implied conventions)

| Layer | Joins? | Writes to | Reads from |
|-------|--------|-----------|------------|
| ENRICHED | **Yes** — dimensions, office filters, key resolution | `temp.enriched_*` | Silver BASE + `workerdatamart.curated_dim*` |
| CURATED | **No** — mechanical load only | `workerdatamart.curated_*` | `temp.enriched_*` |
| MODEL | **Yes** — in view SQL only | `CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW` | `workerdatamart.curated_*` |

Multi-source business logic (e.g. person×day capacity from forecasts + working arrangements) belongs in **ENRICHED** or **MODEL views** — not as pass-through CURATED-only tables in a source schema.

---

## Contract and orchestration alignment

- Entity **must** live in the data product whose schema autogen emits: move rows in `WorkerDataMart-EntityMetadata.csv`, not just repoint notebooks.
- `DataContractService().get_transformation_entity(dl, dataProductCode, entityCode)` uses process-queue `DataProductCode` — mismatched product breaks orchestration.
- Dependencies: `BASE~bighand~bighand_forecasts~Hard` + Soft `CURATED~WorkerDataMart~DimPerson~Soft` pattern for BigHand-sourced WDM facts.
- `isModelViewEnabled: false` on WDM entities — MODEL views are **hand-authored**; register in `Run All Model Views.py`.

---

## Validation checklist

```sql
-- CURATED tables in workerdatamart (not bighand)
SHOW TABLES IN `fbd-d-uks-data-dlz-dbw-gold`.workerdatamart LIKE 'curated_factforecast*';

-- ENRICHED temp uses workerdatamart prefix (not bighand) for WDM facts
SHOW TABLES IN `fbd-d-uks-data-dlz-dbw-gold`.temp LIKE 'enriched_workerdatamart_fact%';

-- MODEL view in workerdatamart
SELECT table_schema, table_name, table_type
FROM `fbd-d-uks-data-dlz-dbw-gold`.information_schema.tables
WHERE table_name = 'factpersoncapacity';

-- Legacy gone (after manual decommission)
-- bighand.factpersoncapacity, bighand.curated_*, temp.enriched_bighand_* should not exist
```

---

## Related

- [[projects/data-platform-dlz/synthesis/bighand-to-workerdatamart-migration-2026-07]] — migration narrative, mistakes, deploy order
- [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/worker-data-mart]] — WDM product overview
- [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/bighand-gold-layer-exploration]] — pre/post migration gold inventory
- [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/curated-and-model-layers]] — notebook counts and layer roles
- [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/curation-pipeline]] — Enriched Dataset vs Fact flavours
- [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/contract-generation-pipeline]] — CSV → contracts → autogen DDL
- [[projects/data-platform-dlz/entities/factpersoncalendar]] — reference Fact ENRICHED→CURATED→MODEL pattern

| Stage | Catalog | Schema | Object pattern | Responsibility |
|-------|---------|--------|----------------|----------------|
| **BASE** | silver | `{sourcesystem}` | `{sourcesystem}_{entity}` lowercase | RAW→BASE; preserve source column names |

---

## Naming patterns (quick reference)

### Physical tables

| Layer | Pattern | BigHand migration example |
|-------|---------|---------------------------|
| Silver BASE | `` `{silver}`.{sourcesystem}.{sourcesystem}_{entity} `` | `bighand.bighand_forecasts` |

### MODEL views

| Element | Convention | Example |

| SQL `CREATE VIEW` schema | PascalCase data product code | `CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW WorkerDataMart.FactPersonCapacity` |

### Column naming (curated facts)

### Notebook naming

| Concern | Before (anti-pattern) | After (correct) |

| Data product | `BigHand` product owns facts | `WorkerDataMart` product owns `FactForecasts`, `FactQualifications`, `FactWorkingArrangements` |

# WDM Person Fact Rename & Decommission (Jul 2026)

[[projects/data-platform-dlz/data-platform-dlz|← Index]] | Prior phase: [[projects/data-platform-dlz/synthesis/bighand-to-workerdatamart-migration-2026-07]] | Hub: [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/bighand-data-product]] | Naming: [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/dlz-naming-and-schema-conventions]]

> **Status: complete (dev)** — branch `je_bighand_ingest_257456`, commit `45d8018e` (person fact renames in contracts). ADF Main Orchestrator run + manual decommission validated **2026-07-07**.

## Why a second rename

After the initial BigHand → WorkerDataMart schema migration (Jul 6–7), interim entity codes (`FactForecasts`, `FactQualifications`, `FactWorkingArrangements`) did not match WDM **person-fact** naming (`FactPersonCalendar`, `FactPersonCapacity`). Tech-lead alignment: prefix with `FactPerson` and use singular functional names.

**Not** renamed to `FactWorkerAvailability` — that name is reserved for a different WDM concept.

## Object mapping (interim → final)

| Interim entity | Final entity | Interim CURATED | Final CURATED |
|----------------|--------------|-----------------|---------------|
| `FactForecasts` | `FactPersonForecast` | `curated_factforecasts` | `curated_factpersonforecast` |
| `FactQualifications` | `FactPersonQualification` | `curated_factqualifications` | `curated_factpersonqualification` |
| `FactWorkingArrangements` | `FactPersonWorkingArrangement` | `curated_factworkingarrangements` | `curated_factpersonworkingarrangement` |

| Interim temp ENRICHED | Final temp ENRICHED |
|-----------------------|---------------------|
| `temp.enriched_workerdatamart_factforecasts` | `temp.enriched_workerdatamart_factpersonforecast` |
| `temp.enriched_workerdatamart_factqualifications` | `temp.enriched_workerdatamart_factpersonqualification` |
| `temp.enriched_workerdatamart_factworkingarrangements` | `temp.enriched_workerdatamart_factpersonworkingarrangement` |

ADLS CURATED paths: `/CURATED/General/WorkerDataMart/FactPerson{Forecast|Qualification|WorkingArrangement}/delta/`.

## FactPersonCapacity alignment

`WorkerDataMart.FactPersonCapacity` MODEL view (notebook `Model - Worker Data Mart - Fact - Person Capacity.py`):

- **Schema:** `workerdatamart` (not `bighand`)
- **Columns:** PascalCase; `CalendarDateKey` (not `calendarDate`); INT 1/0 flags (`IsWorkingDay`, `HasProvisionalBooking`, `HasProvisionalMatter`)
- **Sources:** joins `curated_factpersonforecast`, `curated_factpersonworkingarrangement`, `curated_dimperson`, `curated_dimdate`

## Repo changes (commit `45d8018e`)

- **Contracts:** `FactPersonForecast.json`, `FactPersonQualification.json`, `FactPersonWorkingArrangement.json`; deleted interim `FactForecasts` / `FactQualifications` / `FactWorkingArrangements` JSONs
- **CSV:** `WorkerDataMart-EntityMetadata.csv`, `WorkerDataMart-ColumnSchemaMetadata.csv`
- **Notebooks renamed:** six ENRICHED/CURATED + MODEL Qualifications + MODEL Person Capacity
- **DDL:** `Create CURATED Metastore Tables - WorkerDataMart - BigHand Facts.py`
- **Decommission:** superseded interim `curated_factforecasts*` tables, old temp tables, legacy `BigHand.FactPersonCapacity`, orphaned ADLS — via `9 - Pre Deployment/Decommission Legacy BigHand Gold Curated.py`

## Deploy order (validated)

| Step | Action | Parallel? |
|------|--------|-----------|
| 1 | **Metadata** pipeline | OK with Transformation |
| 2 | **Transformation** pipeline (notebook sync) | OK with Metadata |
| 3 | **Unity Catalog** pipeline | **Never** parallel with Transformation |
| 4 | **ADF Main Orchestrator** (BigHand/WDM scope) | After UC |
| 5 | **Run All Model Views** (if not in UC run) | After data load |
| 6 | Validate row counts | Before decommission |
| 7 | **Manual** `Decommission Legacy BigHand Gold Curated` | Standalone notebook on `job-cluster-01` |

## Dev validation (2026-07-07)

Pre-decommission counts (new = old — safe to drop superseded objects):

| Object | Rows |
|--------|-----:|
| `workerdatamart.curated_factpersonforecast` | 8,239 |
| `workerdatamart.curated_factpersonqualification` | 1,006 |
| `workerdatamart.curated_factpersonworkingarrangement` | 2,945 |
| `workerdatamart.factpersonqualification` (view) | 1,006 |
| `workerdatamart.factpersoncapacity` (view) | 179,584 |

**Decommission run:** SUCCESS (~5 min on `job-cluster-01`).

**Post-decommission:** interim `curated_factforecasts*`, `factqualifications` view, legacy `temp.enriched_bighand_*` (except Offices path), `bighand` gold curated facts — **gone**. New curated tables and views — **intact, same counts**.

## Current dev UC inventory

**Keep:**

| Layer | Objects |
|-------|---------|
| Silver BASE | `bighand.bighand_forecasts`, `bighand_qualifications`, `bighand_workingarrangements`, `bighand_offices` |
| Silver temp | `temp.enriched_bighand_offices` (Offices only) |
| Gold temp | `temp.enriched_workerdatamart_factpersonforecast`, `factpersonqualification`, `factpersonworkingarrangement` |
| Gold CURATED | `workerdatamart.curated_factpersonforecast`, `curated_factpersonqualification`, `curated_factpersonworkingarrangement` |
| Gold MODEL | `workerdatamart.factpersonqualification`, `factpersoncapacity` |

**Removed:** all `gold.bighand` curated facts, `BigHand.FactPersonCapacity`, interim `curated_factforecasts*`, legacy enriched temp tables for migrated facts.

## Validation SQL

```sql
-- Current objects
SHOW TABLES IN `fbd-d-uks-data-dlz-dbw-gold`.workerdatamart LIKE 'curated_factperson%';
SHOW TABLES IN `fbd-d-uks-data-dlz-dbw-gold`.temp LIKE 'enriched_workerdatamart_factperson%';

SELECT 'forecast' AS t, COUNT(*) FROM `fbd-d-uks-data-dlz-dbw-gold`.workerdatamart.curated_factpersonforecast
UNION ALL SELECT 'qualification', COUNT(*) FROM `fbd-d-uks-data-dlz-dbw-gold`.workerdatamart.curated_factpersonqualification
UNION ALL SELECT 'working_arr', COUNT(*) FROM `fbd-d-uks-data-dlz-dbw-gold`.workerdatamart.curated_factpersonworkingarrangement;

-- Legacy should be empty after decommission
SHOW TABLES IN `fbd-d-uks-data-dlz-dbw-gold`.bighand;
```

## Related

- [[projects/data-platform-dlz/synthesis/bighand-to-workerdatamart-migration-2026-07]] — phase 1 schema migration, CICD gotchas
- [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/dlz-naming-and-schema-conventions]] — authoritative naming rules
- [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/worker-data-mart]] — WDM product overview
- [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/bighand-data-product]] — BigHand hub (Offices + ingestion only)
- [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/backfill-and-operational-playbooks#9 — Pre Deployment]] — decommission notebook location

After the initial BigHand → WorkerDataMart schema migration (Jul 6–7), interim entity codes (`FactForecasts`, `FactQualifications`, `FactWorkingArrangements`) did not match WDM **person-fact** naming (`FactPersonCalendar`, `FactPersonCapacity`). arguments.content:
## BigHand person facts (2026-07-07 — current)

Three BigHand-sourced **person facts** live in WorkerDataMart with `FactPerson*` entity codes (phase 2 rename complete; decommission validated in dev):

| Entity | CURATED table | MODEL view | Dev rows (2026-07-07) |
|--------|---------------|------------|----------------------:|
| `FactPersonForecast` | `curated_factpersonforecast` | — (deferred) | 8,239 |
| `FactPersonQualification` | `curated_factpersonqualification` | `WorkerDataMart.FactPersonQualification` | 1,006 |
| `FactPersonWorkingArrangement` | `curated_factpersonworkingarrangement` | — (deferred) | 2,945 |

**Composite MODEL view:** `WorkerDataMart.FactPersonCapacity` — person×date capacity (179,584 rows); joins forecast + working arrangement curated facts.

Contracts: `metadata/contracts/data-products/WorkerDataMart/FactPerson*.json`. Notebooks: `3 - ENRICHED/Worker Data Mart/Enriched - Worker Data Mart - Fact - Person *.py`, matching CURATED and MODEL paths.

ENRICHED temp: `gold.temp.enriched_workerdatamart_factperson*`. BigHand product retains **Offices** only (`silver.temp.enriched_bighand_offices`).

Migration narrative: [[projects/data-platform-dlz/synthesis/bighand-to-workerdatamart-migration-2026-07]] (phase 1) → [[projects/data-platform-dlz/synthesis/wdm-person-fact-rename-and-decommission-2026-07]] (phase 2 + decommission).

**Naming conventions (authoritative):** [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/dlz-naming-and-schema-conventions]] — tech-lead rules for catalog/schema placement, temp vs workerdatamart, entity codes, and column casing.

# Worker Data Mart

[[projects/data-platform-dlz/data-platform-dlz|← Index]] | [[projects/data-platform-dlz/entities/data-products]] | **Gold conventions:** [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/bighand-gold-layer-exploration#2. WorkerDataMart gold conventions]]

## Summary

**Worker Data Mart** (`WorkerDataMart`) is the primary **dimensional model** for worker, matter, time, and revenue analytics. It is the largest enriched product in the repo and the **main consumer of CDF Lookup** reference data.

- **Contracts**: `metadata/contracts/data-products/WorkerDataMart/` (many dimensions & facts)
- **Notebooks**: `transformation/src/databricks/3 - ENRICHED/Worker Data Mart/`
- **Naming**: `Enriched - Worker Data Mart - Dimension|Fact - <Entity>.py`

## Gold layer naming (CURATED vs MODEL)

| Layer | Schema | Table / view pattern |
|-------|--------|----------------------|
| CURATED (physical) | `workerdatamart` (lowercase) | `curated_{entityCode}` lowercase — e.g. `curated_dimperson`, `curated_facttimerecord` |
| MODEL (Power BI) | `WorkerDataMart` (PascalCase) | `{EntityCode}` PascalCase — e.g. `WorkerDataMart.DimPerson`, `WorkerDataMart.FactTimeRecord` |

Entity codes include type prefix (`DimPerson`, `FactTimeRecord`). Virtually all entities set `"isModelViewEnabled": false` — MODEL views are hand-authored with joins and PBI helpers, not autogen pass-throughs.

**Key resolution patterns** (`DateKey`, `MatterKey`, `PersonKey` / `EmployeeId`): [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/bighand-gold-layer-exploration#3. DateKey, MatterKey, PersonKey / EmployeeId patterns]].

## Source systems (typical)

| Domain | Sources |
|--------|---------|
| Finance / matters / time | Elite 3E |
| HR / workers | Workday |
| CRM / pitches | Salesforce |
| Reference codes | **CDF Lookup** |
| Capability | Capability blob/excel |
| Person capacity / forecasts | **BigHand** (BASE only; facts in WDM) |

## CDF Lookup usage

WDM notebooks declare ENRICHED sources from CDFLookup in metadata comments, e.g.:

- `InvoiceType` → invoice facts & DimInvoiceContext
- `DepartmentName` → DimDepartment
- `ReportingOfficeName`, `OfficeCrosswalk` → DimOffice
- `TimecardHierarchy`, `WorkCalendar` → FactTimeRecord

Always check **entity contract `dependencies`** and notebook header `SourceEntities` JSON when adding joins.

## Representative entities

**Dimensions**: DimPerson, DimDepartment, DimOffice, DimMatter, DimInvoiceContext, DimJobProfile, DimPayor, …

**Facts**: FactTimeRecord, FactMatterInvoice, FactTimeInvoice, FactChargeInvoice, FactExpenseInvoice, FactPitch, FactMatterInvoiceSnapshot, FactPersonForecast, FactPersonQualification, FactPersonWorkingArrangement, FactPersonCapacity, …

**Bridges**: BridgePersonLanguage, BridgePitchCapability, …

## Orchestration trigger

ADF trigger **Event Grid - Curation Stage Complete - Refresh Worker Data Mart** listens for `data-platform/Orchestration/CurationStageComplete/CURATED` — WDM refresh chains off curated completion events.

## Migration / testing

`8 - Platform Migration/Data Product Migration Checks/Worker Data Mart/` contains validation README and entity tests.

## Agent tips

- WDM changes are high blast-radius — trace dependencies in contracts first.
- Prefer matching existing SCD / dimension patterns in sibling notebooks.
- Classification fields on columns matter for GDPR (encrypt, etc.).

## Gold views (non-contracted)

Some objects in `workerdatamart` are **SQL views** created directly in the gold catalog and are **not** defined in `metadata/contracts/` or deployment notebooks. See [[projects/data-platform-dlz/entities/factpersoncalendar]] for `factpersoncalendar` — a person×date calendar with holidays, leave, and Nexthink attendance flags.

## BigHand person facts (2026-07-07 — current)

Three BigHand-sourced **person facts** live in WorkerDataMart with `FactPerson*` entity codes (phase 2 rename complete; decommission validated in dev):

| Entity | CURATED table | MODEL view | Dev rows (2026-07-07) |
|--------|---------------|------------|----------------------:|
| `FactPersonForecast` | `curated_factpersonforecast` | — (deferred) | 8,239 |
| `FactPersonQualification` | `curated_factpersonqualification` | `WorkerDataMart.FactPersonQualification` | 1,006 |
| `FactPersonWorkingArrangement` | `curated_factpersonworkingarrangement` | — (deferred) | 2,945 |

**Composite MODEL view:** `WorkerDataMart.FactPersonCapacity` — person×date capacity (179,584 rows); joins forecast + working arrangement curated facts.

Contracts: `metadata/contracts/data-products/WorkerDataMart/FactPerson*.json`. Notebooks: `3 - ENRICHED/Worker Data Mart/Enriched - Worker Data Mart - Fact - Person *.py`, matching CURATED and MODEL paths.

ENRICHED temp: `gold.temp.enriched_workerdatamart_factperson*`. BigHand product retains **Offices** only (`silver.temp.enriched_bighand_offices`).

Migration narrative: [[projects/data-platform-dlz/synthesis/bighand-to-workerdatamart-migration-2026-07]] (phase 1) → [[projects/data-platform-dlz/synthesis/wdm-person-fact-rename-and-decommission-2026-07]] (phase 2 + decommission).

## Related

- [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/bighand-gold-layer-exploration]] — WDM + BigHand gold conventions (authoritative)
- [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/curated-and-model-layers]] — notebook counts per layer
- [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/dlz-naming-and-schema-conventions]] — tech-lead naming rules

Migration narrative: [[projects/data-platform-dlz/synthesis/bighand-to-workerdatamart-migration-2026-07]] (phase 1) → [[projects/data-platform-dlz/synthesis/wdm-person-fact-rename-and-decommission-2026-07]] (phase 2 + decommission).

**Naming conventions (authoritative):** [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/dlz-naming-and-schema-conventions]] — tech-lead rules for catalog/schema placement, temp vs workerdatamart, entity codes, and column casing.

# Worker Data Mart

[[projects/data-platform-dlz/data-platform-dlz|← Index]] | [[projects/data-platform-dlz/entities/data-products]] | **Gold conventions:** [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/bighand-gold-layer-exploration#2. WorkerDataMart gold conventions]]

## Summary

**Worker Data Mart** (`WorkerDataMart`) is the primary **dimensional model** for worker, matter, time, and revenue analytics. It is the largest enriched product in the repo and the **main consumer of CDF Lookup** reference data.

- **Contracts**: `metadata/contracts/data-products/WorkerDataMart/` (many dimensions & facts)
- **Notebooks**: `transformation/src/databricks/3 - ENRICHED/Worker Data Mart/`
- **Naming**: `Enriched - Worker Data Mart - Dimension|Fact - <Entity>.py`

## Gold layer naming (CURATED vs MODEL)

| Layer | Schema | Table / view pattern |
|-------|--------|----------------------|
| CURATED (physical) | `workerdatamart` (lowercase) | `curated_{entityCode}` lowercase — e.g. `curated_dimperson`, `curated_facttimerecord` |
| MODEL (Power BI) | `WorkerDataMart` (PascalCase) | `{EntityCode}` PascalCase — e.g. `WorkerDataMart.DimPerson`, `WorkerDataMart.FactTimeRecord` |

Entity codes include type prefix (`DimPerson`, `FactTimeRecord`). Virtually all entities set `"isModelViewEnabled": false` — MODEL views are hand-authored with joins and PBI helpers, not autogen pass-throughs.

**Key resolution patterns** (`DateKey`, `MatterKey`, `PersonKey` / `EmployeeId`): [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/bighand-gold-layer-exploration#3. DateKey, MatterKey, PersonKey / EmployeeId patterns]].

## Source systems (typical)

| Domain | Sources |
|--------|---------|
| Finance / matters / time | Elite 3E |
| HR / workers | Workday |
| CRM / pitches | Salesforce |
| Reference codes | **CDF Lookup** |
| Capability | Capability blob/excel |
| Person capacity / forecasts | **BigHand** (BASE only; facts in WDM) |

## CDF Lookup usage

WDM notebooks declare ENRICHED sources from CDFLookup in metadata comments, e.g.:

- `InvoiceType` → invoice facts & DimInvoiceContext
- `DepartmentName` → DimDepartment
- `ReportingOfficeName`, `OfficeCrosswalk` → DimOffice
- `TimecardHierarchy`, `WorkCalendar` → FactTimeRecord

Always check **entity contract `dependencies`** and notebook header `SourceEntities` JSON when adding joins.

## Representative entities

**Dimensions**: DimPerson, DimDepartment, DimOffice, DimMatter, DimInvoiceContext, DimJobProfile, DimPayor, …

**Facts**: FactTimeRecord, FactMatterInvoice, FactTimeInvoice, FactChargeInvoice, FactExpenseInvoice, FactPitch, FactMatterInvoiceSnapshot, FactPersonForecast, FactPersonQualification, FactPersonWorkingArrangement, FactPersonCapacity, …

**Bridges**: BridgePersonLanguage, BridgePitchCapability, …

## Orchestration trigger

ADF trigger **Event Grid - Curation Stage Complete - Refresh Worker Data Mart** listens for `data-platform/Orchestration/CurationStageComplete/CURATED` — WDM refresh chains off curated completion events.

## Migration / testing

`8 - Platform Migration/Data Product Migration Checks/Worker Data Mart/` contains validation README and entity tests.

## Agent tips

- WDM changes are high blast-radius — trace dependencies in contracts first.
- Prefer matching existing SCD / dimension patterns in sibling notebooks.
- Classification fields on columns matter for GDPR (encrypt, etc.).

## Gold views (non-contracted)

Some objects in `workerdatamart` are **SQL views** created directly in the gold catalog and are **not** defined in `metadata/contracts/` or deployment notebooks. See [[projects/data-platform-dlz/entities/factpersoncalendar]] for `factpersoncalendar` — a person×date calendar with holidays, leave, and Nexthink attendance flags.

## BigHand person facts (2026-07-07 — current)

Three BigHand-sourced **person facts** live in WorkerDataMart with `FactPerson*` entity codes (phase 2 rename complete; decommission validated in dev):

| Entity | CURATED table | MODEL view | Dev rows (2026-07-07) |
|--------|---------------|------------|----------------------:|
| `FactPersonForecast` | `curated_factpersonforecast` | — (deferred) | 8,239 |
| `FactPersonQualification` | `curated_factpersonqualification` | `WorkerDataMart.FactPersonQualification` | 1,006 |
| `FactPersonWorkingArrangement` | `curated_factpersonworkingarrangement` | — (deferred) | 2,945 |

**Composite MODEL view:** `WorkerDataMart.FactPersonCapacity` — person×date capacity (179,584 rows); joins forecast + working arrangement curated facts.

Contracts: `metadata/contracts/data-products/WorkerDataMart/FactPerson*.json`. Notebooks: `3 - ENRICHED/Worker Data Mart/Enriched - Worker Data Mart - Fact - Person *.py`, matching CURATED and MODEL paths.

ENRICHED temp: `gold.temp.enriched_workerdatamart_factperson*`. BigHand product retains **Offices** only (`silver.temp.enriched_bighand_offices`).

Migration narrative: [[projects/data-platform-dlz/synthesis/bighand-to-workerdatamart-migration-2026-07]] (phase 1) → [[projects/data-platform-dlz/synthesis/wdm-person-fact-rename-and-decommission-2026-07]] (phase 2 + decommission).

---

## Current architecture (supersedes post-migration section below)

| Entity | Product | Type | Terminal output |
|--------|---------|------|-----------------|
| `FactPersonForecast` | **WorkerDataMart** | Fact | `workerdatamart.curated_factpersonforecast` |
| `FactPersonQualification` | **WorkerDataMart** | Fact | `workerdatamart.curated_factpersonqualification` + MODEL `FactPersonQualification` |
| `FactPersonWorkingArrangement` | **WorkerDataMart** | Fact | `workerdatamart.curated_factpersonworkingarrangement` |
| `FactPersonCapacity` | **WorkerDataMart** | MODEL view | `workerdatamart.factpersoncapacity` (composite) |
| `Offices` | **BigHand** | Enriched Dataset | `silver.temp.enriched_bighand_offices` |

### Notebook locations (current)

| Stage | Path |
|-------|------|
| API ingest | `11 - Ingestion/Ingest BigHand.py` |
| ENRICHED facts | `3 - ENRICHED/Worker Data Mart/Enriched - Worker Data Mart - Fact - Person {Forecast\|Qualification\|Working Arrangement}.py` |
| CURATED facts | `4 - CURATED/Worker Data Mart/Curated - Worker Data Mart - Fact - Person *.py` |
| ENRICHED Offices | `3 - ENRICHED/BigHand/Enriched - BigHand - Enriched Dataset - Offices.py` |
| MODEL | `5 - MODEL/Worker Data Mart/Model - Worker Data Mart - Fact - Person {Qualification\|Capacity}.py` |
| Metastore DDL | `Create CURATED Metastore Tables - WorkerDataMart - BigHand Facts.py` |
| Legacy cleanup | `9 - Pre Deployment/Decommission Legacy BigHand Gold Curated.py` — **run manually after validation** (completed dev 2026-07-07) |

### Deploy sequence

| Order | Pipeline | Notes |
|------:|----------|-------|
| 1 | **Metadata** | Can run parallel with Transformation |
| 2 | **Transformation** | Notebook sync only |
| 3 | **Unity Catalog** | **Never** parallel with Transformation |
| 4 | **Main Orchestrator** | Load ENRICHED → CURATED |
| 5 | **Run All Model Views** | If not in UC run |
| 6 | Validate counts on `curated_factperson*` | See [[projects/data-platform-dlz/synthesis/wdm-person-fact-rename-and-decommission-2026-07#Dev validation (2026-07-07)]] |
| 7 | **Manual decommission** | Only after validation |

### Validation SQL (current)

```sql
SELECT 'forecast' AS t, COUNT(*) FROM `fbd-d-uks-data-dlz-dbw-gold`.workerdatamart.curated_factpersonforecast
UNION ALL
SELECT 'qualification', COUNT(*) FROM `fbd-d-uks-data-dlz-dbw-gold`.workerdatamart.curated_factpersonqualification
UNION ALL
SELECT 'working_arr', COUNT(*) FROM `fbd-d-uks-data-dlz-dbw-gold`.workerdatamart.curated_factpersonworkingarrangement;
```

---

## Phase 2: Person fact renames & decommission (2026-07-07)

After phase 1 schema migration, interim names (`FactForecasts`, `curated_factforecasts`, etc.) were renamed to align with WDM person-fact convention:

| Interim | Final |
|---------|-------|
| `FactForecasts` | `FactPersonForecast` |
| `FactQualifications` | `FactPersonQualification` |
| `FactWorkingArrangements` | `FactPersonWorkingArrangement` |

`FactPersonCapacity` MODEL view moved to `workerdatamart` schema with PascalCase columns and `CalendarDateKey`. Commit `45d8018e`. ADF + manual decommission validated in dev.

**Full detail:** [[projects/data-platform-dlz/synthesis/wdm-person-fact-rename-and-decommission-2026-07]].

## Completed (2026-07-07)

- **BigHand → WDM migration (dev)** — phase 1 + phase 2 complete. `FactPerson*` entities live; legacy `gold.bighand` curated facts decommissioned. Hub: [[projects/data-platform-dlz/synthesis/wdm-person-fact-rename-and-decommission-2026-07]].

## Key takeaways (added 2026-07-07 PM)

- **Final entity codes:** `FactPersonForecast`, `FactPersonQualification`, `FactPersonWorkingArrangement` — not `FactForecasts` (interim) or `FactWorkerAvailability`.
- **`FactPersonCapacity`** is a WDM MODEL view in `workerdatamart` schema with PascalCase columns and `CalendarDateKey`.
- **Deploy order:** Metadata ∥ Transformation → Unity Catalog (alone) → Main Orchestrator → validate → manual decommission.

arguments.content:
# Agent Toolkit and Rules

[[projects/data-platform-dlz/data-platform-dlz|← Index]]

## Start here every session

1. **Wiki bootstrap (mandatory)** — follow `.cursor/rules/wiki-first.mdc`: MCP `read_note` hub → `search_content` → read domain pages. Summarise wiki context before other tools.
2. Read **[[projects/data-platform-dlz/data-platform-dlz]]** if not already loaded.
3. Load `.cursor/rules/dlz-playbook.mdc` routing — pick the right tool domain.
4. Never modify **`framework/`** (vendor submodule).
5. User commits in IDE — agents **do not commit** unless explicitly asked.

## Cursor rules map (`.cursor/rules/`)

| Rule | When it applies |
|------|-----------------|
| **`wiki-first.mdc`** | **Every session** — wiki bootstrap before repo/CLI (mandatory) |
| `dlz-playbook.mdc` | Master routing — Azure vs Databricks vs Postman vs git |
| `azure.mdc` / `azure-dlz.mdc` | All Azure work — MCP first |
| `azure-monitoring-dlz.mdc` | Dev error logs — Log Analytics + Databricks + ADF (multi-source) |
| `databricks.mdc` / `databricks-cli-local.mdc` | Notebooks, UC, SQL, jobs — `--profile dlz-dev` |
| `postman.mdc` / `postman-mcp-local.mdc` | BigHand, 3E, APIM HTTP APIs |
| `git.mdc` | develop branch, no agent commits |
| `local-toolchain.mdc` | CLIs, MCP servers, skills list |
| `obsidian-local.mdc` | WorkStuff vault — **MCP only** (no filesystem access) |

## MCP servers

| Server | ID | Use |
|--------|-----|-----|
| Azure | `plugin-azure-azure` | Subs, RG, storage, ADF, KV, monitor |
| Postman | `plugin-postman-postman` | API collections — read tool schema first |
| Obsidian | `user-obsidian` | WorkStuff vault — **only** way to read/write/search wiki |

## Databricks skills (read before implementing)

1. `databricks-core` — always first
2. Then: `databricks-jobs`, `databricks-pipelines`, `databricks-dabs` as needed

## Common commands

```bash
# Databricks — every call needs profile
databricks current-user me --profile dlz-dev
databricks experimental aitools tools discover-schema <cat>.<schema>.<table> --profile dlz-dev

# SQL via API (no databricks sql subcommand)
databricks api post /api/2.0/sql/statements --profile dlz-dev --json '{...}'
```

## Repo scripts

Full PowerShell inventory with CI invokers: [[projects/data-platform-dlz/skills/repo-scripts-inventory]].

## Postman (DLZ)

Collection IDs, workspace, and auth status: [[projects/data-platform-dlz/skills/cursor-plugins-and-tooling-status#Postman plugin (`plugin-postman-postman`)]]. Routing rules: `postman.mdc`.

## Hard constraints (coding standards)

- **Never edit `Framework/`**
- Use Framework only via supported public interfaces (`DataContractService`, `%run` core)
- Match existing notebook patterns in the same product folder
- Request `network` permission for Azure MCP, `az`, Databricks CLI

## Obsidian vault (WorkStuff) — MCP only

| Path | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `projects/data-platform-dlz/` | DLZ platform wiki — start at [[projects/data-platform-dlz/data-platform-dlz]] |
| `references/awesome-databricks/` | Curated Databricks learning links |
| `skills/`, `concepts/`, `entities/` | Global wiki knowledge |
| `journal/` | Personal notes |
| `Attachments/` | PDFs, PPTX — user adds binaries manually; link with `[[Attachments/Databricks Asset Bundles.pptx]]` |

**All** wiki read, search, and write via **`user-obsidian` MCP** (`CallMcpTool`). Agents must **not** use filesystem tools (`Read`, `Grep`, `Glob`, `Write`) on vault paths. See `obsidian-local.mdc` and `wiki-first.mdc`. If MCP fails: retry once → prompt user to fix MCP — **no filesystem fallback**.

## When stuck

| Problem | Action |
|---------|--------|
| Azure auth | `az login` + correct subscription → retry MCP |
| Databricks auth | `databricks auth login` for `dlz-dev` |
| Postman 401 | Cursor Settings → MCP → postman API key |
| Obsidian MCP down | Settings → MCP → obsidian; reload window; **do not** read vault via filesystem |
| Wrong subscription | Use `ec181bdf` — see [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/azure-and-dlz-environment]]; not `8c66c246` |
| Recent errors / failed runs | [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/monitoring-and-error-logs]] — LA + Databricks + ADF |
| Wrong workspace URL | Use host in [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/azure-and-dlz-environment]], not `.env` |
| Entity dependencies | Read contract JSON `dependencies[]` before running notebooks |

## Databricks AI-tools gotchas (verified 2026-06-29)

`databricks experimental aitools tools` is the quickest way to inspect live data, but the identifier handling is fiddly:

| Symptom | Cause | Fix |
|---------|-------|-----|
| `expected CATALOG.SCHEMA.TABLE` | `discover-schema` needs a **three-part** name | Pass `<catalog>.<schema>.<table>` |
| `INVALID_IDENTIFIER ... must be back quoted` | DLZ catalogs contain hyphens (`fbd-d-uks-data-dlz-dbw-gold`); `discover-schema` does **not** backquote them | Don't use `discover-schema` for hyphenated catalogs |

**Reliable pattern** — use `query` instead (gold is the default catalog, so two-part names work):

```bash
# list tables in a gold schema
databricks experimental aitools tools query "SHOW TABLES IN workerdatamart LIKE '*calendar*'" --profile dlz-dev

# inspect a table or view (incl. full VIEW SQL under 'View Text')
databricks experimental aitools tools query "DESCRIBE TABLE EXTENDED workerdatamart.factpersoncalendar" --profile dlz-dev
```

`DESCRIBE TABLE EXTENDED` on a view returns the complete `View Text` — useful for gold views not fully represented in repo contracts.

## Cursor plugins and MCP (2026-06-30)

See **[[projects/data-platform-dlz/skills/cursor-plugins-and-tooling-status]]** for validated plugin health, removed MCP servers, and the **ec181bdf vs 8c66c246** subscription bottom-out.

**Quick ref:** Azure plugin ✅ (use sub `ec181bdf`), Databricks Skills ✅, Postman ✅, Obsidian MCP ✅. User `mcp.json` = Obsidian only. Dev error logs: [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/monitoring-and-error-logs]].

# BigHand Data Product

[[projects/data-platform-dlz/data-platform-dlz|← Index]] | **Gold inventory:** [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/bighand-gold-layer-exploration]] | Ingestion: [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/api-ingestion-notebooks]] | Person facts: [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/worker-data-mart]] | Naming: [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/dlz-naming-and-schema-conventions]]

## Summary

**BigHand** is a DLZ **ingestion source** (`bighand`) and a small **data product** that retains one entity only: **Offices** (Enriched Dataset → `silver.temp`).

Three person-level facts and one office-level holiday fact sourced from BigHand BASE tables are **WorkerDataMart** entities (`FactPersonForecast`, `FactPersonQualification`, `FactPersonWorkingArrangement`, `FactPublicHoliday`) with CURATED tables in `gold.workerdatamart` and MODEL views including `FactPersonQualification`, `FactPersonCapacity`, and `FactPublicHoliday`.

## Current entity catalogue

| Entity | Product | Type | Terminal output |
|--------|---------|------|-----------------|
| `Offices` | **BigHand** | Enriched Dataset | `silver.temp.enriched_bighand_offices` |
| `FactPersonForecast` | **WorkerDataMart** | Fact | `workerdatamart.curated_factpersonforecast` |
| `FactPersonQualification` | **WorkerDataMart** | Fact | `workerdatamart.curated_factpersonqualification` + MODEL `FactPersonQualification` |
| `FactPersonWorkingArrangement` | **WorkerDataMart** | Fact | `workerdatamart.curated_factpersonworkingarrangement` |
| `FactPublicHoliday` | **WorkerDataMart** | Fact | `workerdatamart.curated_factpublicholiday` + MODEL `FactPublicHoliday` |
| — | **WorkerDataMart** | MODEL view | `workerdatamart.factpersoncapacity` (composite person×date) |

Ingestion BASE (silver): `bighand.bighand_forecasts`, `bighand_offices`, `bighand_qualifications`, `bighand_workingarrangements`, `bighand_publicholidays` (5 tables).

## Architecture

```mermaid
flowchart LR
  subgraph ingest [Ingestion]
    ADF["ADF: Task - Ingest BigHand"]
    NB["Ingest BigHand.py"]
    RAW["ADLS RAW"]
  end
  subgraph silver [silver]
    BASE["bighand.bighand_*"]
    OFF_TEMP["temp.enriched_bighand_offices"]
  end
  subgraph gold [gold]
    WDM_ENR["temp.enriched_workerdatamart_factperson*|factpublicholiday"]
    WDM_CUR["workerdatamart.curated_factperson*|factpublicholiday"]
    VIEWS["factpersonqualification / factpersoncapacity / factpublicholiday"]
  end

  ADF --> NB --> RAW --> BASE
  BASE --> OFF_TEMP
  BASE --> WDM_ENR --> WDM_CUR --> VIEWS
```

| Stage | BigHand product (Offices) | WDM facts |
|-------|-------------------------|-----------|
| **Ingestion** | API → RAW via ADF + `Ingest BigHand.py` | Same BASE tables; `PublicHolidays` dual-year GETs |
| **RAW→BASE** | `RAW to BASE - Default` | Same |
| **ENRICHED** | Cast/prune → `silver.temp` | PersonKey / office fan-out / DateKey → `gold.temp` |
| **CURATED** | — (terminal at ENRICHED) | Mechanical load → `workerdatamart.curated_*` |
| **MODEL** | — | Hand-authored views in `workerdatamart` |

### PersonKey join (WDM ENRICHED person facts)

```sql
INNER JOIN `{GoldCatalog}`.workerdatamart.curated_dimperson dp
  ON bh.<employeeId column> = dp.EmployeeId
 AND dp.is_current = 1
 AND lower(dp.Source) = 'workday'
INNER JOIN `{GoldCatalog}`.workerdatamart.curated_dimoffice o
  ON lower(o.OfficeId) = lower(dp.PrimaryOfficeId)
 AND o.is_current = 1
 AND lower(o.Source) = 'workday'
 AND o.OfficeRegionCode NOT IN ('CE', 'UK and Ireland')
```

Use `lower()` on office IDs. Join `curated_dimperson`, not MODEL `DimPerson` views. **UK/EU filter does not apply to `FactPublicHoliday`** (office holidays).

### FactPublicHoliday grain and fan-out

- **Grain:** `DateKey` + `OfficeKey` + `HolidayName`
- National holidays (`regionIsoCode` null/empty) match all BigHand offices in that country; regional require exact region match
- Holidays with **no office match are discarded**; DateKey from `curated_dimdate`; OfficeKey from current Workday `curated_dimoffice`
- Dual-year ingest: `GET PublicHolidays/{currentYear}/` + `GET PublicHolidays/{nextYear}/`, then dedupe

## Contracts

| Scope | Path |
|-------|------|
| Source system | `metadata/contracts/ingestion/bighand/` |
| BigHand product | `metadata/contracts/data-products/BigHand/` (`Offices` only) |
| WDM facts | `metadata/contracts/data-products/WorkerDataMart/FactPerson*.json`, `FactPublicHoliday.json` |
| CSV sources | `metadata/contracts/scripts/ingestion/bighand-*.csv`, `.../data-products/BigHand-*.csv`, WDM entity/column CSV rows |

Regenerate ingestion JSON: `metadata/contracts/scripts/ingestion/Generate-DataContractsFromSchemaCSV.py` (local dev) or PowerShell `Generate-DataContractsFromSchemaCSV.ps1` (CI).

## Repo artifacts

### Ingestion (ADF)

| Artifact | Role |
|----------|------|
| `ingestion/.../pipeline/Task - Ingest BigHand.json` | ADF task → Databricks notebook |
| `ingestion/.../linkedService/BigHand_Source.json` | REST linked service (KV secrets) |
| `ingestion/.../dataset/BigHand_Source.json` | Dataset for BigHand API |
| `Child - Ingest Data.json` | Routes `BigHand API` → `Task - Ingest BigHand` |

### Databricks notebooks

| Stage | Path |
|-------|------|
| API ingest | `11 - Ingestion/Ingest BigHand.py` |
| ENRICHED Offices | `3 - ENRICHED/BigHand/Enriched - BigHand - Enriched Dataset - Offices.py` |
| ENRICHED facts | `3 - ENRICHED/Worker Data Mart/Enriched - Worker Data Mart - Fact - Person {Forecast\|Qualification\|Working Arrangement}.py`, `... Public Holiday.py` |
| CURATED facts | `4 - CURATED/Worker Data Mart/Curated - Worker Data Mart - Fact - Person *.py`, `... Public Holiday.py` |
| MODEL | `estilo - MODEL/Worker Data Mart/Model - Worker Data Mart - Fact - Person {Qualification\|Capacity}.py`, `... Public Holiday.py` |
| BASE DDL | `1 - Post Deployment/Create BASE Metastore Tables - bighand.py` |
| CURATED DDL | `1 - Post Deployment/Create CURATED Metastore Tables - WorkerDataMart - BigHand Facts.py` |

Post-deploy orchestrators `%run` the BASE and CURATED DDL children from `Create BASE Metastore Tables.py` and `Create CURATED Metastore Tables.py`. MODEL notebooks register in `Run All Model Views.py`.

## Deploy sequence

| Order | Pipeline | Notes |
|------:|----------|-------|
| 1 | **Metadata** | Contracts → SQL orchestration; can run parallel with Transformation |
| 2 | **Transformation** | `import-dir` notebooks to `/Data Platform` |
| 3 | **Unity Catalog** | Post-deploy DDL (~45 min); **never** parallel with Transformation |
| 4 | **Main Orchestrator** | Load ENRICHED → CURATED |
| 5 | **Run All Model Views** | If not included in UC run |

Prerequisites: `DimPerson` / `DimOffice` / `DimDate` curated; BASE populated for all five `bighand_*` entities.

See [[projects/data-platform-dlz/skills/deployment-and-ci-cd]] for pipeline detail and [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/orchestration-and-adf]] for ADF chain.

## Validation SQL (dev reference)

```sql
-- WDM person + holiday facts
SELECT 'forecast' AS t, COUNT(*) FROM `fbd-d-uks-data-dlz-dbw-gold`.workerdatamart.curated_factpersonforecast
UNION ALL
SELECT 'qualification', COUNT(*) FROM `fbd-d-uks-data-dlz-dbw-gold`.workerdatamart.curated_factpersonqualification
UNION ALL
SELECT 'working_arr', COUNT(*) FROM `fbd-d-uks-data-dlz-dbw-gold`.workerdatamart.curated_factpersonworkingarrangement
UNION ALL
SELECT 'public_holiday', COUNT(*) FROM `fbd-d-uks-data-dlz-dbw-gold`.workerdatamart.curated_factpublicholiday;

-- Offices ENRICHED
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `fbd-d-uks-data-dlz-dbw-silver`.temp.enriched_bighand_offices;

-- MODEL views
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `fbd-d-uks-data-dlz-dbw-gold`.workerdatamart.factpersoncapacity;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `fbd-d-uks-data-dlz-dbw-gold`.workerdatamart.factpublicholiday;
```

## Related

- [[projects/data-platform-dlz/entities/source-systems#BigHand]] — source system contracts
- [[projects/data-platform-dlz/entities/data-products]] — product catalogue
- [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/curation-pipeline]] — Enriched Dataset vs Fact
- [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/metastore-schema-evolution]] — DDL guard, schema change handling
- [[projects/data-platform-dlz/skills/adf-debug-mode-monitoring]] — monitoring Main Orchestrator debug runs

# BigHand Data Product

[[projects/data-platform-dlz/data-platform-dlz|← Index]] | **Gold inventory:** [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/bighand-gold-layer-exploration]] | Ingestion: [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/api-ingestion-notebooks]] | Person facts: [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/worker-data-mart]] | Naming: [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/dlz-naming-and-schema-conventions]]

## Summary

**BigHand** is a DLZ **ingestion source** (`bighand`) and a small **data product** that retains one entity only: **Offices** (Enriched Dataset → `silver.temp`).

Three person-level facts and one office-level holiday fact sourced from BigHand BASE tables are **WorkerDataMart** entities (`FactPersonForecast`, `FactPersonQualification`, `FactPersonWorkingArrangement`, `FactPublicHoliday`) with CURATED tables in `gold.workerdatamart` and MODEL views including `FactPersonQualification`, `FactPersonCapacity`, and `FactPublicHoliday`.

## Current entity catalogue

| Entity | Product | Type | Terminal output |
|--------|---------|------|-----------------|
| `Offices` | **BigHand** | Enriched Dataset | `silver.temp.enriched_bighand_offices` |
| `FactPersonForecast` | **WorkerDataMart** | Fact | `workerdatamart.curated_factpersonforecast` |
| `FactPersonQualification` | **WorkerDataMart** | Fact | `workerdatamart.curated_factpersonqualification` + MODEL `FactPersonQualification` |
| `FactPersonWorkingArrangement` | **WorkerDataMart** | Fact | `workerdatamart.curated_factpersonworkingarrangement` |
| `FactPublicHoliday` | **WorkerDataMart** | Fact | `workerdatamart.curated_factpublicholiday` + MODEL `FactPublicHoliday` |
| — | **WorkerDataMart** | MODEL view | `workerdatamart.factpersoncapacity` (composite person×date) |

Ingestion BASE (silver): `bighand.bighand_forecasts`, `bighand_offices`, `bighand_qualifications`, `bighand_workingarrangements`, `bighand_publicholidays` (5 tables).

## Architecture

```mermaid
flowchart LR
  subgraph ingest [Ingestion]
    ADF["ADF: Task - Ingest BigHand"]
    NB["Ingest BigHand.py"]
    RAW["ADLS RAW"]
  end
  subgraph silver [silver]
    BASE["bighand.bighand_*"]
    OFF_TEMP["temp.enriched_bighand_offices"]
  end
  subgraph gold [gold]
    WDM_ENR["temp.enriched_workerdatamart_factperson*|factpublicholiday"]
    WDM_CUR["workerdatamart.curated_factperson*|factpublicholiday"]
    VIEWS["factpersonqualification / factpersoncapacity / factpublicholiday"]
  end

  ADF --> NB --> RAW --> BASE
  BASE --> OFF_TEMP
  BASE --> WDM_ENR --> WDM_CUR --> VIEWS
```

| Stage | BigHand product (Offices) | WDM facts |
|-------|-------------------------|-----------|
| **Ingestion** | API → RAW via ADF + `Ingest BigHand.py` | Same BASE tables; `PublicHolidays` dual-year GETs |
| **RAW→BASE** | `RAW to BASE - Default` | Same |
| **ENRICHED** | Cast/prune → `silver.temp` | PersonKey / office fan-out / DateKey → `gold.temp` |
| **CURATED** | — (terminal at ENRICHED) | Mechanical load → `workerdatamart.curated_*` |
| **MODEL** | — | Hand-authored views in `workerdatamart` |

### PersonKey join (WDM ENRICHED person facts)

```sql
INNER JOIN `{GoldCatalog}`.workerdatamart.curated_dimperson dp
  ON bh.<employeeId column> = dp.EmployeeId
 AND dp.is_current = 1
 AND lower(dp.Source) = 'workday'
INNER JOIN `{GoldCatalog}`.workerdatamart.curated_dimoffice o
  ON lower(o.OfficeId) = lower(dp.PrimaryOfficeId)
 AND o.is_current = 1
 AND lower(o.Source) = 'workday'
 AND o.OfficeRegionCode NOT IN ('CE', 'UK and Ireland')
```

Use `lower()` on office IDs. Join `curated_dimperson`, not MODEL `DimPerson` views. **UK/EU filter does not apply to `FactPublicHoliday`** (office holidays).

### FactPublicHoliday grain and fan-out

- **Grain:** `DateKey` + `OfficeKey` + `HolidayName`
- National holidays (`regionIsoCode` null/empty) match all BigHand offices in that country; regional require exact region match
- Holidays with **no office match are discarded**; DateKey from `curated_dimdate`; OfficeKey from current Workday `curated_dimoffice`
- Dual-year ingest: `GET PublicHolidays/{currentYear}/` + `GET PublicHolidays/{nextYear}/`, then dedupe

## Contracts

| Scope | Path |
|-------|------|
| Source system | `metadata/contracts/ingestion/bighand/` |
| BigHand product | `metadata/contracts/data-products/BigHand/` (`Offices` only) |
| WDM facts | `metadata/contracts/data-products/WorkerDataMart/FactPerson*.json`, `FactPublicHoliday.json` |
| CSV sources | `metadata/contracts/scripts/ingestion/bighand-*.csv`, `.../data-products/BigHand-*.csv`, WDM entity/column CSV rows |

Regenerate ingestion JSON: `metadata/contracts/scripts/ingestion/Generate-DataContractsFromSchemaCSV.py` (local dev) or PowerShell `Generate-DataContractsFromSchemaCSV.ps1` (CI).

## Repo artifacts

### Ingestion (ADF)

| Artifact | Role |
|----------|------|
| `ingestion/.../pipeline/Task - Ingest BigHand.json` | ADF task → Databricks notebook |
| `ingestion/.../linkedService/BigHand_Source.json` | REST linked service (KV secrets) |
| `ingestion/.../dataset/BigHand_Source.json` | Dataset for BigHand API |
| `Child - Ingest Data.json` | Routes `BigHand API` → `Task - Ingest BigHand` |

### Databricks notebooks

| Stage | Path |
|-------|------|
| API ingest | `11 - Ingestion/Ingest BigHand.py` |
| ENRICHED Offices | `3 - ENRICHED/BigHand/Enriched - BigHand - Enriched Dataset - Offices.py` |
| ENRICHED facts | `3 - ENRICHED/Worker Data Mart/Enriched - Worker Data Mart - Fact - Person {Forecast\|Qualification\|Working Arrangement}.py`, `... Public Holiday.py` |
| CURATED facts | `4 - CURATED/Worker Data Mart/Curated - Worker Data Mart - Fact - Person *.py`, `... Public Holiday.py` |
| MODEL | `5 - MODEL/Worker Data Mart/Model - Worker Data Mart - Fact - Person {Qualification\|Capacity}.py`, `... Public Holiday.py` |
| BASE DDL | `1 - Post Deployment/Create BASE Metastore Tables - bighand.py` |
| CURATED DDL | `1 - Post Deployment/Create CURATED Metastore Tables - WorkerDataMart - BigHand Facts.py` |

Post-deploy orchestrators `%run` the BASE and CURATED DDL children from `Create BASE Metastore Tables.py` and `Create CURATED Metastore Tables.py`. MODEL notebooks register in `Run All Model Views.py`.

## Deploy sequence

| Order | Pipeline | Notes |
|------:|----------|-------|
| 1 | **Metadata** | Contracts → SQL orchestration; can run parallel with Transformation |
| 2 | **Transformation** | `import-dir` notebooks to `/Data Platform` |
| 3 | **Unity Catalog** | Post-deploy DDL (~45 min); **never** parallel with Transformation |
| 4 | **Main Orchestrator** | Load ENRICHED → CURATED |
| 5 | **Run All Model Views** | If not included in UC run |

Prerequisites: `DimPerson` / `DimOffice` / `DimDate` curated; BASE populated for all five `bighand_*` entities.

See [[projects/data-platform-dlz/skills/deployment-and-ci-cd]] for pipeline detail and [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/orchestration-and-adf]] for ADF chain.

## Validation SQL (dev reference)

```sql
-- WDM person + holiday facts
SELECT 'forecast' AS t, COUNT(*) FROM `fbd-d-uks-data-dlz-dbw-gold`.workerdatamart.curated_factpersonforecast
UNION ALL
SELECT 'qualification', COUNT(*) FROM `fbd-d-uks-data-dlz-dbw-gold`.workerdatamart.curated_factpersonqualification
UNION ALL
SELECT 'working_arr', COUNT(*) FROM `fbd-d-uks-data-dlz-dbw-gold`.workerdatamart.curated_factpersonworkingarrangement
UNION ALL
SELECT 'public_holiday', COUNT(*) FROM `fbd-d-uks-data-dlz-dbw-gold`.workerdatamart.curated_factpublicholiday;

-- Offices ENRICHED
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `fbd-d-uks-data-dlz-dbw-silver`.temp.enriched_bighand_offices;

-- MODEL views
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `fbd-d-uks-data-dlz-dbw-gold`.workerdatamart.factpersoncapacity;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `fbd-d-uks-data-dlz-dbw-gold`.workerdatamart.factpublicholiday;
```

- Dual-year ingest: `GET PublicHolidays/{currentYear}/` + `GET PublicHolidays/{nextYear}/`, then dedupe

## Contracts

| Scope | Path |
|-------|------|
| Source system | `metadata/contracts/ingestion/bighand/` |
| BigHand product | `metadata/contracts/data-products/BigHand/` (`Offices` only) |
| WDM facts | `metadata/contracts/data-products/WorkerDataMart/FactPerson*.json`, `FactPublicHoliday.json` |
| CSV sources | `metadata/contracts/scripts/ingestion/bighand-*.csv`, `.../data-products/BigHand-*.csv`, WDM entity/column CSV rows |

Regenerate ingestion JSON: `metadata/contracts/scripts/ingestion/Generate-DataContractsFromSchemaCSV.py` (local dev) or PowerShell `Generate-DataContractsFromSchemaCSV.ps1` (CI).

## Repo artifacts

### Ingestion (ADF)

| Artifact | Role |
|----------|------|
| `ingestion/.../pipeline/Task - Ingest BigHand.json` | ADF task → Databricks notebook |
| `ingestion/.../linkedService/BigHand_Source.json` | REST linked service (KV secrets) |
| `ingestion/.../dataset/BigHand_Source.json` | Dataset for BigHand API |
| `Child - Ingest Data.json` | Routes `BigHand API` → `Task - Ingest BigHand` |

### Databricks notebooks

| Stage | Path |
|-------|------|
| API ingest | `11 - Ingestion/Ingest BigHand.py` |
| ENRICHED Offices | `3 - ENRICHED/BigHand/Enriched - BigHand - Enriched Dataset - Offices.py` |
| ENRICHED facts | `3 - ENRICHED/Worker Data Mart/Enriched - Worker Data Mart - Fact - Person {Forecast\|Qualification\|Working Arrangement}.py`, `... Public Holiday.py` |
| CURATED facts | `4 - CURATED/Worker Data Mart/Curated - Worker Data Mart - Fact - Person *.py`, `... Public Holiday.py` |
| MODEL | `5 - MODEL/Worker Data Mart/Model - Worker Data Mart - Fact - Person {Qualification\|Capacity}.py`, `... Public Holiday.py` |
| BASE DDL | `1 - Post Deployment/Create BASE Metastore Tables - bighand.py` |
| CURATED DDL | `1 - Post Deployment/Create CURATED Metastore Tables - WorkerDataMart - BigHand Facts.py` |

Post-deploy orchestrators `%run` the BASE and CURATED DDL children from `Create BASE Metastore Tables.py` and `Create CURATED Metastore Tables.py`. MODEL notebooks register in `Run All Model Views.py`.

## Deploy sequence

| Order | Pipeline | Notes |
|------:|----------|-------|
| 1 | **Metadata** | Contracts → SQL orchestration; can run parallel with Transformation |
| 2 | **Transformation** | `import-dir` notebooks to `/Data Platform` |
| 3 | **Unity Catalog** | Post-deploy DDL (~45 min); **never** parallel with Transformation |
| 4 | **Main Orchestrator** | Load ENRICHED → CURATED |
| 5 | **Run All Model Views** | If not included in UC run |

Prerequisites: `DimPerson` / `DimOffice` / `DimDate` curated; BASE populated for all five `bighand_*` entities.

See [[projects/data-platform-dlz/skills/deployment-and-ci-cd]] for pipeline detail and [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/orchestration-and-adf]] for ADF chain.

## Validation SQL (dev reference)

```sql
-- WDM person + holiday facts
SELECT 'forecast' AS t, COUNT(*) FROM `fbd-d-uks-data-dlz-dbw-gold`.workerdatamart.curated_factpersonforecast
UNION ALL
SELECT 'qualification', COUNT(*) FROM `fbd-d-uks-data-dlz-dbw-gold`.workerdatamart.curated_factpersonqualification
UNION ALL
SELECT 'working_arr', COUNT(*) FROM `fbd-d-uks-data-dlz-dbw-gold`.workerdatamart.curated_factpersonworkingarrangement
UNION ALL
SELECT 'public_holiday', COUNT(*) FROM `fbd-d-uks-data-dlz-dbw-gold`.workerdatamart.curated_factpublicholiday;

-- Offices ENRICHED
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `fbd-d-uks-data-dlz-dbw-silver`.temp.enriched_bighand_offices;

-- MODEL views
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `fbd-d-uks-data-dlz-dbw-gold`.workerdatamart.factpersoncapacity;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `fbd-d-uks-data-dlz-dbw-gold`.workerdatamart.factpublicholiday;
```

## Related

- [[projects/data-platform-dlz/entities/data-products]] — product catalogue
- [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/curation-pipeline]] — Enriched Dataset vs Fact
- [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/metastore-schema-evolution]] — DDL guard, schema change handling

arguments.content:
# DLZ Naming and Schema Conventions

[[projects/data-platform-dlz/data-platform-dlz|← Index]] | WDM overview: [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/worker-data-mart]] | BigHand hub: [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/bighand-data-product]]

> Authoritative naming rules for gold `workerdatamart` objects. When in doubt, follow **Worker Data Mart (WDM)** patterns — not source-system naming.

## Executive rules

| Rule | Meaning | Example |
|------|---------|---------|
| **No camelCase in datamart** | Curated tables and MODEL views use PascalCase business attributes, `*Key` surrogates, snake_case ETL metadata | `PersonKey`, `CommitmentDateKey`, `CommitmentHours` |
| **No product/source names in datamart** | `workerdatamart` holds functional dimensional objects | `curated_factpersonforecast`, `FactPersonCapacity` |
| **Gold schemas = data products** | Consumer-facing gold groupings follow data product boundaries | WDM facts in `workerdatamart`; Offices in `silver.temp` under BigHand product |
| **Data in `temp`** | ENRICHED checkpoints land in `temp` — not consumer schemas | `gold.temp.enriched_workerdatamart_factpersonforecast` |
| **Views in `workerdatamart`** | MODEL views for WDM entities live in `workerdatamart` schema | `WorkerDataMart.FactPersonCapacity` |
| **Functional entity codes** | Type prefix + functional name | `FactPersonForecast`, `FactPersonQualification`, `DimPerson` |

---

## Catalog and schema placement

| Catalog | Typical schemas | What lives here |
|---------|-----------------|-----------------|
| **silver** | `bighand`, other sources | BASE tables — mirror source field names |
| **gold** | `temp`, `workerdatamart`, `canonicalmodel` | ENRICHED checkpoints, CURATED tables, MODEL views |

### Medallion → schema mapping (WDM Fact path)

```mermaid
flowchart TB
  subgraph silver [silver]
    BASE["bighand.bighand_forecasts"]
  end
  subgraph gold [gold]
    TEMP["temp.enriched_workerdatamart_factpersonforecast"]
    CUR["workerdatamart.curated_factpersonforecast"]
    VIEW["workerdatamart.factpersoncapacity"]
  end
  BASE -->|ENRICHED| TEMP
  TEMP -->|CURATED| CUR
  CUR -->|MODEL| VIEW
```

| Stage | Catalog | Schema | Object pattern |
|-------|---------|--------|----------------|
| **BASE** | silver | `{sourcesystem}` | `{sourcesystem}_{entity}` lowercase |
| **ENRICHED** | gold | `temp` | `enriched_{dataproduct}_{entity}` lowercase |
| **CURATED** | gold | `workerdatamart` | `curated_{entitycode}` lowercase |
| **MODEL** | gold | `workerdatamart` | `{EntityCode}` PascalCase view |

**Exception — Enriched Dataset:** terminal ENRICHED only, often `silver.temp` (e.g. BigHand `Offices` → `temp.enriched_bighand_offices`).

---

## Naming patterns

### Physical tables

| Layer | Pattern | BigHand-sourced example |
|-------|---------|-------------------------|
| Silver BASE | `` `{silver}`.{sourcesystem}.{sourcesystem}_{entity} `` | `bighand.bighand_forecasts` |
| Gold ENRICHED temp | `` `{gold}`.temp.enriched_{dataproduct}_{entity} `` | `temp.enriched_workerdatamart_factpersonforecast` |
| Gold CURATED | `` `{gold}`.workerdatamart.curated_{entitycode} `` | `workerdatamart.curated_factpersonforecast` |

### MODEL views

| Element | Convention | Example |
|---------|------------|---------|
| SQL `CREATE VIEW` schema | PascalCase data product | `CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW WorkerDataMart.FactPersonCapacity` |
| UC physical schema | lowercase | `workerdatamart.factpersoncapacity` |
| Notebook path | `5 - MODEL/Worker Data Mart/Model - Worker Data Mart - Fact - {Entity}.py` | `Model - Worker Data Mart - Fact - Person Capacity.py` |
| Registration | `Run All Model Views.py` | Adjacent to related views |

### ADLS paths

| Stage | Pattern |
|-------|---------|
| BASE | `{DATALAKE}/BASE/General/{SourceSystem}/{entityCode}/delta/` |
| CURATED | `{DATALAKE}/CURATED/General/{DataProduct}/{EntityCode}/delta/` |

Example: `/CURATED/General/WorkerDataMart/FactPersonForecast/delta/`

### Notebook naming

| Stage | Pattern |
|-------|---------|
| ENRICHED | `Enriched - Worker Data Mart - Fact - {Entity}.py` |
| CURATED | `Curated - Worker Data Mart - Fact - {Entity}.py` |
| MODEL | `Model - Worker Data Mart - Fact - {Entity}.py` |
| Post-deploy DDL | `Create CURATED Metastore Tables - WorkerDataMart - BigHand Facts.py` |

Spaced entity names (e.g. contract `name` = `Public Holiday`) produce notebook filenames with spaces: `... Fact - Public Holiday.py`. Keep CSV `ENTITY_NAME` aligned or autogen creates duplicate skeletons.

---

## BigHand-sourced WDM facts (reference)

| Entity code | ENRICHED temp | CURATED table | MODEL view |
|-------------|---------------|---------------|------------|
| `FactPersonForecast` | `temp.enriched_workerdatamart_factpersonforecast` | `curated_factpersonforecast` | — (deferred) |
| `FactPersonQualification` | `temp.enriched_workerdatamart_factpersonqualification` | `curated_factpersonqualification` | `FactPersonQualification` |
| `FactPersonWorkingArrangement` | `temp.enriched_workerdatamart_factpersonworkingarrangement` | `curated_factpersonworkingarrangement` | — (deferred) |
| `FactPublicHoliday` | `temp.enriched_workerdatamart_factpublicholiday` | `curated_factpublicholiday` | `FactPublicHoliday` |
| — | — | — | `FactPersonCapacity` (composite) |

**BigHand product retains:** `Offices` → `silver.temp.enriched_bighand_offices`; silver BASE five `bighand.bighand_*` tables (including `bighand_publicholidays`).

---

## Pipeline responsibilities

| Layer | Joins? | Writes to | Reads from |
|-------|--------|-----------|------------|
| ENRICHED | **Yes** | `temp.enriched_*` | Silver BASE + `workerdatamart.curated_dim*` |
| CURATED | **No** | `workerdatamart.curated_*` | `temp.enriched_*` |
| MODEL | **Yes** (view SQL) | `CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW` | `workerdatamart.curated_*` |

---

## Contract and orchestration alignment

- Entity **must** live in the data product whose schema autogen emits — `WorkerDataMart-EntityMetadata.csv` rows drive `workerdatamart` DDL.
- Dependencies example: `BASE~bighand~bighand_forecasts~Hard` + Soft `CURATED~WorkerDataMart~DimPerson~Soft`.
- `isModelViewEnabled: false` on WDM entities — MODEL views are hand-authored.

---

## Validation SQL

```sql
SHOW TABLES IN `fbd-d-uks-data-dlz-dbw-gold`.workerdatamart LIKE 'curated_factperson%';
SHOW TABLES IN `fbd-d-uks-data-dlz-dbw-gold`.temp LIKE 'enriched_workerdatamart_factperson%';

SELECT table_schema, table_name, table_type
FROM `fbd-d-uks-data-dlz-dbw-gold`.information_schema.tables
WHERE table_name IN ('factpersoncapacity', 'factpersonqualification', 'factpublicholiday');
```

---

## Related

- [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/bighand-data-product]] — operational hub
- [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/bighand-gold-layer-exploration]] — gold inventory
- [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/worker-data-mart]] — WDM product overview
- [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/curation-pipeline]] — Enriched Dataset vs Fact
- [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/contract-generation-pipeline]] — autogen naming must match CSV entity codes
- [[projects/data-platform-dlz/entities/factpersoncalendar]] — reference Fact pattern

# API Ingestion Notebooks

[[projects/data-platform-dlz/data-platform-dlz|← Index]]

## Summary

Two API ingestion notebooks in `11 - Ingestion/` pull data directly into RAW via Databricks (not ADF copy activities). ADF invokes them through **Task - Execute Databricks Notebook** from `Task - Ingest BigHand` / `Task - Ingest Collibra`.

## Ingest BigHand (`Ingest BigHand.py`)

| Aspect | Detail |
|--------|--------|
| Auth | POST `{baseUrl}/Authenticate` with `ClientSecret` → bearer token |
| Secrets | `dbutils.secrets.get("AzureKeyVaultSecrets", <widget-supplied name>)` for BaseUrl, ClientSecret |
| Data pull | REST API per contract `SourceQuery` widget |
| Landing | Single coalesced **JSON** file under `TargetFolderPath` |
| Logging | `logRowCount` with `curationStageCode="RAW"` |
| Postman | Collection **BigHand RM - PreProd** — see [[projects/data-platform-dlz/skills/agent-toolkit-and-rules]] |

Widgets: `BaseUrl-SecretName`, `ClientSecret-SecretName`, `SourceSystemCode`, `EntityCode`, `TargetFolderPath`, `SourceQuery`, `ProcessQueueId`, `ProcessInstanceId`.

### SourceQuery special cases

| `SourceQuery` (stripped) | Behaviour |
|--------------------------|-----------|
| `Forecasts` | Appends ISO date range (tomorrow → +91 days) to URL |
| `Qualifications` | Prefixes `UserProfile/` |
| `PublicHolidays` | Two GETs: `PublicHolidays/{currentYear}/` and `PublicHolidays/{nextYear}/` (UTC), merge results, dedupe on `(name, date, countryIsoCode, regionIsoCode)` |
| other | Single GET: `{base}/{SourceQuery}` |

Fetch loop uses a `query_urls` list so multi-call entities share one RAW write.

## Ingest Collibra (`Ingest Collibra.py`)

| Aspect | Detail |
|--------|--------|
| Auth | OAuth2 `client_credentials` → `{baseUrl}/rest/oauth/v2/token` |
| Secrets | BaseUrl, ClientId, ClientSecret from KV via widget secret names |
| Data pull | Cursor pagination + `outputModule` export API |
| Landing | **Parquet** (all-string schema) under `TargetFolderPath` |
| Incremental | `LastJobCompletionDate` widget for watermarking |
| Logging | `logRowCount` with `curationStageCode="RAW"` |

## ADF invocation chain

```
Parent - Ingest Data
  → Task - Ingest BigHand / Task - Ingest Collibra
    → Task - Execute Databricks Notebook
      → /Data Platform/11 - Ingestion/Ingest {Source}.py
```

ADF passes secret name widgets (not literal URLs). Live URLs come from Key Vault via the **Secrets** pipeline. See [[projects/data-platform-dlz/skills/deployment-and-ci-cd#Changing a source's BaseURL — which pipeline to run]].

## Related

- [[projects/data-platform-dlz/entities/source-systems]] — BigHand and Collibra contracts
- [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/raw-to-base-patterns]] — RAW → BASE after landing
- [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/orchestration-and-adf]] — ingestion orchestration
- [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/bighand-data-product]] — Offices ENRICHED + WDM FactPerson* / FactPublicHoliday

# Hot Cache

## Current focus

- **BigHand / WDM** — [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/bighand-data-product]], [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/bighand-gold-layer-exploration]], [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/dlz-naming-and-schema-conventions]]
- Data Platform DLZ onboarding: [[projects/data-platform-dlz/data-platform-dlz]]

## Key takeaways (BigHand / WDM)

- **BigHand product:** `Offices` only (`silver.temp.enriched_bighand_offices`) + **five** `bighand_*` BASE tables (incl. `bighand_publicholidays`)
- **WDM person facts:** `FactPersonForecast`, `FactPersonQualification`, `FactPersonWorkingArrangement` → `workerdatamart.curated_factperson*`
- **WDM holiday fact:** `FactPublicHoliday` → `curated_factpublicholiday` + MODEL view; grain DateKey+OfficeKey+HolidayName; unmatched holidays discarded
- **MODEL views:** `FactPersonQualification`, `FactPersonCapacity`, `FactPublicHoliday` in `workerdatamart`
- **Deploy order:** Metadata ∥ Transformation → Unity Catalog (alone) → Main Orchestrator → Run All Model Views
- **`dbutils.fs.exists` does not exist** — use `folderExists()` from Adatis Framework
- **Never run Transformation + Unity Catalog in parallel** — both `import-dir` to `/Data Platform`

## Recent wiki activity

- [2026-07-08] Added `FactPublicHoliday` / `bighand_publicholidays` (dual-year ingest, office fan-out)
- [2026-07-07] Wiki consolidated to **current state only** for BigHand/WDM — removed migration synthesis pages and legacy artifact references

|--------------------------|-----------|
| `Forecasts` | Appends ISO date range (tomorrow → +91 days) to URL |
| `Qualifications` | Prefixes `UserProfile/` |
| `PublicHolidays` | Two GETs: `PublicHolidays/{currentYear}/` and `PublicHolidays/{nextYear}/` (UTC), merge results, dedupe on `(name, date, countryIsoCode, regionIsoCode)` |
| other | Single GET: `{base}/{SourceQuery}` |

Fetch loop uses a `query_urls` list so multi-call entities share one RAW write.

## Ingest Collibra (`Ingest Collibra.py`)

| Aspect | Detail |
|--------|--------|
| Auth | OAuth2 `client_credentials` → `{baseUrl}/rest/oauth/v2/token` |
| Secrets | BaseUrl, ClientId, ClientSecret from KV via widget secret names |
| Data pull | Cursor pagination + `outputModule` export API |
| Landing | **Parquet** (all-string schema) under `TargetFolderPath` |
| Incremental | `LastJobCompletionDate` widget for watermarking |
| Logging | `logRowCount` with `curationStageCode="RAW"` |

## ADF invocation chain

```
Parent - Ingest Data
  → Task - Ingest BigHand / Task - Ingest Collibra
    → Task - Execute Databricks Notebook
      → /Data Platform/11 - Ingestion/Ingest {Source}.py
```

ADF passes secret name widgets (not literal URLs). Live URLs come from Key Vault via the **Secrets** pipeline. See [[projects/data-platform-dlz/skills/deployment-and-ci-cd#Changing a source's BaseURL — which pipeline to run]].

- **BigHand product:** `Offices` only (`silver.temp.enriched_bighand_offices`) + **five** `bighand_*` BASE tables (incl. `bighand_publicholidays`)
- **WDM person facts:** `FactPersonForecast`, `FactPersonQualification`, `FactPersonWorkingArrangement` → `workerdatamart.curated_factperson*`
- **WDM holiday fact:** `FactPublicHoliday` → `curated_factpublicholiday` + MODEL view; grain DateKey+OfficeKey+HolidayName; unmatched holidays discarded
