# DLZ Naming and Schema Conventions

[[projects/data-platform-dlz/data-platform-dlz|← Index]] | WDM overview: [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/worker-data-mart]] | BigHand hub: [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/bighand-data-product]]

> Authoritative naming rules for gold `workerdatamart` objects. When in doubt, follow **Worker Data Mart (WDM)** patterns — not source-system naming.

## Executive rules

| Rule | Meaning | Example |
|------|---------|---------|
| **No camelCase in datamart** | Curated tables and MODEL views use PascalCase business attributes, `*Key` surrogates, snake_case ETL metadata | `PersonKey`, `CommitmentDateKey`, `CommitmentHours` |
| **No product/source names in datamart** | `workerdatamart` holds functional dimensional objects | `curated_factpersonforecast`, `FactPersonCapacity` |
| **Gold schemas = data products** | Consumer-facing gold groupings follow data product boundaries | WDM facts in `workerdatamart`; Offices in `silver.temp` under BigHand product |
| **Data in `temp`** | ENRICHED checkpoints land in `temp` — not consumer schemas | `gold.temp.enriched_workerdatamart_factpersonforecast` |
| **Views in `workerdatamart`** | MODEL views for WDM entities live in `workerdatamart` schema | `WorkerDataMart.FactPersonCapacity` |
| **Functional entity codes** | Type prefix + functional name | `FactPersonForecast`, `FactPersonQualification`, `DimPerson` |

---

## Catalog and schema placement

| Catalog | Typical schemas | What lives here |
|---------|-----------------|-----------------|
| **silver** | `bighand`, other sources | BASE tables — mirror source field names |
| **gold** | `temp`, `workerdatamart`, `canonicalmodel` | ENRICHED checkpoints, CURATED tables, MODEL views |

### Medallion → schema mapping (WDM Fact path)

```mermaid
flowchart TB
  subgraph silver [silver]
    BASE["bighand.bighand_forecasts"]
  end
  subgraph gold [gold]
    TEMP["temp.enriched_workerdatamart_factpersonforecast"]
    CUR["workerdatamart.curated_factpersonforecast"]
    VIEW["workerdatamart.factpersoncapacity"]
  end
  BASE -->|ENRICHED| TEMP
  TEMP -->|CURATED| CUR
  CUR -->|MODEL| VIEW
```

| Stage | Catalog | Schema | Object pattern |
|-------|---------|--------|----------------|
| **BASE** | silver | `{sourcesystem}` | `{sourcesystem}_{entity}` lowercase |
| **ENRICHED** | gold | `temp` | `enriched_{dataproduct}_{entity}` lowercase |
| **CURATED** | gold | `workerdatamart` | `curated_{entitycode}` lowercase |
| **MODEL** | gold | `workerdatamart` | `{EntityCode}` PascalCase view |

**Exception — Enriched Dataset:** terminal ENRICHED only, often `silver.temp` (e.g. BigHand `Offices` → `temp.enriched_bighand_offices`).

---

## Naming patterns

### Physical tables

| Layer | Pattern | BigHand-sourced example |
|-------|---------|-------------------------|
| Silver BASE | `` `{silver}`.{sourcesystem}.{sourcesystem}_{entity} `` | `bighand.bighand_forecasts` |
| Gold ENRICHED temp | `` `{gold}`.temp.enriched_{dataproduct}_{entity} `` | `temp.enriched_workerdatamart_factpersonforecast` |
| Gold CURATED | `` `{gold}`.workerdatamart.curated_{entitycode} `` | `workerdatamart.curated_factpersonforecast` |

### MODEL views

| Element | Convention | Example |
|---------|------------|---------|
| SQL `CREATE VIEW` schema | PascalCase data product | `CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW WorkerDataMart.FactPersonCapacity` |
| UC physical schema | lowercase | `workerdatamart.factpersoncapacity` |
| Notebook path | `5 - MODEL/Worker Data Mart/Model - Worker Data Mart - Fact - {Entity}.py` | `Model - Worker Data Mart - Fact - Person Capacity.py` |
| Registration | `Run All Model Views.py` | Adjacent to related views |

### ADLS paths

| Stage | Pattern |
|-------|---------|
| BASE | `{DATALAKE}/BASE/General/{SourceSystem}/{entityCode}/delta/` |
| CURATED | `{DATALAKE}/CURATED/General/{DataProduct}/{EntityCode}/delta/` |

Example: `/CURATED/General/WorkerDataMart/FactPersonForecast/delta/`

### Notebook naming

| Stage | Pattern |
|-------|---------|
| ENRICHED | `Enriched - Worker Data Mart - Fact - {Entity}.py` |
| CURATED | `Curated - Worker Data Mart - Fact - {Entity}.py` |
| MODEL | `Model - Worker Data Mart - Fact - {Entity}.py` |
| Post-deploy DDL | `Create CURATED Metastore Tables - WorkerDataMart - BigHand Facts.py` |

Spaced entity names (e.g. contract `name` = `Public Holiday`) produce notebook filenames with spaces: `... Fact - Public Holiday.py`. Keep CSV `ENTITY_NAME` aligned or autogen creates duplicate skeletons.

---

## BigHand-sourced WDM facts (reference)

| Entity code | ENRICHED temp | CURATED table | MODEL view |
|-------------|---------------|---------------|------------|
| `FactPersonForecast` | `temp.enriched_workerdatamart_factpersonforecast` | `curated_factpersonforecast` | — (deferred) |
| `FactPersonQualification` | `temp.enriched_workerdatamart_factpersonqualification` | `curated_factpersonqualification` | `FactPersonQualification` |
| `FactPersonWorkingArrangement` | `temp.enriched_workerdatamart_factpersonworkingarrangement` | `curated_factpersonworkingarrangement` | — (deferred) |
| `FactPublicHoliday` | `temp.enriched_workerdatamart_factpublicholiday` | `curated_factpublicholiday` | `FactPublicHoliday` |
| — | — | — | `FactPersonCapacity` (composite) |

**BigHand product retains:** `Offices` → `silver.temp.enriched_bighand_offices`; silver BASE five `bighand.bighand_*` tables (including `bighand_publicholidays`).

---

## Pipeline responsibilities

| Layer | Joins? | Writes to | Reads from |
|-------|--------|-----------|------------|
| ENRICHED | **Yes** | `temp.enriched_*` | Silver BASE + `workerdatamart.curated_dim*` |
| CURATED | **No** | `workerdatamart.curated_*` | `temp.enriched_*` |
| MODEL | **Yes** (view SQL) | `CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW` | `workerdatamart.curated_*` |

---

## Contract and orchestration alignment

- Entity **must** live in the data product whose schema autogen emits — `WorkerDataMart-EntityMetadata.csv` rows drive `workerdatamart` DDL.
- Dependencies example: `BASE~bighand~bighand_forecasts~Hard` + Soft `CURATED~WorkerDataMart~DimPerson~Soft`.
- `isModelViewEnabled: false` on WDM entities — MODEL views are hand-authored.

---

## Validation SQL

```sql
SHOW TABLES IN `fbd-d-uks-data-dlz-dbw-gold`.workerdatamart LIKE 'curated_factperson%';
SHOW TABLES IN `fbd-d-uks-data-dlz-dbw-gold`.temp LIKE 'enriched_workerdatamart_factperson%';

SELECT table_schema, table_name, table_type
FROM `fbd-d-uks-data-dlz-dbw-gold`.information_schema.tables
WHERE table_name IN ('factpersoncapacity', 'factpersonqualification', 'factpublicholiday');
```

---

## Related

- [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/bighand-data-product]] — operational hub
- [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/bighand-gold-layer-exploration]] — gold inventory
- [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/worker-data-mart]] — WDM product overview
- [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/curation-pipeline]] — Enriched Dataset vs Fact
- [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/contract-generation-pipeline]] — autogen naming must match CSV entity codes
- [[projects/data-platform-dlz/entities/factpersoncalendar]] — reference Fact pattern

| Logging | `logRowCount` with `curationStageCode="RAW"` |

Widgets: `BaseUrl-SecretName`, `ClientSecret-SecretName`, `SourceSystemCode`, `EntityCode`, `TargetFolderPath`, `SourceQuery`, `ProcessQueueId`, `ProcessInstanceId`.

### SourceQuery special cases

| `SourceQuery` (stripped) | Behaviour |
|--------------------------|-----------|
| `Forecasts` | Appends ISO date range (tomorrow → +91 days) to URL |
| `Qualifications` | Prefixes `UserProfile/` |
| `PublicHolidays` | Two GETs: `PublicHolidays/{currentYear}/` and `PublicHolidays/{nextYear}/` (UTC), merge results, dedupe on `(name, date, countryIsoCode, regionIsoCode)` |
| other | Single GET: `{base}/{SourceQuery}` |

Fetch loop uses a `query_urls` list so multi-call entities share one RAW write.

| Secrets | BaseUrl, ClientId, ClientSecret from KV via widget secret names |
| Data pull | Cursor pagination + `outputModule` export API |
| Landing | **Parquet** (all-string schema) under `TargetFolderPath` |
| Incremental | `LastJobCompletionDate` widget for watermarking |
| Logging | `logRowCount` with `curationStageCode="RAW"` |

## ADF invocation chain

```
Parent - Ingest Data
  → Task - Ingest BigHand / Task - Ingest Collibra
    → Task - Execute Databricks Notebook
      → /Data Platform/11 - Ingestion/Ingest {Source}.py
```

ADF passes secret name widgets (not literal URLs). Live URLs come from Key Vault via the **Secrets** pipeline. See [[projects/data-platform-dlz/skills/deployment-and-ci-cd#Changing a source's BaseURL — which pipeline to run]].

[[projects/data-platform-dlz/data-platform-dlz|← Index]] | WDM overview: [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/worker-data-mart]] | BigHand hub: [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/bighand-data-product]]

> Authoritative naming rules for gold `workerdatamart` objects. When in doubt, follow **Worker Data Mart (WDM)** patterns — not source-system naming.

## Executive rules

| Rule | Meaning | Example |
|------|---------|---------|
| **No camelCase in datamart** | Curated tables and MODEL views use PascalCase business attributes, `*Key` surrogates, snake_case ETL metadata | `PersonKey`, `CommitmentDateKey`, `CommitmentHours` |
| **No product/source names in datamart** | `workerdatamart` holds functional dimensional objects | `curated_factpersonforecast`, `FactPersonCapacity` |
| **Gold schemas = data products** | Consumer-facing gold groupings follow data product boundaries | WDM facts in `workerdatamart`; Offices in `silver.temp` under BigHand product |
| **Data in `temp`** | ENRICHED checkpoints land in `temp` — not consumer schemas | `gold.temp.enriched_workerdatamart_factpersonforecast` |
| **Views in `workerdatamart`** | MODEL views for WDM entities live in `workerdatamart` schema | `WorkerDataMart.FactPersonCapacity` |
| **Functional entity codes** | Type prefix + functional name | `FactPersonForecast`, `FactPersonQualification`, `DimPerson` |

---

## Catalog and schema placement

| Catalog | Typical schemas | What lives here |
|---------|-----------------|-----------------|
| **silver** | `bighand`, other sources | BASE tables — mirror source field names |
| **gold** | `temp`, `workerdatamart`, `canonicalmodel` | ENRICHED checkpoints, CURATED tables, MODEL views |

### Medallion → schema mapping (WDM Fact path)

```mermaid
flowchart TB
  subgraph silver [silver]
    BASE["bighand.bighand_forecasts"]
  end
  subgraph gold [gold]
    TEMP["temp.enriched_workerdatamart_factpersonforecast"]
    CUR["workerdatamart.curated_factpersonforecast"]
    VIEW["workerdatamart.factpersoncapacity"]
  end
  BASE -->|ENRICHED| TEMP
  TEMP -->|CURATED| CUR
  CUR -->|MODEL| VIEW
```

| Stage | Catalog | Schema | Object pattern |
|-------|---------|--------|----------------|
| **BASE** | silver | `{sourcesystem}` | `{sourcesystem}_{entity}` lowercase |
| **ENRICHED** | gold | `temp` | `enriched_{dataproduct}_{entity}` lowercase |
| **CURATED** | gold | `workerdatamart` | `curated_{entitycode}` lowercase |
| **MODEL** | gold | `workerdatamart` | `{EntityCode}` PascalCase view |

**Exception — Enriched Dataset:** terminal ENRICHED only, often `silver.temp` (e.g. BigHand `Offices` → `temp.enriched_bighand_offices`).

---

## Naming patterns

### Physical tables

| Layer | Pattern | BigHand-sourced example |
|-------|---------|-------------------------|
| Silver BASE | `` `{silver}`.{sourcesystem}.{sourcesystem}_{entity} `` | `bighand.bighand_forecasts` |
| Gold ENRICHED temp | `` `{gold}`.temp.enriched_{dataproduct}_{entity} `` | `temp.enriched_workerdatamart_factpersonforecast` |
| Gold CURATED | `` `{gold}`.workerdatamart.curated_{entitycode} `` | `workerdatamart.curated_factpersonforecast` |

### MODEL views

| Element | Convention | Example |
|---------|------------|---------|
| SQL `CREATE VIEW` schema | PascalCase data product | `CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW WorkerDataMart.FactPersonCapacity` |
| UC physical schema | lowercase | `workerdatamart.factpersoncapacity` |
| Notebook path | `5 - MODEL/Worker Data Mart/Model - Worker Data Mart - Fact - {Entity}.py` | `Model - Worker Data Mart - Fact - Person Capacity.py` |
| Registration | `Run All Model Views.py` | Adjacent to related views |

### ADLS paths

| Stage | Pattern |
|-------|---------|
| BASE | `{DATALAKE}/BASE/General/{SourceSystem}/{entityCode}/delta/` |
| CURATED | `{DATALAKE}/CURATED/General/{DataProduct}/{EntityCode}/delta/` |

Example: `/CURATED/General/WorkerDataMart/FactPersonForecast/delta/`

### Notebook naming

| Stage | Pattern |
|-------|---------|
| ENRICHED | `Enriched - Worker Data Mart - Fact - {Entity}.py` |
| CURATED | `Curated - Worker Data Mart - Fact - {Entity}.py` |
| MODEL | `Model - Worker Data Mart - Fact - {Entity}.py` |
| Post-deploy DDL | `Create CURATED Metastore Tables - WorkerDataMart - BigHand Facts.py` |

Spaced entity names (e.g. contract `name` = `Public Holiday`) produce notebook filenames with spaces: `... Fact - Public Holiday.py`. Keep CSV `ENTITY_NAME` aligned or autogen creates duplicate skeletons.

---

## BigHand-sourced WDM facts (reference)

| Entity code | ENRICHED temp | CURATED table | MODEL view |
|-------------|---------------|---------------|------------|
| `FactPersonForecast` | `temp.enriched_workerdatamart_factpersonforecast` | `curated_factpersonforecast` | — (deferred) |
| `FactPersonQualification` | `temp.enriched_workerdatamart_factpersonqualification` | `curated_factpersonqualification` | `FactPersonQualification` |
| `FactPersonWorkingArrangement` | `temp.enriched_workerdatamart_factpersonworkingarrangement` | `curated_factpersonworkingarrangement` | — (deferred) |
| `FactPublicHoliday` | `temp.enriched_workerdatamart_factpublicholiday` | `curated_factpublicholiday` | `FactPublicHoliday` |
| — | — | — | `FactPersonCapacity` (composite) |

**BigHand product retains:** `Offices` → `silver.temp.enriched_bighand_offices`; silver BASE five `bighand.bighand_*` tables (including `bighand_publicholidays`).

---

## Pipeline responsibilities

| Layer | Joins? | Writes to | Reads from |
|-------|--------|-----------|------------|
| ENRICHED | **Yes** | `temp.enriched_*` | Silver BASE + `workerdatamart.curated_dim*` |
| CURATED | **No** | `workerdatamart.curated_*` | `temp.enriched_*` |
| MODEL | **Yes** (view SQL) | `CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW` | `workerdatamart.curated_*` |

---

## Contract and orchestration alignment

- Entity **must** live in the data product whose schema autogen emits — `WorkerDataMart-EntityMetadata.csv` rows drive `workerdatamart` DDL.
- Dependencies example: `BASE~bighand~bighand_forecasts~Hard` + Soft `CURATED~WorkerDataMart~DimPerson~Soft`.
- `isModelViewEnabled: false` on WDM entities — MODEL views are hand-authored.

---

## Validation SQL

```sql
SHOW TABLES IN `fbd-d-uks-data-dlz-dbw-gold`.workerdatamart LIKE 'curated_factperson%';
SHOW TABLES IN `fbd-d-uks-data-dlz-dbw-gold`.temp LIKE 'enriched_workerdatamart_factperson%';

SELECT table_schema, table_name, table_type
FROM `fbd-d-uks-data-dlz-dbw-gold`.information_schema.tables
WHERE table_name IN ('factpersoncapacity', 'factpersonqualification', 'factpublicholiday');
```

---

## Related

- [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/bighand-data-product]] — operational hub
- [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/bighand-gold-layer-exploration]] — gold inventory
- [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/worker-data-mart]] — WDM product overview
- [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/curation-pipeline]] — Enriched Dataset vs Fact
- [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/contract-generation-pipeline]] — autogen naming must match CSV entity codes
- [[projects/data-platform-dlz/entities/factpersoncalendar]] — reference Fact pattern

# API Ingestion Notebooks

[[projects/data-platform-dlz/data-platform-dlz|← Index]]

## Summary

Two API ingestion notebooks in `11 - Ingestion/` pull data directly into RAW via Databricks (not ADF copy activities). ADF invokes them through **Task - Execute Databricks Notebook** from `Task - Ingest BigHand` / `Task - Ingest Collibra`.

## Ingest BigHand (`Ingest BigHand.py`)

| Aspect | Detail |
|--------|--------|
| Auth | POST `{baseUrl}/Authenticate` with `ClientSecret` → bearer token |
| Secrets | `dbutils.secrets.get("AzureKeyVaultSecrets", <widget-supplied name>)` for BaseUrl, ClientSecret |
| Data pull | REST API per contract `SourceQuery` widget |
| Landing | Single coalesced **JSON** file under `TargetFolderPath` |
| Logging | `logRowCount` with `curationStageCode="RAW"` |
| Postman | Collection **BigHand RM - PreProd** — see [[projects/data-platform-dlz/skills/agent-toolkit-and-rules]] |

Widgets: `BaseUrl-SecretName`, `ClientSecret-SecretName`, `SourceSystemCode`, `EntityCode`, `TargetFolderPath`, `SourceQuery`, `ProcessQueueId`, `ProcessInstanceId`.

### SourceQuery special cases

| `SourceQuery` (stripped) | Behaviour |
|--------------------------|-----------|
| `Forecasts` | Appends ISO date range (tomorrow → +91 days) to URL |
| `Qualifications` | Prefixes `UserProfile/` |
| `PublicHolidays` | Two GETs: `PublicHolidays/{currentYear}/` and `PublicHolidays/{nextYear}/` (UTC), merge results, dedupe on `(name, date, countryIsoCode, regionIsoCode)` |
| other | Single GET: `{base}/{SourceQuery}` |

Fetch loop uses a `query_urls` list so multi-call entities share one RAW write.

## Ingest Collibra (`Ingest Collibra.py`)

| Aspect | Detail |
|--------|--------|
| Auth | OAuth2 `client_credentials` → `{baseUrl}/rest/oauth/v2/token` |
| Secrets | BaseUrl, ClientId, ClientSecret from KV via widget secret names |
| Data pull | Cursor pagination + `outputModule` export API |
| Landing | **Parquet** (all-string schema) under `TargetFolderPath` |
| Incremental | `LastJobCompletionDate` widget for watermarking |
| Logging | `logRowCount` with `curationStageCode="RAW"` |

## ADF invocation chain

```
Parent - Ingest Data
  → Task - Ingest BigHand / Task - Ingest Collibra
    → Task - Execute Databricks Notebook
      → /Data Platform/11 - Ingestion/Ingest {Source}.py
```

ADF passes secret name widgets (not literal URLs). Live URLs come from Key Vault via the **Secrets** pipeline. See [[projects/data-platform-dlz/skills/deployment-and-ci-cd#Changing a source's BaseURL — which pipeline to run]].

## Related

- [[projects/data-platform-dlz/entities/source-systems]] — BigHand and Collibra contracts
- [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/raw-to-base-patterns]] — RAW → BASE after landing
- [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/orchestration-and-adf]] — ingestion orchestration
- [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/bighand-data-product]] — Offices ENRICHED + WDM FactPerson* / FactPublicHoliday

# Hot Cache

## Current focus

- **BigHand / WDM** — [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/bighand-data-product]], [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/bighand-gold-layer-exploration]], [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/dlz-naming-and-schema-conventions]]
- Data Platform DLZ onboarding: [[projects/data-platform-dlz/data-platform-dlz]]

## Key takeaways (BigHand / WDM)

- **BigHand product:** `Offices` only (`silver.temp.enriched_bighand_offices`) + **five** `bighand_*` BASE tables (incl. `bighand_publicholidays`)
- **WDM person facts:** `FactPersonForecast`, `FactPersonQualification`, `FactPersonWorkingArrangement` → `workerdatamart.curated_factperson*`
- **WDM holiday fact:** `FactPublicHoliday` → `curated_factpublicholiday` + MODEL view; grain DateKey+OfficeKey+HolidayName; unmatched holidays discarded
- **MODEL views:** `FactPersonQualification`, `FactPersonCapacity`, `FactPublicHoliday` in `workerdatamart`
- **Deploy order:** Metadata ∥ Transformation → Unity Catalog (alone) → Main Orchestrator → Run All Model Views
- **`dbutils.fs.exists` does not exist** — use `folderExists()` from Adatis Framework
- **Never run Transformation + Unity Catalog in parallel** — both `import-dir` to `/Data Platform`

## Recent wiki activity

- [2026-07-08] Added `FactPublicHoliday` / `bighand_publicholidays` (dual-year ingest, office fan-out)
- [2026-07-07] Wiki consolidated to **current state only** for BigHand/WDM — removed migration synthesis pages and legacy artifact references

**13 enabled source systems** ingest into the DLZ. Each has `_sourceSystem.json` plus per-entity contracts (**294** ingestion entities total after BigHand public holidays). ADF **Parent - Ingest Data** dispatches to task pipelines by source type (SQL Server, REST, blob, Workday RaaS, Nexthink API, etc.).

| Code | Name | Source type | Entities | Ingestion group | Business role |
|------|------|-------------|--------:|-----------------|---------------|
| `elite3e` | Elite 3E | SQL Server | 100 | Elite3E | **Finance SOR** — matters, time, billing, GL |
| `literafoundation` | Litera Foundation | SQL Server | 77 | Litera | Matter/person narrative data |
| `intappopen` | Intapp Open | SQL Server | 39 | Intapp | Conflicts / intake |
| `salesforce` | Salesforce | Salesforce | 39 | Salesforce | CRM — accounts, opportunities, matters |
| `workday` | Workday | Workday RaaS | 13 | Workday | **HR SOR** — workers, org structure |
| `bighand` | BigHand | BigHand API | 5 | BigHand | Resource management / allocations / public holidays |
| `intappwalls` | Intapp Walls | SQL Server | 8 | Intapp | Ethical walls |
| `userpermissions` | User Permissions | Azure Blob Storage | 4 | User Permissions | Permission exports |
| `collibra` | Collibra | Collibra API | 2 | Collibra | Data governance catalog |
| `capability` | Capability | Azure Blob Storage | 2 | Capability | Worker capability data (blob) |
| `ffphotos` | Freshfields Photos | Binary Filesystem | 1 | FF Photos | Photo assets |
| `capability_excel` | Capability Excel | Excel | 1 | Capability | Capability spreadsheets |
| `nexthink` | Nexthink | Nexthink API | 3 | Nexthink | DEX telemetry — session events (Americas/Asia/EMEA) |

## Nexthink (contracted 2026-07-02)

Previously documented as a workspace-only source with no contract. The repo now has:

- `metadata/contracts/ingestion/nexthink/_sourceSystem.json` + 3 entity contracts (`nexthink_session_events_{americas,asia,emea}`)
- ADF pipeline `Task - Ingest Nexthink`
- 3 regional schedule triggers: `Nexthink Ingestion Americas`, `Nexthink Ingestion Asia`, `Nexthink Ingestion EMEA`

Silver tables land as `nexthink.nexthink_session_events_*` and feed downstream products (e.g. [[projects/data-platform-dlz/entities/factpersoncalendar]] for office vs online attendance).

## Key integration notes for agents

### Elite 3E
- Largest entity surface (100 entities); feeds **CDF Lookup**, **Worker Data Mart**, **Partner Portal**.
- SQL Server connection via Key Vault: `ConnectionStringTo-Elite3E`, etc.
- 30 replacement contracts in `metadata/replacement-contracts/ingestion/elite3e/` override generated defaults.

### Workday
- HR feeds Worker Data Mart dimensions (person, position, org).
- RaaS reports — no direct SQL.

### BigHand
- API ingestion via notebook in `11 - Ingestion/` — five entities including `bighand_publicholidays` (dual-year `PublicHolidays/{year}/`).
- **Postman**: collection **BigHand RM - PreProd** (`fbb7e963-d51c-4fe3-a800-89a346a1a244`).
- See [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/api-ingestion-notebooks]] and [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/bighand-data-product]].

### Salesforce
- CRM entities for pitches, accounts, opportunities in Worker Data Mart.

### Capability
- Blob container `data-platform`; separate from Capability Excel path.

## Ingestion landing

- Default filesystem: **`data-platform`** on `fbdduksdatadlzst`.
- RAW paths driven by contract + pipeline parameters.
- Incremental loads logged via ADF switch activities (watermarks, CDC where configured).

## Egress targets are NOT source systems

External systems such as **Benevity**, **Milana**, and **Predict X** appear in contracts and gold schemas but **never feed data in** — they are outbound targets only. See [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/benevity-integration]] and [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/egress-pipeline]].

**Agent note**: a gold schema named after an external system (e.g. `benevity`) usually holds the *outbound* dataset for that system, not ingested data from it.

# Data Products

[[projects/data-platform-dlz/data-platform-dlz|← Index]]

## Summary

**15 data products** defined in `metadata/contracts/data-products/` (**144** transformation entities after `FactPublicHoliday`). Most are Databricks Hive/Delta databases; some are **Egress** targets only.

| Code | Entities | Name | Primary consumers / purpose |
|------|--------:|------|----------------------------|
| `WorkerDataMart` | 79 | Worker Data Mart | **Core mart** — facts/dims for time, matters, invoices, pitches, workers, public holidays |
| `CanonicalModel` | 35 | Canonical Model | Enterprise canonical entities |
| `PartnerPortal` | 8 | Partner Portal | Partner-facing matter/WIP/invoice views |
| `CDFLookup` | 6 | CDF Lookup | **Reference data** — departments, offices, calendars → [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/cdf-lookup]] |
| `BigHand` | 1 | BigHand | BigHand RM ingestion + **Offices** Enriched Dataset → [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/bighand-data-product]] |
| `Milana` | 2 | Milana | Internal analytics product |
| `MilanaEgress` | 2 | Milana Egress | DLZ → Milana (SFTP) |
| `API` | 1 | API | API-serving layer metadata |
| `Benevity` | 1 | Benevity | Workday-sourced employee feed → [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/benevity-integration]] |
| `BenevityEgress` | 1 | Benevity Egress | DLZ → Benevity CSV/SHIR |
| `CosmosDbEgress` | 1 | Cosmos DB Egress | DLZ → Cosmos (e.g. Intranet KPI) |
| `DataOps` | 1 | Data Ops | Operational metadata (e.g. Collibra job execution) |
| `DataQuality` | 1 | Data Quality | DQX comparisons and quality datasets |
| `PredictX` | 1 | Predict X | Predictive / ML feature product |
| `PredictXEgress` | 1 | Predict X Egress | DLZ → PredictX (file server) |

## Analytical vs egress

**Analytical products** (11): API, Benevity, BigHand, CDFLookup, CanonicalModel, DataOps, DataQuality, Milana, PartnerPortal, PredictX, WorkerDataMart.

**Egress-only products** (4): BenevityEgress, CosmosDbEgress, MilanaEgress, PredictXEgress — architecture: [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/egress-pipeline]].

**Egress product pattern**: the `<X>` analytical product owns the gold schema/view (e.g. `benevity.employee`); the `<X>Egress` product holds `egressConnectionDetails` (targetType + Key Vault secret *names*) and per-entity `egressDetails` (source query template, file name/type, egress method). The egress entity declares a Hard dependency on the ENRICHED entity so egress only runs after refresh.

## Dependency hub

**Worker Data Mart** is the largest downstream consumer. It references **CDF Lookup** for:

- `DepartmentName`, `ReportingOfficeName`, `OfficeCrosswalk`
- `InvoiceType`, `TimecardHierarchy`, `WorkCalendar`

Check `dependencies` / source comments in WDM enriched notebooks.

## Notebook locations

| Product | ENRICHED | CURATED | MODEL |
|---------|--------:|--------:|------:|
| Worker Data Mart | 79 | 79 | 88 |
| Canonical Model | — | 35 | 35 |
| Partner Portal | 8 | — | — |
| CDF Lookup | 7 | — | — |
| BigHand | 4 | 3 | 1 |
| Predict X | 3 | — | — |
| Milana | 2 | — | — |
| Benevity / API / Data Ops / Data Quality | 1 each | — | — |

Full layer detail: [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/curated-and-model-layers]].

## Agent tips

- Product `code` in contracts uses **PascalCase** (`CDFLookup`); folder names may use spaces (`CDF Lookup`).
- Entity `type` drives orchestration: Dimension, Fact, Enriched Dataset, Canonical, Egress.
- Egress entities have `egressDetails` in schema — wired through **Parent - Egress Data** → [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/egress-pipeline]].
- **Egress targets are not source systems** — e.g. Benevity never feeds data *in*; its upstream is Workday.

## BigHand

See **[[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/bighand-data-product]]** for operational hub. **Gold inventory:** [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/bighand-gold-layer-exploration]].

| Entity (code) | Product | Type | Terminal |
|---|---|---|---|
| `Offices` | BigHand | Enriched Dataset | `silver.temp.enriched_bighand_offices` |
| `FactPersonForecast` | WorkerDataMart | Fact | `workerdatamart.curated_factpersonforecast` |
| `FactPersonQualification` | WorkerDataMart | Fact | `workerdatamart.curated_factpersonqualification` |
| `FactPersonWorkingArrangement` | WorkerDataMart | Fact | `workerdatamart.curated_factpersonworkingarrangement` |
| `FactPublicHoliday` | WorkerDataMart | Fact | `workerdatamart.curated_factpublicholiday` + MODEL `FactPublicHoliday` |

Person / holiday facts are WDM contracts (`WorkerDataMart/FactPerson*.json`, `FactPublicHoliday.json`); BigHand product contract retains `Offices` only. Ingestion: five `bighand_*` BASE entities under source system `bighand`.

## Benevity (detailed 2026-07-02)

**`Benevity`** + **`BenevityEgress`** together implement the outbound employee feed: Workday BASE → ENRICHED `BenevityEmployee` → gold view `benevity.employee` → `Task - Egress Benevity` → `FBD_Benevity_<yyyyMMdd>.csv` over SHIR. Full walkthrough: [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/benevity-integration]].

## Related contracted entities

| Entity | Relationship |
|--------|-------------|
| `FactWorkerAvailability` | Shares `workday_availability` source; contracted fact with truncate-and-reload |
| `FactTimesheet` | Also uses `elite3e_officeholiday` and calendar logic for missing timesheets |
| `FactPublicHoliday` | BigHand-sourced WDM fact (`curated_factpublicholiday`) — alternative office holiday grain (DateKey+OfficeKey+HolidayName); refactor of this calendar view to consume it is **deferred** |
| `DimPerson`, `DimOffice`, `DimDate` | Direct dependencies |

**Egress product pattern**: the `<X>` analytical product owns the gold schema/view (e.g. `benevity.employee`); the `<X>Egress` product holds `egressConnectionDetails` (targetType + Key Vault secret *names*) and per-entity `egressDetails` (source query template, file name/type, egress method). The egress entity declares a Hard dependency on the ENRICHED entity so egress only runs after refresh.

## Dependency hub

**Worker Data Mart** is the largest downstream consumer. It references **CDF Lookup** for:

- `DepartmentName`, `ReportingOfficeName`, `OfficeCrosswalk`
- `InvoiceType`, `TimecardHierarchy`, `WorkCalendar`

Check `dependencies` / source comments in WDM enriched notebooks.

- **Egress targets are not source systems** — e.g. Benevity never feeds data *in*; its upstream is Workday.

# Source Systems

[[projects/data-platform-dlz/data-platform-dlz|← Index]]

## Summary

**13 enabled source systems** ingest into the DLZ. Each has `_sourceSystem.json` plus per-entity contracts (**294** ingestion entities total after BigHand public holidays). ADF **Parent - Ingest Data** dispatches to task pipelines by source type (SQL Server, REST, blob, Workday RaaS, Nexthink API, etc.).

| Code | Name | Source type | Entities | Ingestion group | Business role |
|------|------|-------------|--------:|-----------------|---------------|
| `elite3e` | Elite 3E | SQL Server | 100 | Elite3E | **Finance SOR** — matters, time, billing, GL |
| `literafoundation` | Litera Foundation | SQL Server | 77 | Litera | Matter/person narrative data |
| `intappopen` | Intapp Open | SQL Server | 39 | Intapp | Conflicts / intake |
| `salesforce` | Salesforce | Salesforce | 39 | Salesforce | CRM — accounts, opportunities, matters |
| `workday` | Workday | Workday RaaS | 13 | Workday | **HR SOR** — workers, org structure |
| `bighand` | BigHand | BigHand API | 5 | BigHand | Resource management / allocations / public holidays |
| `intappwalls` | Intapp Walls | SQL Server | 8 | Intapp | Ethical walls |
| `userpermissions` | User Permissions | Azure Blob Storage | 4 | User Permissions | Permission exports |
| `collibra` | Collibra | Collibra API | 2 | Collibra | Data governance catalog |
| `capability` | Capability | Azure Blob Storage | 2 | Capability | Worker capability data (blob) |
| `ffphotos` | Freshfields Photos | Binary Filesystem | 1 | FF Photos | Photo assets |
| `capability_excel` | Capability Excel | Excel | 1 | Capability | Capability spreadsheets |
| `nexthink` | Nexthink | Nexthink API | 3 | Nexthink | DEX telemetry — session events (Americas/Asia/EMEA) |

## Nexthink (contracted 2026-07-02)

Previously documented as a workspace-only source with no contract. The repo now has:

- `metadata/contracts/ingestion/nexthink/_sourceSystem.json` + 3 entity contracts (`nexthink_session_events_{americas,asia,emea}`)
- ADF pipeline `Task - Ingest Nexthink`
- 3 regional schedule triggers: `Nexthink Ingestion Americas`, `Nexthink Ingestion Asia`, `Nexthink Ingestion EMEA`

Silver tables land as `nexthink.nexthink_session_events_*` and feed downstream products (e.g. [[projects/data-platform-dlz/entities/factpersoncalendar]] for office vs online attendance).

## Key integration notes for agents

### Elite 3E
- Largest entity surface (100 entities); feeds **CDF Lookup**, **Worker Data Mart**, **Partner Portal**.
- SQL Server connection via Key Vault: `ConnectionStringTo-Elite3E`, etc.
- 30 replacement contracts in `metadata/replacement-contracts/ingestion/elite3e/` override generated defaults.

### Workday
- HR feeds Worker Data Mart dimensions (person, position, org).
- RaaS reports — no direct SQL.

### BigHand
- API ingestion via notebook in `11 - Ingestion/` — five entities including `bighand_publicholidays` (dual-year `PublicHolidays/{year}/`).
- **Postman**: collection **BigHand RM - PreProd** (`fbb7e963-d51c-4fe3-a800-89a346a1a244`).
- See [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/api-ingestion-notebooks]] and [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/bighand-data-product]].

### Salesforce
- CRM entities for pitches, accounts, opportunities in Worker Data Mart.

### Capability
- Blob container `data-platform`; separate from Capability Excel path.

## Ingestion landing

- Default filesystem: **`data-platform`** on `fbdduksdatadlzst`.
- RAW paths driven by contract + pipeline parameters.
- Incremental loads logged via ADF switch activities (watermarks, CDC where configured).

## Egress targets are NOT source systems

External systems such as **Benevity**, **Milana**, and **Predict X** appear in contracts and gold schemas but **never feed data in** — they are outbound targets only. See [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/benevity-integration]] and [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/egress-pipeline]].

**Agent note**: a gold schema named after an external system (e.g. `benevity`) usually holds the *outbound* dataset for that system, not ingested data from it.

- [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/bighand-data-product]] — Offices + WDM FactPerson* / FactPublicHoliday

# FactPersonCalendar

[[projects/data-platform-dlz/data-platform-dlz|← Index]] | [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/worker-data-mart]] | [[projects/data-platform-dlz/entities/data-products]]

## Summary

**`workerdatamart.factpersoncalendar`** is a **gold-layer SQL view** (not a contracted Delta entity) that builds a **person × date calendar** with employment, leave, holiday, and office-attendance flags. It lives in Unity Catalog catalog `fbd-d-uks-data-dlz-dbw-gold`, schema `workerdatamart`.

> **Not in repo:** No contract, notebook, or deployment script exists in `DataPlatform-DataLandingZone`. The view was created directly in the workspace (owner: martin.sikula@freshfields.com, created 2026-06-22).

## Unity Catalog name

| Layer | Full name |
|-------|-----------|
| Gold view | `fbd-d-uks-data-dlz-dbw-gold.workerdatamart.factpersoncalendar` |
| Shorthand (used in notebooks) | `workerdatamart.factpersoncalendar` |

**Type:** VIEW (not a managed Delta table). No `curated_` prefix — unlike most WDM contracted facts.

## Curation stages

This object **does not** follow the standard RAW → BASE → ENRICHED → CURATED → MODEL pipeline as a contracted entity. Instead it is a **downstream analytical view** that reads already-curated upstream tables:

```
RAW → BASE (silver UC)     ─┐
ENRICHED (CDF Lookup)      ─┼→ gold VIEW: workerdatamart.factpersoncalendar
CURATED (WDM dimensions)   ─┘
```

| Stage | Role for this view |
|-------|--------------------|
| **RAW → BASE** | Source ingestion tables land in silver catalog |
| **ENRICHED** | `OfficeCrosswalk` (CDF Lookup) used for holiday office mapping |
| **CURATED** | WDM `DimDate`, `DimPerson`, `DimOffice` provide conformed keys |
| **MODEL** | N/A — view is exposed directly in gold `workerdatamart` schema |

## Source tables (upstream)

### Silver / BASE (`fbd-d-uks-data-dlz-dbw-silver`)

| Schema | Table | Ingestion contract | Purpose |
|--------|-------|-------------------|----------|
| `workday` | `workday_availability` | `metadata/contracts/ingestion/workday/workday_availability.json` | Scheduled hours, availability per colleague per date |
| `workday` | `workday_leave_of_absence` | `metadata/contracts/ingestion/workday/workday_leave_of_absence.json` | Secondment and other leave |
| `workday` | `workday_colleague` | `metadata/contracts/ingestion/workday/workday_colleague.json` | Email / Workday username → Colleague_ID mapping |
| `elite3e` | `elite3e_officeholiday` | `metadata/contracts/ingestion/elite3e/elite3e_officeholiday.json` | Office public holidays |
| `elite3e` | `elite3e_office` | `metadata/contracts/ingestion/elite3e/elite3e_office.json` | Office site codes for holidays |
| `nexthink` | `nexthink_session_events` | **Not in repo** | Endpoint/session events for office vs online attendance |
| `temp` | `enriched_cdflookup_officecrosswalk` | ENRICHED `CDFLookup.OfficeCrosswalk` | Elite3E site → Workday office name crosswalk |

### Gold / CURATED WDM (`fbd-d-uks-data-dlz-dbw-gold.workerdatamart`)

| Table | Contract entity | Notebook area |
|-------|----------------|---------------|
| `curated_dimdate` | DimDate (post-deployment) | `4 - CURATED/Worker Data Mart/Post Deployment/` |
| `curated_dimperson` | DimPerson | `3 - ENRICHED` → `4 - CURATED` |
| `curated_dimoffice` | DimOffice | `3 - ENRICHED` → `4 - CURATED` |

## View logic (high level)

The view SQL composes four CTEs:

1. **`colleagues`** — deduplicated Workday colleague lookup by email / username
2. **`attendance`** — Nexthink session events joined to DimDate, DimPerson, DimOffice
3. **`holidays`** — Elite3E office holidays crosswalked to Workday office names
4. **`calendar`** — person × date spine from `workday_availability` with holiday, employment, leave, and vacation flags
5. **`office_attendance`** — merges calendar with attendance to set `IsPrimaryOfficeAttendance`, `IsOtherOfficeAttendance`, `IsOnline`

## Output columns

| Column | Description |
|--------|-------------|
| `DateKey` | Surrogate date key (from `curated_dimdate`) |
| `PersonKey` | Surrogate person key (Workday source) |
| `PrimaryOfficeKey` | Person's primary office on that date |
| `SecondaryOfficeKey` | Person's secondary office on that date |
| `IsHolidayInPrimaryOffice` | Public holiday in primary office |
| `IsHolidayInSecondaryOffice` | Public holiday in secondary office |
| `IsEmployeeNonWorkingDay` | Weekday with zero scheduled hours |
| `IsEmployed` | Date on or after person's effective start |
| `IsOnSecondment` | On secondment leave |
| `IsOnOtherLeave` | On non-secondment leave |
| `IsOnVacation` | Scheduled hours exceed available hours after absence |
| `IsPrimaryOfficeAttendance` | Physical attendance at primary office (Nexthink) |
| `IsOtherOfficeAttendance` | Physical attendance at a non-primary office |
| `IsOnline` | Online session with no mapped office |

## Related contracted entities

| Entity | Relationship |
|--------|-------------|
| `FactWorkerAvailability` | Shares `workday_availability` source; contracted fact with truncate-and-reload |
| `FactTimesheet` | Also uses `elite3e_officeholiday` and calendar logic for missing timesheets |
| `FactPublicHoliday` | BigHand-sourced WDM fact (`curated_factpublicholiday`) — alternative office holiday grain (DateKey+OfficeKey+HolidayName); refactor of this calendar view to consume it is **deferred** |
| `DimPerson`, `DimOffice`, `DimDate` | Direct dependencies |

## Agent notes

- Query with `DESCRIBE TABLE EXTENDED workerdatamart.factpersoncalendar` to inspect view SQL if definition drifts.
- Nexthink ingestion is **workspace-only** — not tracked in this repo.
- Do not assume `factpersoncalendar` has a `curated_` or `model_` counterpart; it is a standalone view.

# FactPersonCalendar

[[projects/data-platform-dlz/data-platform-dlz|← Index]] | [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/worker-data-mart]] | [[projects/data-platform-dlz/entities/data-products]]

## Summary

**`workerdatamart.factpersoncalendar`** is a **gold-layer SQL view** (not a contracted Delta entity) that builds a **person × date calendar** with employment, leave, holiday, and office-attendance flags. It lives in Unity Catalog catalog `fbd-d-uks-data-dlz-dbw-gold`, schema `workerdatamart`.

> **Not in repo:** No contract, notebook, or deployment script exists in `DataPlatform-DataLandingZone`. The view was created directly in the workspace (owner: martin.sikula@freshfields.com, created 2026-06-22).

## Unity Catalog name

| Layer | Full name |
|-------|-----------|
| Gold view | `fbd-d-uks-data-dlz-dbw-gold.workerdatamart.factpersoncalendar` |
| Shorthand (used in notebooks) | `workerdatamart.factpersoncalendar` |

**Type:** VIEW (not a managed Delta table). No `curated_` prefix — unlike most WDM contracted facts.

## Curation stages

This object **does not** follow the standard RAW → BASE → ENRICHED → CURATED → MODEL pipeline as a contracted entity. Instead it is a **downstream analytical view** that reads already-curated upstream tables:

```
RAW → BASE (silver UC)     ─┐
ENRICHED (CDF Lookup)      ─┼→ gold VIEW: workerdatamart.factpersoncalendar
CURATED (WDM dimensions)   ─┘
```

| Stage | Role for this view |
|-------|--------------------|
| **RAW → BASE** | Source ingestion tables land in silver catalog |
| **ENRICHED** | `OfficeCrosswalk` (CDF Lookup) used for holiday office mapping |
| **CURATED** | WDM `DimDate`, `DimPerson`, `DimOffice` provide conformed keys |
| **MODEL** | N/A — view is exposed directly in gold `workerdatamart` schema |

## Source tables (upstream)

### Silver / BASE (`fbd-d-uks-data-dlz-dbw-silver`)

| Schema | Table | Ingestion contract | Purpose |
|--------|-------|-------------------|----------|
| `workday` | `workday_availability` | `metadata/contracts/ingestion/workday/workday_availability.json` | Scheduled hours, availability per colleague per date |
| `workday` | `workday_leave_of_absence` | `metadata/contracts/ingestion/workday/workday_leave_of_absence.json` | Secondment and other leave |
| `workday` | `workday_colleague` | `metadata/contracts/ingestion/workday/workday_colleague.json` | Email / Workday username → Colleague_ID mapping |
| `elite3e` | `elite3e_officeholiday` | `metadata/contracts/ingestion/elite3e/elite3e_officeholiday.json` | Office public holidays |
| `elite3e` | `elite3e_office` | `metadata/contracts/ingestion/elite3e/elite3e_office.json` | Office site codes for holidays |
| `nexthink` | `nexthink_session_events` | **Not in repo** | Endpoint/session events for office vs online attendance |
| `temp` | `enriched_cdflookup_officecrosswalk` | ENRICHED `CDFLookup.OfficeCrosswalk` | Elite3E site → Workday office name crosswalk |

### Gold / CURATED WDM (`fbd-d-uks-data-dlz-dbw-gold.workerdatamart`)

| Table | Contract entity | Notebook area |
|-------|----------------|---------------|
| `curated_dimdate` | DimDate (post-deployment) | `4 - CURATED/Worker Data Mart/Post Deployment/` |
| `curated_dimperson` | DimPerson | `3 - ENRICHED` → `4 - CURATED` |
| `curated_dimoffice` | DimOffice | `3 - ENRICHED` → `4 - CURATED` |

## View logic (high level)

The view SQL composes four CTEs:

1. **`colleagues`** — deduplicated Workday colleague lookup by email / username
2. **`attendance`** — Nexthink session events joined to DimDate, DimPerson, DimOffice
3. **`holidays`** — Elite3E office holidays crosswalked to Workday office names
4. **`calendar`** — person × date spine from `workday_availability` with holiday, employment, leave, and vacation flags
5. **`office_attendance`** — merges calendar with attendance to set `IsPrimaryOfficeAttendance`, `IsOtherOfficeAttendance`, `IsOnline`

## Output columns

| Column | Description |
|--------|-------------|
| `DateKey` | Surrogate date key (from `curated_dimdate`) |
| `PersonKey` | Surrogate person key (Workday source) |
| `PrimaryOfficeKey` | Person's primary office on that date |
| `SecondaryOfficeKey` | Person's secondary office on that date |
| `IsHolidayInPrimaryOffice` | Public holiday in primary office |
| `IsHolidayInSecondaryOffice` | Public holiday in secondary office |
| `IsEmployeeNonWorkingDay` | Weekday with zero scheduled hours |
| `IsEmployed` | Date on or after person's effective start |
| `IsOnSecondment` | On secondment leave |
| `IsOnOtherLeave` | On non-secondment leave |
| `IsOnVacation` | Scheduled hours exceed available hours after absence |
| `IsPrimaryOfficeAttendance` | Physical attendance at primary office (Nexthink) |
| `IsOtherOfficeAttendance` | Physical attendance at a non-primary office |
| `IsOnline` | Online session with no mapped office |

## Related contracted entities

| Entity | Relationship |
|--------|-------------|
| `FactWorkerAvailability` | Shares `workday_availability` source; contracted fact with truncate-and-reload |
| `FactTimesheet` | Also uses `elite3e_officeholiday` and calendar logic for missing timesheets |
| `FactPublicHoliday` | BigHand-sourced WDM fact (`curated_factpublicholiday`) — alternative office holiday grain (DateKey+OfficeKey+HolidayName); refactor of this calendar view to consume it is **deferred** |
| `DimPerson`, `DimOffice`, `DimDate` | Direct dependencies |

## Agent notes

- Query with `DESCRIBE TABLE EXTENDED workerdatamart.factpersoncalendar` to inspect view SQL if definition drifts.
- Nexthink ingestion is **workspace-only** — not tracked in this repo.
- Do not assume `factpersoncalendar` has a `curated_` or `model_` counterpart; it is a standalone view.

4. **`calendar`** — person × date spine from `workday_availability` with holiday, employment, leave, and vacation flags
5. **`office_attendance`** — merges calendar with attendance to set `IsPrimaryOfficeAttendance`, `IsOtherOfficeAttendance`, `IsOnline`

## Output columns

| Column | Description |
|--------|-------------|
| `DateKey` | Surrogate date key (from `curated_dimdate`) |
| `PersonKey` | Surrogate person key (Workday source) |
| `PrimaryOfficeKey` | Person's primary office on that date |
| `SecondaryOfficeKey` | Person's secondary office on that date |
| `IsHolidayInPrimaryOffice` | Public holiday in primary office |
| `IsHolidayInSecondaryOffice` | Public holiday in secondary office |
| `IsEmployeeNonWorkingDay` | Weekday with zero scheduled hours |
| `IsEmployed` | Date on or after person's effective start |
| `IsOnSecondment` | On secondment leave |
| `IsOnOtherLeave` | On non-secondment leave |
| `IsOnVacation` | Scheduled hours exceed available hours after absence |
| `IsPrimaryOfficeAttendance` | Physical attendance at primary office (Nexthink) |
| `IsOtherOfficeAttendance` | Physical attendance at a non-primary office |
| `IsOnline` | Online session with no mapped office |

## Related contracted entities

| Entity | Relationship |
|--------|-------------|
| `FactWorkerAvailability` | Shares `workday_availability` source; contracted fact with truncate-and-reload |
| `FactTimesheet` | Also uses `elite3e_officeholiday` and calendar logic for missing timesheets |
| `FactPublicHoliday` | BigHand-sourced WDM fact (`curated_factpublicholiday`) — alternative office holiday grain (DateKey+OfficeKey+HolidayName); refactor of this calendar view to consume it is **deferred** |
| `DimPerson`, `DimOffice`, `DimDate` | Direct dependencies |

## Agent notes

- Query with `DESCRIBE TABLE EXTENDED workerdatamart.factpersoncalendar` to inspect view SQL if definition drifts.
- Nexthink ingestion is **workspace-only** — not tracked in this repo.
- Do not assume `factpersoncalendar` has a `curated_` or `model_` counterpart; it is a standalone view.

arguments.content:
# FactPublicHoliday

[[projects/data-platform-dlz/data-platform-dlz|← Index]] | [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/bighand-data-product]] | [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/worker-data-mart]] | [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/dlz-naming-and-schema-conventions]] | [[projects/data-platform-dlz/entities/factpersoncalendar]]

## Summary

**`FactPublicHoliday`** is a contracted **Worker Data Mart** fact sourced from BigHand public-holiday and office BASE tables. Grain is **office × date × holiday name** (`DateKey` + `OfficeKey` + `HolidayName`). It exposes office-level public holidays for analytics — **not** person-level calendar flags.

| Layer | Object |
|-------|--------|
| Silver BASE | `bighand.bighand_publicholidays`, `bighand.bighand_offices` |
| Gold ENRICHED temp | `temp.enriched_workerdatamart_factpublicholiday` |
| Gold CURATED | `workerdatamart.curated_factpublicholiday` |
| Gold MODEL | `workerdatamart.factpublicholiday` (`WorkerDataMart.FactPublicHoliday`) |

**First deployed dev:** 2026-07-08 (branch `je_bighand_ingest_257456`). Dev validation row counts: **206** BASE holidays → **361** fact rows (post office fan-out).

## When to use this vs alternatives

| Need | Use |
|------|-----|
| Office on a given date is a public holiday (by name/country/region) | **`FactPublicHoliday`** |
| Person × date calendar (leave, employment, attendance) | [[projects/data-platform-dlz/entities/factpersoncalendar]] (uses Elite3E holidays today) |
| Person capacity / forecast with UK-EU office filter | `FactPersonForecast` etc. |

Refactoring `FactPersonCalendar` to consume `FactPublicHoliday` is **deferred**.

## Grain and columns

**Natural key:** `DateKey` + `OfficeKey` + `HolidayName`

| Column | Source | Notes |
|--------|--------|-------|
| `DateKey` | `curated_dimdate` via `TO_DATE(holiday date)` | `bigint` `yyyyMMdd` |
| `OfficeKey` | `curated_dimoffice` (Workday, `is_current=1`) | Standard WDM office surrogate |
| `HolidayName` | BigHand API `name` | e.g. "New Year's Day" |
| `CountryIsoCode` | Holiday row | **Not** from DimOffice |
| `RegionIsoCode` | Holiday row | Nullable; national holidays often empty |
| `IsPublicHoliday` | Constant `1` | Flag column |

## Transform logic (ENRICHED)

Notebook: `Enriched - Worker Data Mart - Fact - Public Holiday.py`

```mermaid
flowchart TD
  H[bighand_publicholidays] -->|country/region match| BO[bighand_offices]
  BO -->|lower officeId = lower OfficeId| DO[curated_dimoffice Workday current]
  H -->|TO_DATE date| DD[curated_dimdate]
  DO --> F[FactPublicHoliday rows]
  DD --> F
```

### Step 1 — Holiday → BigHand office fan-out

```sql
-- National: regionIsoCode null/empty → all offices in country
-- Regional: exact regionIsoCode match required
INNER JOIN bighand_offices o
  ON lower(h.countryIsoCode) = lower(o.countryIsoCode)
 AND (coalesce(h.regionIsoCode,'') = '' OR lower(h.regionIsoCode) = lower(o.regionIsoCode))
```

Holidays with **no matching BigHand office are discarded** at this step.

### Step 2 — Resolve WDM keys

```sql
INNER JOIN curated_dimdate dd ON holidayDate = dd.Date
INNER JOIN curated_dimoffice do
  ON lower(bh_officeId) = lower(do.OfficeId)
 AND do.is_current = 1
 AND lower(do.Source) = 'workday'
```

Rows failing DimDate or DimOffice joins are **discarded**.

### Deliberate differences from FactPerson* facts

- **No** `OfficeRegionCode NOT IN ('CE', 'UK and Ireland')` filter — all matched offices get holidays
- **No** `DimPerson` join — this is an **office** fact, not person
- `CountryIsoCode` / `RegionIsoCode` on the fact reflect the **holiday**, not office attributes

## Consumer join pattern

```sql
SELECT f.DateKey, f.HolidayName, o.OfficeName, o.OfficeCountryCode
FROM `fbd-d-uks-data-dlz-dbw-gold`.workerdatamart.factpublicholiday f
JOIN `fbd-d-uks-data-dlz-dbw-gold`.workerdatamart.curated_dimoffice o
  ON f.OfficeKey = o.OfficeKey
 AND o.is_current = 1
 AND lower(o.Source) = 'workday'
```

To attach people (e.g. "is this person in an office on holiday?"):

```sql
JOIN curated_dimperson p
  ON lower(p.PrimaryOfficeId) = lower(o.OfficeId)
 AND p.is_current = 1
 AND lower(p.Source) = 'workday'
```

Join on **`curated_dimperson` / `curated_dimoffice`**, not MODEL views, for pipeline consistency.

## Ingestion notes

- Entity: `bighand_publicholidays` — 5th BigHand BASE table
- API: `GET {base}/v2/PublicHolidays/{year}/` (Postman: **BigHand RM - PreProd** → `Get Public Holidays`)
- `Ingest BigHand.py` pulls **current UTC year + next year**, merges, dedupes on `(name, date, countryIsoCode, regionIsoCode)`
- Load method: **Full** overwrite at BASE (no natural key at silver)

### API year coverage (dev, 2026-07-08)

| Year | BASE rows | Notes |
|------|----------:|-------|
| 2026 | 206 | `2026-01-01` → `2026-12-28` |
| 2027 | **0** | Pre-prod API returned no 2027 calendar; dual-year ingest is ready when API publishes |

Countries present in dev holiday API (2026): AE, AT, BE, BH, CN (+ regional), DE, ES, FR, GB (+ NIR), IT, JP, NL, SA, SG, US, VN.

**Missing from API** (offices exist in BigHand but no holiday rows): **IE, SK, RU**.

## Office coverage analysis (dev, 2026-07-08)

| Population | Count |
|------------|------:|
| Current Workday offices (`curated_dimoffice`) | 37 |
| Distinct `OfficeKey` in fact | 34 |
| Fact rows | 361 |
| Orphan `OfficeKey`s vs DimOffice | **0** |
| Orphan `DateKey`s vs DimDate | **0** |
| Duplicate natural keys | **0** |

### Three current Workday offices NOT in the fact

| Office | OfficeKey | Why absent |
|--------|----------:|------------|
| **Dublin** | 194 | BigHand office exists (`IRE_DUBLIN`); **no IE holidays in API** |
| **Bratislava** | 108 | BigHand office exists (`SVK_Bratislava`); **no SK holidays in API** |
| **San Francisco** | 117 | `OfficeId` = `USA_SAN FRANCISCO` (space) — **does not match** BigHand `USA_San_Francisco` (underscore) |

### San Francisco — OfficeKey 117 vs 121 (validated via DimPerson)

Two **current** Workday DimOffice rows exist (Type 2 SCD handover):

| OfficeKey | OfficeId | Valid from | Persons (`PrimaryOfficeId`) |
|----------:|----------|------------|---------------------------:|
| 117 | `USA_SAN FRANCISCO` | 2024-07-17 | **0** |
| 121 | `USA_SAN_FRANCISCO` | 2025-02-28 | **55** (all SF staff) |

All 55 San Francisco staff use `PrimaryOfficeId = USA_San_Francisco` → maps to BigHand and **OfficeKey 121**. **9 US holidays** load for OfficeKey 121. OfficeKey 117 is a legacy SCD identity with no person assignments — **safe to ignore**.

Fee-earner split (SF, OfficeKey 121): 37 Fee Earner, 18 Non-Fee Earner.

### Dublin & Bratislava staff (DimPerson, 2026-07-08)

| Office | Current persons | Fee Earner | Non-Fee Earner |
|--------|----------------:|-----------:|---------------:|
| Bratislava | 207 | 0 | 207 |
| Dublin | 6 | 3 | 3 |

Missing IE/SK holidays is **not a pipeline bug** — BigHand API gap. Bratislava impact is mainly non-fee-earners; Dublin has a small fee-earner population (3) without IE calendar data.

### BigHand offices with no DimOffice match

| BigHand `officeId` | Name | Notes |
|------------------|------|-------|
| `Office1` | Default Office | Test/default |
| `LOCATION-3-3953` | 22 floor.1 | Location stub |
| `RUS_Moscow` | Moscow | No Workday `OfficeId` match; RU also absent from holiday API |

Pre-flight (build): **36/39** BigHand `officeId` values match current Workday `curated_dimoffice.OfficeId`.

## Validation SQL

```sql
-- Layer row counts
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `fbd-d-uks-data-dlz-dbw-silver`.bighand.bighand_publicholidays;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `fbd-d-uks-data-dlz-dbw-gold`.temp.enriched_workerdatamart_factpublicholiday;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `fbd-d-uks-data-dlz-dbw-gold`.workerdatamart.curated_factpublicholiday;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `fbd-d-uks-data-dlz-dbw-gold`.workerdatamart.factpublicholiday;

-- Grain uniqueness (expect 0 rows)
SELECT DateKey, OfficeKey, HolidayName, COUNT(*)
FROM `fbd-d-uks-data-dlz-dbw-gold`.workerdatamart.curated_factpublicholiday
GROUP BY ALL HAVING COUNT(*) > 1;

-- Referential integrity (expect 0)
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `fbd-d-uks-data-dlz-dbw-gold`.workerdatamart.curated_factpublicholiday f
LEFT JOIN `fbd-d-uks-data-dlz-dbw-gold`.workerdatamart.curated_dimdate d ON f.DateKey = d.DateKey
WHERE d.DateKey IS NULL;

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `fbd-d-uks-data-dlz-dbw-gold`.workerdatamart.curated_factpublicholiday f
LEFT JOIN `fbd-d-uks-data-dlz-dbw-gold`.workerdatamart.curated_dimoffice o
  ON f.OfficeKey = o.OfficeKey AND o.is_current = 1
WHERE o.OfficeKey IS NULL;

-- Year distribution
SELECT CAST(DateKey / 10000 AS INT) AS HolidayYear, COUNT(*)
FROM `fbd-d-uks-data-dlz-dbw-gold`.workerdatamart.curated_factpublicholiday
GROUP BY ALL ORDER BY 1;

-- Offices in DimOffice but not in fact
WITH workday AS (
  SELECT OfficeKey, OfficeId, OfficeName FROM `fbd-d-uks-data-dlz-dbw-gold`.workerdatamart.curated_dimoffice
  WHERE is_current = 1 AND lower(Source) = 'workday'
),
fact AS (SELECT DISTINCT OfficeKey FROM `fbd-d-uks-data-dlz-dbw-gold`.workerdatamart.curated_factpublicholiday)
SELECT w.* FROM workday w LEFT JOIN fact f ON w.OfficeKey = f.OfficeKey WHERE f.OfficeKey IS NULL;
```

## Known gaps / future improvements

| Item | Priority | Notes |
|------|----------|-------|
| IE/SK holidays in BigHand API | Medium | Raise with BigHand; Dublin has 3 fee earners |
| 2027 calendar in pre-prod | Low | Ingest ready; API empty as of 2026-07-08 |
| `OfficeId` normalisation (space vs underscore) | Low | Would bridge OfficeKey 117; no persons on 117 today |
| `FactPersonCalendar` refactor | Deferred | Replace Elite3E `elite3e_officeholiday` path |
| `DimDate.IsHoliday` | Out of scope | Always 0 today |

## Contracts and repo artifacts

| Artifact | Path |
|----------|------|
| Ingestion contract | `metadata/contracts/ingestion/bighand/bighand_publicholidays.json` |
| WDM contract | `metadata/contracts/data-products/WorkerDataMart/FactPublicHoliday.json` |
| Ingest notebook | `11 - Ingestion/Ingest BigHand.py` (`PublicHolidays` branch) |
| ENRICHED | `3 - ENRICHED/Worker Data Mart/Enriched - Worker Data Mart - Fact - Public Holiday.py` |
| CURATED | `4 - CURATED/Worker Data Mart/Curated - Worker Data Mart - Fact - Public Holiday.py` |
| MODEL | `5 - MODEL/Worker Data Mart/Model - Worker Data Mart - Fact - Public Holiday.py` |

Entity contract `name` = **`Public Holiday`** (spaced) — notebook filenames must include the space.

## Related

- [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/api-ingestion-notebooks]] — `PublicHolidays` dual-year branch
- [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/bighand-data-product]] — BigHand hub
- [[projects/data-platform-dlz/entities/factpersoncalendar]] — person calendar (alternative holiday source today)
- [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/dlz-naming-and-schema-conventions]] — temp/CURATED/MODEL naming

frontmatter.title: FactPublicHoliday
frontmatter.summary: WDM office×date public holiday fact from BigHand; grain DateKey+OfficeKey+HolidayName; dev validation, office coverage gaps, consumer join patterns.

frontmatter.title: FactPublicHoliday
frontmatter.summary: WDM office×date public holiday fact from BigHand; grain DateKey+OfficeKey+HolidayName; dev validation, office coverage gaps, consumer join patterns.

arguments.content:
# FactPublicHoliday

[[projects/data-platform-dlz/data-platform-dlz|← Index]] | [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/bighand-data-product]] | [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/worker-data-mart]] | [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/dlz-naming-and-schema-conventions]] | [[projects/data-platform-dlz/entities/factpersoncalendar]]

## Summary

**`FactPublicHoliday`** is a contracted **Worker Data Mart** fact sourced from BigHand public-holiday and office BASE tables. Grain is **office × date × holiday name** (`DateKey` + `OfficeKey` + `HolidayName`). It exposes office-level public holidays for analytics — **not** person-level calendar flags.

| Layer | Object |
|-------|--------|
| Silver BASE | `bighand.bighand_publicholidays`, `bighand.bighand_offices` |
| Gold ENRICHED temp | `temp.enriched_workerdatamart_factpublicholiday` |
| Gold CURATED | `workerdatamart.curated_factpublicholiday` |
| Gold MODEL | `workerdatamart.factpublicholiday` (`WorkerDataMart.FactPublicHoliday`) |

**First deployed dev:** 2026-07-08 (branch `je_bighand_ingest_257456`). Dev validation row counts: **206** BASE holidays → **361** fact rows (post office fan-out).

## When to use this vs alternatives

| Need | Use |
|------|-----|
| Office on a given date is a public holiday (by name/country/region) | **`FactPublicHoliday`** |
| Person × date calendar (leave, employment, attendance) | [[projects/data-platform-dlz/entities/factpersoncalendar]] (uses Elite3E holidays today) |
| Person capacity / forecast with UK-EU office filter | `FactPersonForecast` etc. |

Refactoring `FactPersonCalendar` to consume `FactPublicHoliday` is **deferred**.

## Grain and columns

**Natural key:** `DateKey` + `OfficeKey` + `HolidayName`

| Column | Source | Notes |
|--------|--------|-------|
| `DateKey` | `curated_dimdate` via `TO_DATE(holiday date)` | `bigint` `yyyyMMdd` |
| `OfficeKey` | `curated_dimoffice` (Workday, `is_current=1`) | Standard WDM office surrogate |
| `HolidayName` | BigHand API `name` | e.g. "New Year's Day" |
| `CountryIsoCode` | Holiday row | **Not** from DimOffice |
| `RegionIsoCode` | Holiday row | Nullable; national holidays often empty |
| `IsPublicHoliday` | Constant `1` | Flag column |

## Transform logic (ENRICHED)

Notebook: `Enriched - Worker Data Mart - Fact - Public Holiday.py`

```mermaid
flowchart TD
  H[bighand_publicholidays] -->|country/region match| BO[bighand_offices]
  BO -->|lower officeId = lower OfficeId| DO[curated_dimoffice Workday current]
  H -->|TO_DATE date| DD[curated_dimdate]
  DO --> F[FactPublicHoliday rows]
  DD --> F
```

### Step 1 — Holiday → BigHand office fan-out

```sql
-- National: regionIsoCode null/empty → all offices in country
-- Regional: exact regionIsoCode match required
INNER JOIN bighand_offices o
  ON lower(h.countryIsoCode) = lower(o.countryIsoCode)
 AND (coalesce(h.regionIsoCode,'') = '' OR lower(h.regionIsoCode) = lower(o.regionIsoCode))
```

Holidays with **no matching BigHand office are discarded** at this step.

### Step 2 — Resolve WDM keys

```sql
INNER JOIN curated_dimdate dd ON holidayDate = dd.Date
INNER JOIN curated_dimoffice do
  ON lower(bh_officeId) = lower(do.OfficeId)
 AND do.is_current = 1
 AND lower(do.Source) = 'workday'
```

Rows failing DimDate or DimOffice joins are **discarded**.

### Deliberate differences from FactPerson* facts

- **No** `OfficeRegionCode NOT IN ('CE', 'UK and Ireland')` filter — all matched offices get holidays
- **No** `DimPerson` join — this is an **office** fact, not person
- `CountryIsoCode` / `RegionIsoCode` on the fact reflect the **holiday**, not office attributes

## Consumer join pattern

```sql
SELECT f.DateKey, f.HolidayName, o.OfficeName, o.OfficeCountryCode
FROM `fbd-d-uks-data-dlz-dbw-gold`.workerdatamart.factpublicholiday f
JOIN `fbd-d-uks-data-dlz-dbw-gold`.workerdatamart.curated_dimoffice o
  ON f.OfficeKey = o.OfficeKey
 AND o.is_current = 1
 AND lower(o.Source) = 'workday'
```

To attach people (e.g. "is this person in an office on holiday?"):

```sql
JOIN curated_dimperson p
  ON lower(p.PrimaryOfficeId) = lower(o.OfficeId)
 AND p.is_current = 1
 AND lower(p.Source) = 'workday'
```

Join on **`curated_dimperson` / `curated_dimoffice`**, not MODEL views, for pipeline consistency.

## Ingestion notes

- Entity: `bighand_publicholidays` — 5th BigHand BASE table
- API: `GET {base}/v2/PublicHolidays/{year}/` (Postman: **BigHand RM - PreProd** → `Get Public Holidays`)
- `Ingest BigHand.py` pulls **current UTC year + next year**, merges, dedupes on `(name, date, countryIsoCode, regionIsoCode)`
- Load method: **Full** overwrite at BASE (no natural key at silver)

### API year coverage (dev, 2026-07-08)

| Year | BASE rows | Notes |
|------|----------:|-------|
| 2026 | 206 | `2026-01-01` → `2026-12-28` |
| 2027 | **0** | Pre-prod API returned no 2027 calendar; dual-year ingest is ready when API publishes |

Countries present in dev holiday API (2026): AE, AT, BE, BH, CN (+ regional), DE, ES, FR, GB (+ NIR), IT, JP, NL, SA, SG, US, VN.

**Missing from API** (offices exist in BigHand but no holiday rows): **IE, SK, RU**.

## Office coverage analysis (dev, 2026-07-08)

| Population | Count |
|------------|------:|
| Current Workday offices (`curated_dimoffice`) | 37 |
| Distinct `OfficeKey` in fact | 34 |
| Fact rows | 361 |
| Orphan `OfficeKey`s vs DimOffice | **0** |
| Orphan `DateKey`s vs DimDate | **0** |
| Duplicate natural keys | **0** |

### Three current Workday offices NOT in the fact

| Office | OfficeKey | Why absent |
|--------|----------:|------------|
| **Dublin** | 194 | BigHand office exists (`IRE_DUBLIN`); **no IE holidays in API** |
| **Bratislava** | 108 | BigHand office exists (`SVK_Bratislava`); **no SK holidays in API** |
| **San Francisco** | 117 | `OfficeId` = `USA_SAN FRANCISCO` (space) — **does not match** BigHand `USA_San_Francisco` (underscore) |

### San Francisco — OfficeKey 117 vs 121 (validated via DimPerson)

Two **current** Workday DimOffice rows exist (Type 2 SCD handover):

| OfficeKey | OfficeId | Valid from | Persons (`PrimaryOfficeId`) |
|----------:|----------|------------|---------------------------:|
| 117 | `USA_SAN FRANCISCO` | 2024-07-17 | **0** |
| 121 | `USA_SAN_FRANCISCO` | 2025-02-28 | **55** (all SF staff) |

All 55 San Francisco staff use `PrimaryOfficeId = USA_San_Francisco` → maps to BigHand and **OfficeKey 121**. **9 US holidays** load for OfficeKey 121. OfficeKey 117 is a legacy SCD identity with no person assignments — **safe to ignore**.

Fee-earner split (SF, OfficeKey 121): 37 Fee Earner, 18 Non-Fee Earner.

### Dublin & Bratislava staff (DimPerson, 2026-07-08)

| Office | Current persons | Fee Earner | Non-Fee Earner |
|--------|----------------:|-----------:|---------------:|
| Bratislava | 207 | 0 | 207 |
| Dublin | 6 | 3 | 3 |

Missing IE/SK holidays is **not a pipeline bug** — BigHand API gap. Bratislava impact is mainly non-fee-earners; Dublin has a small fee-earner population (3) without IE calendar data.

### BigHand offices with no DimOffice match

| BigHand `officeId` | Name | Notes |
|------------------|------|-------|
| `Office1` | Default Office | Test/default |
| `LOCATION-3-3953` | 22 floor.1 | Location stub |
| `RUS_Moscow` | Moscow | No Workday `OfficeId` match; RU also absent from holiday API |

Pre-flight (build): **36/39** BigHand `officeId` values match current Workday `curated_dimoffice.OfficeId`.

## Validation SQL

```sql
-- Layer row counts
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `fbd-d-uks-data-dlz-dbw-silver`.bighand.bighand_publicholidays;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `fbd-d-uks-data-dlz-dbw-gold`.temp.enriched_workerdatamart_factpublicholiday;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `fbd-d-uks-data-dlz-dbw-gold`.workerdatamart.curated_factpublicholiday;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `fbd-d-uks-data-dlz-dbw-gold`.workerdatamart.factpublicholiday;

-- Grain uniqueness (expect 0 rows)
SELECT DateKey, OfficeKey, HolidayName, COUNT(*)
FROM `fbd-d-uks-data-dlz-dbw-gold`.workerdatamart.curated_factpublicholiday
GROUP BY ALL HAVING COUNT(*) > 1;

-- Referential integrity (expect 0)
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `fbd-d-uks-data-dlz-dbw-gold`.workerdatamart.curated_factpublicholiday f
LEFT JOIN `fbd-d-uks-data-dlz-dbw-gold`.workerdatamart.curated_dimdate d ON f.DateKey = d.DateKey
WHERE d.DateKey IS NULL;

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `fbd-d-uks-data-dlz-dbw-gold`.workerdatamart.curated_factpublicholiday f
LEFT JOIN `fbd-d-uks-data-dlz-dbw-gold`.workerdatamart.curated_dimoffice o
  ON f.OfficeKey = o.OfficeKey AND o.is_current = 1
WHERE o.OfficeKey IS NULL;

-- Year distribution
SELECT CAST(DateKey / 10000 AS INT) AS HolidayYear, COUNT(*)
FROM `fbd-d-uks-data-dlz-dbw-gold`.workerdatamart.curated_factpublicholiday
GROUP BY ALL ORDER BY 1;

-- Offices in DimOffice but not in fact
WITH workday AS (
  SELECT OfficeKey, OfficeId, OfficeName FROM `fbd-d-uks-data-dlz-dbw-gold`.workerdatamart.curated_dimoffice
  WHERE is_current = 1 AND lower(Source) = 'workday'
),
fact AS (SELECT DISTINCT OfficeKey FROM `fbd-d-uks-data-dlz-dbw-gold`.workerdatamart.curated_factpublicholiday)
SELECT w.* FROM workday w LEFT JOIN fact f ON w.OfficeKey = f.OfficeKey WHERE f.OfficeKey IS NULL;
```

## Known gaps / future improvements

| Item | Priority | Notes |
|------|----------|-------|
| IE/SK holidays in BigHand API | Medium | Raise with BigHand; Dublin has 3 fee earners |
| 2027 calendar in pre-prod | Low | Ingest ready; API empty as of 2026-07-08 |
| `OfficeId` normalisation (space vs underscore) | Low | Would bridge OfficeKey 117; no persons on 117 today |
| `FactPersonCalendar` refactor | Deferred | Replace Elite3E `elite3e_officeholiday` path |
| `DimDate.IsHoliday` | Out of scope | Always 0 today |

## Contracts and repo artifacts

| Artifact | Path |
|----------|------|
| Ingestion contract | `metadata/contracts/ingestion/bighand/bighand_publicholidays.json` |
| WDM contract | `metadata/contracts/data-products/WorkerDataMart/FactPublicHoliday.json` |
| Ingest notebook | `11 - Ingestion/Ingest BigHand.py` (`PublicHolidays` branch) |
| ENRICHED | `3 - ENRICHED/Worker Data Mart/Enriched - Worker Data Mart - Fact - Public Holiday.py` |
| CURATED | `4 - CURATED/Worker Data Mart/Curated - Worker Data Mart - Fact - Public Holiday.py` |
| MODEL | `5 - MODEL/Worker Data Mart/Model - Worker Data Mart - Fact - Public Holiday.py` |

Entity contract `name` = **`Public Holiday`** (spaced) — notebook filenames must include the space.

## Related

- [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/api-ingestion-notebooks]] — `PublicHolidays` dual-year branch
- [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/bighand-data-product]] — BigHand hub
- [[projects/data-platform-dlz/entities/factpersoncalendar]] — person calendar (alternative holiday source today)
- [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/dlz-naming-and-schema-conventions]] — temp/CURATED/MODEL naming

frontmatter.title: FactPublicHoliday
frontmatter.summary: WDM office×date public holiday fact from BigHand; grain DateKey+OfficeKey+HolidayName; dev validation, office coverage gaps, consumer join patterns.

arguments.content:
### FactPublicHoliday grain and fan-out

- **Grain:** `DateKey` + `OfficeKey` + `HolidayName`
- National holidays (`regionIsoCode` null/empty) match all BigHand offices in that country; regional require exact region match
- Holidays with **no office match are discarded**; DateKey from `curated_dimdate`; OfficeKey from current Workday `curated_dimoffice`
- Dual-year ingest: `GET PublicHolidays/{currentYear}/` + `GET PublicHolidays/{nextYear}/`, then dedupe

# BigHand Data Product

[[projects/data-platform-dlz/data-platform-dlz|← Index]] | **Gold inventory:** [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/bighand-gold-layer-exploration]] | Ingestion: [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/api-ingestion-notebooks]] | Person facts: [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/worker-data-mart]] | Naming: [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/dlz-naming-and-schema-conventions]] | **Holidays:** [[projects/data-platform-dlz/entities/factpublicholiday]]

## Summary

**BigHand** is a DLZ **ingestion source** (`bighand`) and a small **data product** that retains one entity only: **Offices** (Enriched Dataset → `silver.temp`).

Three person-level facts and one office-level holiday fact sourced from BigHand BASE tables are **WorkerDataMart** entities (`FactPersonForecast`, `FactPersonQualification`, `FactPersonWorkingArrangement`, `FactPublicHoliday`) with CURATED tables in `gold.workerdatamart` and MODEL views including `FactPersonQualification`, `FactPersonCapacity`, and `FactPublicHoliday`.

## Current entity catalogue

| Entity | Product | Type | Terminal output |
|--------|---------|------|-----------------|
| `Offices` | **BigHand** | Enriched Dataset | `silver.temp.enriched_bighand_offices` |
| `FactPersonForecast` | **WorkerDataMart** | Fact | `workerdatamart.curated_factpersonforecast` |
| `FactPersonQualification` | **WorkerDataMart** | Fact | `workerdatamart.curated_factpersonqualification` + MODEL `FactPersonQualification` |
| `FactPersonWorkingArrangement` | **WorkerDataMart** | Fact | `workerdatamart.curated_factpersonworkingarrangement` |
| `FactPublicHoliday` | **WorkerDataMart** | Fact | `workerdatamart.curated_factpublicholiday` + MODEL `FactPublicHoliday` |
| — | **WorkerDataMart** | MODEL view | `workerdatamart.factpersoncapacity` (composite person×date) |

Ingestion BASE (silver): `bighand.bighand_forecasts`, `bighand_offices`, `bighand_qualifications`, `bighand_workingarrangements`, `bighand_publicholidays` (5 tables).

## Architecture

```mermaid
flowchart LR
  subgraph ingest [Ingestion]
    ADF["ADF: Task - Ingest BigHand"]
    NB["Ingest BigHand.py"]
    RAW["ADLS RAW"]
  end
  subgraph silver [silver]
    BASE["bighand.bighand_*"]
    OFF_TEMP["temp.enriched_bighand_offices"]
  end
  subgraph gold [gold]
    WDM_ENR["temp.enriched_workerdatamart_factperson*|factpublicholiday"]
    WDM_CUR["workerdatamart.curated_factperson*|factpublicholiday"]
    VIEWS["factpersonqualification / factpersoncapacity / factpublicholiday"]
  end

  ADF --> NB --> RAW --> BASE
  BASE --> OFF_TEMP
  BASE --> WDM_ENR --> WDM_CUR --> VIEWS
```

| Stage | BigHand product (Offices) | WDM facts |
|-------|-------------------------|-----------|
| **Ingestion** | API → RAW via ADF + `Ingest BigHand.py` | Same BASE tables; `PublicHolidays` dual-year GETs |
| **RAW→BASE** | `RAW to BASE - Default` | Same |
| **ENRICHED** | Cast/prune → `silver.temp` | PersonKey / office fan-out / DateKey → `gold.temp` |
| **CURATED** | — (terminal at ENRICHED) | Mechanical load → `workerdatamart.curated_*` |
| **MODEL** | — | Hand-authored views in `workerdatamart` |

### PersonKey join (WDM ENRICHED person facts)

```sql
INNER JOIN `{GoldCatalog}`.workerdatamart.curated_dimperson dp
  ON bh.<employeeId column> = dp.EmployeeId
 AND dp.is_current = 1
 AND lower(dp.Source) = 'workday'
INNER JOIN `{GoldCatalog}`.workerdatamart.curated_dimoffice o
  ON lower(o.OfficeId) = lower(dp.PrimaryOfficeId)
 AND o.is_current = 1
 AND lower(o.Source) = 'workday'
 AND o.OfficeRegionCode NOT IN ('CE', 'UK and Ireland')
```

Use `lower()` on office IDs. Join `curated_dimperson`, not MODEL `DimPerson` views. **UK/EU filter does not apply to `FactPublicHoliday`** (office holidays).

### FactPublicHoliday

- **Grain:** `DateKey` + `OfficeKey` + `HolidayName`
- Dual-year ingest: `GET PublicHolidays/{currentYear}/` + `GET PublicHolidays/{nextYear}/`, dedupe
- **Operational guide:** [[projects/data-platform-dlz/entities/factpublicholiday]] — validation, office coverage gaps, consumer joins, API year coverage

## Contracts

| Scope | Path |
|-------|------|
| Source system | `metadata/contracts/ingestion/bighand/` |
| BigHand product | `metadata/contracts/data-products/BigHand/` (`Offices` only) |
| WDM facts | `metadata/contracts/data-products/WorkerDataMart/FactPerson*.json`, `FactPublicHoliday.json` |
| CSV sources | `metadata/contracts/scripts/ingestion/bighand-*.csv`, `.../data-products/BigHand-*.csv`, WDM entity/column CSV rows |

Regenerate ingestion JSON: `metadata/contracts/scripts/ingestion/Generate-DataContractsFromSchemaCSV.py` (local dev) or PowerShell `Generate-DataContractsFromSchemaCSV.ps1` (CI).

## Repo artifacts

### Ingestion (ADF)

| Artifact | Role |
|----------|------|
| `ingestion/.../pipeline/Task - Ingest BigHand.json` | ADF task → Databricks notebook |
| `ingestion/.../linkedService/BigHand_Source.json` | REST linked service (KV secrets) |
| `ingestion/.../dataset/BigHand_Source.json` | Dataset for BigHand API |
| `Child - Ingest Data.json` | Routes `BigHand API` → `Task - Ingest BigHand` |

### Databricks notebooks

| Stage | Path |
|-------|------|
| API ingest | `11 - Ingestion/Ingest BigHand.py` |
| ENRICHED Offices | `3 - ENRICHED/BigHand/Enriched - BigHand - Enriched Dataset - Offices.py` |
| ENRICHED facts | `3 - ENRICHED/Worker Data Mart/Enriched - Worker Data Mart - Fact - Person {Forecast\|Qualification\|Working Arrangement}.py`, `... Public Holiday.py` |
| CURATED facts | `4 - CURATED/Worker Data Mart/Curated - Worker Data Mart - Fact - Person *.py`, `... Public Holiday.py` |
| MODEL | `5 - MODEL/Worker Data Mart/Model - Worker Data Mart - Fact - Person {Qualification\|Capacity}.py`, `... Public Holiday.py` |
| BASE DDL | `1 - Post Deployment/Create BASE Metastore Tables - bighand.py` |
| CURATED DDL | `1 - Post Deployment/Create CURATED Metastore Tables - WorkerDataMart - BigHand Facts.py` |

Post-deploy orchestrators `%run` the BASE and CURATED DDL children from `Create BASE Metastore Tables.py` and `Create CURATED Metastore Tables.py`. MODEL notebooks register in `Run All Model Views.py`.

## Deploy sequence

| Order | Pipeline | Notes |
|------:|----------|-------|
| 1 | **Metadata** | Contracts → SQL orchestration; can run parallel with Transformation |
| 2 | **Transformation** | `import-dir` notebooks to `/Data Platform` |
| 3 | **Unity Catalog** | Post-deploy DDL (~45 min); **never** parallel with Transformation |
| 4 | **Main Orchestrator** | Load ENRICHED → CURATED |
| 5 | **Run All Model Views** | If not included in UC run |

Prerequisites: `DimPerson` / `DimOffice` / `DimDate` curated; BASE populated for all five `bighand_*` entities.

See [[projects/data-platform-dlz/skills/deployment-and-ci-cd]] for pipeline detail and [[projects/data-platform-dlz/concepts/orchestration-and-adf]] for ADF chain.

## Validation SQL (dev reference)

See [[projects/data-platform-dlz/entities/factpublicholiday#Validation SQL]] for full holiday-fact checks. Quick row counts:

```sql
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `fbd-d-uks-data-dlz-dbw-gold`.workerdatamart.curated_factpublicholiday;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `fbd-d-uks-data-dlz-dbw-gold`.workerdatamart.factpublicholiday;
```
